- Madam Faruzan here's pretty friendly — when she heard that we were buying clothes, she decided to give us some help. ｜ 这位珐露珊前辈真是个好人，听说我们在买衣服，就决定帮我们一把。
- (As I've told you before, there are still some mysteries for him to resolve. Things that are clear as day to me, but that he has yet to understand.) ｜ （我说过，他身上还有谜题。那些事从我的视角看得很清楚，他自己却完全没弄明白。）
- The "prophecy"... Have you heard of it? ｜ 「预言」…你听说过了么？
- I guess it's no surprise coming from the one who repelled Stormterror... ｜ #{NICKNAME}，不愧是击退了那个风魔龙的人呢…
- As expected of an A-rank commission. One misstep and we're stuck in here! ｜ 只是一步做错就被关起来，果然是A级委托吧？
- Abyss Lector: Violet Lightning ｜ 深渊咏者·紫电
- This simple fence is crafted with Brightwood and vines, and has two triangular patterns on it. It is said that to maintain ecological balance, Forest Watchers once erected these fences around no-fishing zones. But only failing ecosystems require such protection, and those are rather rare in Sumeru nowadays. Therefore, these fences are treated as boundary markers most of the time. ｜ 结构简单的围栏，以辉木和藤条搭建而成，编有两道三角形的花纹。传说中，出于维持区域生态平衡的考量，曾有巡林官用这种围墙划分禁止狩猎的区域。不过，通常只有生态濒临崩溃的地带才需要设立禁止狩猎区，这种情况在如今的须弥较为少见。所以大多情况下，这种围栏和普通的边界标志物没有区别。
- Gold-Inscribed Secret Source Core ｜ 秘刻金纹的源核
- A self-righteous suck-up with a bleeding heart, that's what you are. ｜ 滥好人，这就是我对你们的评价。
- Chasca ｜ 恰斯卡
- ...Argh, sorry! Sorry, I—I'm getting carried away. My mother always tells me that dandelions can carry people's heart's desires far away to a distant place. ｜ 抱，抱歉！我，我自顾自说太多了！我听我母亲说，蒲公英能够带着人们的思念，被风一直带到很远。
- Fame was right around the corner. ｜ 大把的人气明明近在眼前。
- (Now she's done it...) ｜ （就这么说出去了…）
- Life mimics drama, as drama does life... Sometimes, we know not whether we stand offstage, or in the spotlight... ｜ 人生如戏，戏如人生，有时谁能分清自己在台上或是台下…
- No matter what your reasons or struggles might be, the first rule is: you must eat well! ｜ 不论你有什么理由或者苦衷，首先，饭必须好好吃！
- Rebels... A war... Our comrades in Inazuma won't be caught in the crossfire, will they? ｜ 叛军…战争…不会波及到我们在稻妻的同伴吧？
- Lunar Realm ｜ 月中王国
- Traveler, you know a lot about this dish, right? Can you give me some advice? ｜ 旅行者，你应该很懂这种菜吧？你能帮我再拿拿主意吗？
- "Congratulations to our weight-watching friends! We are now unveiling our latest revolutionary recipe — the Fat Fighter's Nutri-Meal!" ｜ 「恭喜各位需要减脂的朋友们！本店新研制出了新的食谱——减脂营养餐！」
- Wait... Oh, I get it! You were those two obnoxious kids! It's been so long, and you're all grown up now... I didn't recognize you. ｜ 等等，我想起来了！你们就是那两个让人讨厌的小孩？时间过去太久，你们长大了，我竟然没有第一时间认出来。
- Yes, that's— But when did you... ｜ 我的符纸！你什么时候…
- A Fishy Flavor ｜ 鱼之味
- Information ｜ 消息列表
- The skeletal-white snowscape devours life without leaving any trace. It is the invisible enemy we fight against each day. ｜ 在无尽的雪原里，生命随时都会被碎骨一般的纯白天地吞噬，连足迹也无法留下。为此，我们每日都在与看不见的敌人战斗。
- What are you whispering about? ｜ 你们在说什么呀？
- Hello ｜ 初次见面…
- Still, do you have any idea who the rich person might be? And why the novelist doesn't want us to hear what he's saying to Chevreuse? ｜ 你说，幕后黑手到底会是谁呢？那位作家为什么不愿意让我们听到？
- Sorry, we don't carry any black swimming floaters here. ｜ 不好意思，我这里没有黑色款式的豚豚球哦。
- Very well. Then I shall complete this part on my own. ｜ 那这一段就由我独力完成吧。
- We will never, ever, EVER, stop moving forward! ｜ 我们还会一直一直，一直一直走下去！
- Deals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT]. ｜ 造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]。
- Perrie and I promised each other, that once we're older, we're gonna go see it together. ｜ 我跟佩佩约好了，长大后一起去看。
- Wind-Up Great Owl Spirit Mechanism ｜ 「大大枭枭幽魂机关」
- Very well, then it is settled! ｜ 就这么说好啦，一言为定！
- Indeed. But for the time being, at least, the tradition of paying tribute to the Anemo Archon on Windcoming Day is still alive and well, and the Weinlesefest remains a time for Mondstadters to share the joy of the harvest with one another as they partake of fine wines. ｜ 嗯，说回现在，「归风日」敬献风神的传统仍然保留着。佳酿节也一直是蒙德人分享丰收喜悦、品尝美酒的节日。
- When I was with The Captain, I could hear something coming from him, souls that were not his own. I heard voices of sorrow and pain, sometimes faint, sometimes strong. ｜ 我曾经在「队长」的身上，听到过不属于他的灵魂的声音，时而微弱，时而强烈，有时悲伤，有时痛苦。
- They fight monsters like pros, but they're hopelessly lost when it comes to trying to break a few wooden sticks. ｜ 面对怪物时能利落地战斗，打木桩的时候却手忙脚乱。
- How could none of us have noticed? ｜ 我们都没有注意到…

- Even with things being as bad as they've gotten, he still won't consider taking up honest work to pay off his debt. Instead, he keeps going on about pulling off some "major deal" and hitting it big. ｜ 事情都到这地步了，他也不想着好好工作把钱还了，反而又想做一笔「大生意」，赚一大笔钱把债还了。

- Tell us the truth, no more lies! ｜ 说来听听吧，不准撒谎。
- Debris of Decarabian's City ｜ 高塔孤王的残垣
- How are you doing? ｜ 你还好吗？
- I guess the only time I ever feel uncomfortable is during the team stage of the Pilgrimage. The looks from the other contestants are just too intense... ｜ 似乎，除了参加「归火圣夜巡礼」的团体赛，被对手们热切注视着之外，我还没有过「不习惯」的感受…
- And when you want tea, you can just put the bag in a cup and add water. ｜ 需要冲泡的时候，就直接将这种茶袋放进杯里倒上水。
- Sir! We've got trouble! The Shogun's Army is attacking! ｜ 不好了！幕府军过来偷袭了！！
- He said he saw me crying on the side of the road when he was out scavenging one day, so he took me in. That was before I could speak and remember things. ｜ 哥哥说他有一次拾荒看到我在路边哭，看我可怜就把我捡回去了。那时候我还不会说话，也不记得事。
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- A flower that blooms amidst burning flames. It is said that long ago, a sage once wore it as he walked into a sea of fire. ｜ 在烈焰的簇拥下盛开的花朵，传说古代智者佩着它走进了火海。
- Wow! Mister Fatooey got me a pwesent? Thank you! ｜ 哇！那个驴人众蜀黍，给我的礼物？谢谢！
- Ironclad Beetle King, Back in Action! ｜ 总算痊愈的「金刚身怒面虫王」
- A younger version of Granny? ｜ 年轻时的奶奶？
- During battle, the Bounty target will use Tracking Fire Ball to summon a fireball that can lock onto characters and deal AoE Pyro DMG. ｜ 讨伐目标在战斗中会施放「追踪火球」，召唤会追踪角色，并造成火元素范围伤害的火球。
- Is this a tough decision for you? ｜ 很难决定吗？
- Teahouse Stove: A Capital Cook ｜ 茶坊炉灶-「妙火烈烹」
- An ancient timepiece upon which the light of Khvarena gleams. It is filled with a pure liquid that appears alive. ｜ 闪烁着灵光的古老时计，其中盛装着似有生命的纯净液体。
- I never did fulfill that wish, but that doesn't mean I'm here pining ever harder for it to come true. Still... the fact that things didn't work out doesn't make my past self a fool for hoping in vain that they would, does it? ｜ 愿望不会因为没能实现而变得更珍贵，但也不必因其落空就质疑当时的真心，对吧？
- The Pari stand charged with the duty to purify the Abyssal defilement infesting the land. ｜ 花灵背负着净化侵蚀大地的深渊污秽的职责。
- If you must know, I am happy to divulge my true identity. I am a Fatui Harbinger. Call me "The Doctor." ｜ 当然了，你如果好奇，我也愿意报出真正的名号。你可以称呼我为愚人众执行官——「博士」。

- (Kaeya sure looks like he's getting a kick out of this...) ｜ （一副看热闹不嫌事大的表情呢…）
- Remember to come to the flower shop later. I've got a surprise for you. ｜ 待会儿记得来我的花店哦，有惊喜给你。
- I've got it. ｜ 我已经明白了…
- As long as we have the Knights of Favonius, peace and freedom will prevail in Mondstadt. ｜ 有西风骑士团在的话，今后的蒙德也会一如既往地安宁自由下去吧。
- Let's follow it and see. ｜ 追上去看看。

- If it wasn't for my injury... I could be out there chasing down even bigger treasure hoards with the captain and my old crew mates... ｜ 要是没受伤…肯定能和大姐头一起，找到更多宝藏吧…
- To Mona, that her Vision was sent to her from the gods doesn't mean a great deal.\nThis is not to say that possessing an external focus for elemental power is not useful.\nHaving power is always a good thing, but when compared to lofty "truth," "martial prowess" is such a pathetically small concept.\nThe gods, too, are bound by the rules of this world. Mona seeks the final truth of the world, hidden amidst the sea of stars.\nAs such, she does not have any reverence for her Vision, which the people of this world consider to be a sign of divine favor and the source of all power.\nNonetheless, this item that serves no practical use in her hands is something that she treasures greatly.\nIt was gifted to her by her teacher as a teaching aid, and it is the only evidence of their time together as master and pupil.\nShe preserves these distant memories with great care. This exquisitely-made teaching aid thus accompanied her everywhere, like an accessory worn by any other maiden.\nUntil one day, when a Vision of her very own would quietly indwell this old teaching aid... ｜ 对于莫娜而言，「神之眼」作为神眷的证明，并不值得特别在意。\n不过，其价值也不仅止于「导出魔力的外置器官」。\n拥有力量固然是好事，但与至高至伟的「理」相比，「武力」实在是渺小的概念。\n神亦受世界运行之理约束，莫娜只寻求隐藏于宏远星空之中的世界终极真理。\n对于被世人当作神明之认可、力量之源泉的「神之眼」，她从不会抱持跪拜一般的心态。\n然而，手中这枚没有实际效用的「神之眼」却是她无比珍视之物。\n那是师父作为教具赠予她的物件。关于那段与师父共同度过的岁月，它是当下唯一的证物。\n她小心地保存着这份遥远的记忆。造型精巧的教具就这样陪伴着她，宛如普通女孩所用的饰物。\n直到某一天，属于她自己的「神之眼」，悄然降临到这枚古老的教具中…
- Hold on, Boss. There's no need to start a fight here! ｜ 等等，没必要在这里起冲突！
- And later on, his brother left the tribe and lived as a recluse. That's all it says. ｜ 他弟弟后来离开了部族，在外面离群索居。这就是全部内容了。

- Give up on making further actions this Round and declare its end.\nThe player who ends their Round first will go first next Round, meaning that they will have the initiative during the next Round's Action Phase.\nAfter this, the player who has yet to declare the end of their Round will continue to take Actions.\nAfter both players have made this declaration, the Action Phase will end and this Round's End Phase will begin. ｜ 放弃本回合的行动，「宣布回合结束」。\n先「宣布回合结束」的牌手会成为「先手牌手」，并在下回合的行动阶段优先行动。\n这之后，未「宣布回合结束」的牌手可以继续行动，直到「宣布回合结束」。\n双方都「宣布回合结束」后，行动阶段结束，进入本回合的「结束阶段」。
- In an attempt to adapt to its new environment, Apep changed color from the emerald green of the forest to the yellow of the sand. ｜ 阿佩普也从一条翠绿的巨龙，变成了沙黄色的形态，这也是它努力适应环境的表现。

But much more than skill with cards, she seems to be more concerned with the aesthetic appeal of the cards on the table... ｜ 协会认证牌手赫茉莎，自称「冒险家」的优雅淑女，擅长拍摄各种精彩的冒险画片。最近迷上了七圣召唤，因此会邀请各种对手来切磋，但相比对局的技巧，她似乎更看重桌上卡牌的视觉效果…

- Samurai who have fallen into banditry. Though they are called the Nobushi, they do not have a centralized organization.\nHaving pursued the path of a martial artist for a long time, they possess highly advanced sword skills but no longer use them for good.\nSometimes, they even collude with the Treasure Hoarders or Fatui out of a greed for wealth — or simply to survive. ｜ 落草为寇的流浪武人，虽然常被称为「野伏」，但并不隶属于某个统一的团体。\n作为常年行走在武道上的人，有着精湛的剑术，如今却不将其用于正道。\n为了生计与财富，有时候甚至会与盗宝团、愚人众沆瀣一气。

- Precisely! So as you can see, even one as great as Rex Lapis was not immune to making the occasional blunder. ｜ 对吧！所以说帝君啊，有时也会百密一疏呢。
- I'd say you've gone above and beyond with your charity work this time. ｜ 已经超额完成了慈善帮助工作…
- As precise as precise can be, my dear Lutong. The Number Machine's functions are just so. A concise answer indeed. ｜ 非常准确，亲爱的路通，「推数机」的功能就是这么简洁。
- #Let's do this like we always do, {NICKNAME}, and then we can kick back and start looking for something to eat instead! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，拿出以前的干劲，搞定它们以后，我们就能安心找食材了！

### Part 133

- Apex Melee unit. Periodically uses earthshaking attacks and heavy blows to deal <color=#FF8126FF>AoE Cryo DMG</color>.\nAfter being deployed, it will apply <color=#FF8126FF>Cryo elemental Frost Armor</color> to itself. While the Frost Armor exists, the Frostarm Lawachurl's skills will be enhanced and it will take less damage, but the Armor will break after a set period of time or being subject to enough Elemental Reactions. ｜ 顶尖近战单位，间歇性使用震地打击和重拳，造成冰元素<color=#FF8126FF>范围伤害</color>。\n部署后，会为自己附属<color=#FF8126FF>具有冰元素的寒霜之铠</color>。寒霜之铠存在期间，丘丘霜铠王的技能会得到强化并且受到的伤害会降低，但是会在持续一定时间或受到一定程度的元素反应后破除。
- I reckon that even this domain shall not prove too difficult for you. ｜ 是你的话，出入这种秘境大概不是难事吧。
- Though I may not be particularly skilled in battle, being able to heal the wounds of others is good in its own right. At least, that's what I think. ｜ 既然不擅长战斗，那为大家治疗应该也不错吧…我是这么想的。
- I shall follow your lead, and play the good visitor. ｜ 客随主便，你来安排就好。

- Iansan charges forward a certain distance, dealing Nightsoul-aligned <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color> to all opponents in her path.\nAfter this Skill is used, Iansan will regain 54 Nightsoul points and enter the Nightsoul's Blessing state. Within 5s after this is done, using a Normal Attack will trigger 1 quick Swift Stormflight stomp from Iansan that will not consume Stamina.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Nightsoul's Blessing: Iansan</color>\nContinuously consumes Nightsoul points. If she runs out, or uses this Skill again, her Nightsoul's Blessing state will end. It has the following properties:\n· Increases Iansan's Movement SPD.\n· Holding sprint will switch Iansan to Rushing Thunderbolt mode, greatly increasing her Movement SPD temporarily. In this mode, Iansan can make flying leaps using terrain, or consume additional Nightsoul points to move on water or liquid Phlogiston while being immune to DMG from the latter.\n\n<i>"Faster, stronger! That's what all that hard work is for!"</i> ｜ 伊安珊向前突进一段距离，对路径上的敌人造成具有夜魂性质的<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>。\n施放后，伊安珊将恢复54点夜魂值，并进入夜魂加持状态。并且在突进结束后的5秒内，点按普通攻击时，伊安珊将快速施放一次不消耗体力的「雷霆飞缒」踏击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>夜魂加持·伊安珊</color>\n持续消耗夜魂值。夜魂值耗尽时，或是再次施放时，伊安珊的夜魂加持将会结束。夜魂加持状态具有如下特性：\n·提升伊安珊的移动速度；\n·长按冲刺会切换至「雷驰电掣」模式，短时间内大幅提升伊安珊的移动速度；在这种状态下伊安珊可以利用地形差进行飞跃，或额外消耗夜魂值在水面与液态燃素上移动，并免疫液态燃素的伤害。\n\n<i>「更快，更强！平时的不懈努力就是为了这一刻。」</i>
- Anyways, what's the deal with that Kuisel guy exactly? Paimon seriously doesn't get it... Let's go look around where he left. Maybe there's something we can find. ｜ 话说回来，奎瑟尔那家伙到底是怎么回事？真搞不懂…我们往他离开的方向找找看吧，说不定能发现什么。

- The Bubblebalms created by Sigewinne's Elemental Skill can heal party members other than herself, and deal Hydro DMG to opponents, healing her when they disappear.\nAfter using her Elemental Skill, Sigewinne will gain a certain number of Convalescence stacks. When an nearby off-field party member other than Sigewinne deals damage with their Elemental Skill, they consume 1 stack of Convalescence to increase that instance of DMG dealt.\nSigewinne's Elemental Burst deals AoE Hydro DMG to enemies in front of her.\nAdditional Elemental Orbs will drop during the trial event challenge to facilitate the testing of the trial character's Elemental Burst. ｜ 元素战技的水球能为希格雯自己以外的角色恢复生命值，对敌人造成水元素伤害，并在消失时为她恢复生命值。\n元素战技施放后，还会为希格雯自己赋予若干层静养计数，除希格雯外附近队伍中处于后台的角色的元素战技造成伤害时，消耗1层静养计数并提升这次造成的伤害。\n希格雯的元素爆发会对前方持续造成水元素范围伤害。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。

- But I'm Kasim, the legendary bandit! I'm nothing like a normal Fatuus! If you leave right now, I won't be too harsh on you... ｜ 不过我可是传说中的大盗卡西姆！和愚人众的喽啰不一样！如果你们现在离开的话，还能放你们一马…
- The heavens grew eyes to behold the true beauty of the world below, but humans already have eyes to begin with. So, what is it they see when they look at the world not with their eyes, but their vision? You're very smart. Can you figure out what the answer is? ｜ 天空长出眼睛是为了见证大地的美好，而本来就拥有双眼的人类，是在什么样的情况下，才需要靠「神之眼」观察这个世界呢？这个问题的答案，聪明的你能够明白吗？
- Fountain of Lucine: Western Shoal ｜ 露景泉·西侧浅滩

- A solid fortification built by Spikey Fish using stones. It looks like nothing special, but its lower part seems to be rooted deep underground, thus making the Stronghold strong enough to <color=#f39000>block</color> the impact of a Jumpy Dumpty's explosion...\nTo defeat the Spikey Fish hiding behind, you'll need to find particular angles to bypass the obstruction of such fortifications. ｜ 角角鱼们用石头搭建起来的坚固工事，看起来没什么特别的地方，但下半部分似乎深深埋入了水底，能够<color=#f39000>一直抵挡</color>特别蹦蹦的爆炸冲击…\n要想击败躲在后边的角角鱼，就需要寻找一个特别的角度，绕开这些工事的阻拦了。

- A round stone table of old, elegant make that can be found in Qiaoying Village. Its simple appearance is combined with simple yet finely carved patterns.\nThey say that green stone is seen in Liyue's courtyard design philosophy as a sign of harmony with nature, while the round table symbolizes composure. That is why many in Chenyu Vale enjoy placing such round tables in their yards to not only facilitate chats around pots of tea but also for the cultivation of one's mind. ｜ 外形古雅的石制圆桌，表面雕有朴素但精美的花纹，能在翘英庄内见到。\n据说，在璃月的庭院设计中，青石被视为与自然和谐相融的象征，而圆桌则象征着抒怀娴静。故此在沉玉谷，人们喜欢用圆形石桌装点庭院，不仅是为了方便品茗畅谈，更寄寓了修身养性和磨砺心志之意。
- A banner that flies in front of the "Cabinet D'avocats." It features their sigil, fashioned from expensive aqua-blue fabric and woven with gold thread. Legend has it that the Champion Duelists who have rallied to this flag have spent countless hours of hard work to do so, but in truth, hard work alone is far from enough... ｜ 可见于「专业决斗法办公室」前方的旗帜，以昂贵的水蓝色织物编成，其上以金线绘出了「专业决斗法办公室」的徽记。传说中，加入这面旗帜之下的「决斗代理人」们，都付出了不可计量的辛劳。但实际上，只有努力或许还远远不够…

- A predator that lies in wait within the pitch-dark watery depths. It appears to have adapted to some unknown power out in the deep seas, such that it can use elements other than Hydro... When it faces strong foes, it will use its powerful Cleansing Shower. Characters hit by this attack will <color=#FFE14BFF>lose a certain amount of Elemental Energy</color>. If they do not have sufficient Elemental Energy, they will <color=#FFE14BFF>lose HP</color>. ｜ 蛰伏于漆黑深水中的掠食者。应对着深海中的未知力量，或许也演化出了水元素以外的变体…面对强敌时，会使出威力强大的「涤魔喷吐」。命中角色后，角色将<color=#FFE14BFF>流失一定元素能量</color>。若角色的元素能量不足，将<color=#FFE14BFF>损失生命值</color>。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nWondrous creatures that should have only existed in the laboratory have suddenly appeared all over Fontaine's waters.\nAt the same time, you encounter a very anxious merchant near Romaritime Harbor...\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20, unlock any Statue of The Seven in the Fontaine region, and complete the Archon Quest "Song of the Dragon and Freedom."\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nHelp the merchant eliminate the danger to the ecosystem and collect all the Violetglow Jellyfish, and earn rewards. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n本应只存在于实验室内的奇妙生物，突然出现在枫丹的各个水域中。\n而在海露港附近，你遇到了一位神色焦急的商人…\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20，并解锁了任意枫丹区域的七天神像，且完成魔神任务「巨龙与自由之歌」。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n帮助商人消除生态隐患，回收「荧光紫水母」并获取奖励。

- Happy birthday! Honestly, I don't know what to get you. There are no inauspicious stars in your path. Whether in regard to love, battle, or your future endeavors, your prospects seem great. A Mictlan-style blessing won't do much for you. I thought about getting you a copy of "Flowers for Princess Fischl" to get you hooked on light novels, but it seems like someone owns more books from Yae Publishing House than me... Ahh, what to do... what to do? ｜ 生日快乐！我也不知道有什么可以送你的，你的前途上灾星恶曜不显，爱情、功业、武勋的运势也很通畅。米克特兰式的祝福对你效果甚微。之前本想送你我传教用的《菲谢尔皇女夜谭》，但是看到你好像有很多八重堂藏书，我都羡慕…这可为难了，送你什么好呢？

After that happens, Crystals will begin to stack again, and opponents of various kinds will spawn once more. ｜ 「灵感结晶」迸发后，「迷思源结」如果已被打倒，「灵感结晶」会开始重新蓄积。如果「迷思源结」未被打倒，那么「灵感结晶」则不会重新蓄积，但同时「迷思源结」则会被削弱，除它之外的敌人也不会再出现，直到此「迷思源结」被击败后，「灵感结晶」才会重新开始蓄积，各类敌人也同时会再次出现。

- Rattan weaving isn't hard, I swear! Even the most intricate figures are made one strand at a time. All you need is a little patience, and you'll get there in the end! Compared to the technique itself, precision is the hard part, and persistence can be even harder. If you ask me, though, the most important element is happiness. If you don't enjoy the process, you'll never do a good job — that's true for more than just weaving. Happiness is key! That goes for both of us! ｜ 藤编不难的，我真没骗你！再怎么复杂精妙的工艺，也离不开最简单的一行一竖，一经一纬，只要稍微有点耐心都能编出东西来！比起手艺，更难的是「细心」，再难一些，是要有「恒心」…但在我看来这些都不是最关键的，要我说，最最重要的，是「开心」。要是做起来不开心，什么事情都做不好的，我讲的不止是藤编…总之，要开心呀！我也是，你也是！

For the best experience, it is recommended that you experience the next part of the story when you have ample time to complete it.) ｜ 古名已经打造完毕，为了朋友，为了生活在此地的生灵，为了火焰与传承，你做好准备，即将踏入最后的战场…\n（此秘境耗时较长，为保证最好的体验，接下来的故事推荐在时间宽裕的情况下进行。）

- Arana made little Nara sleep and dream, then removed the bad stuff in their dreams. So when they grow, just like saplings growing into big trees, they won't become bad. ｜ 兰拉娜让小那菈进入梦，然后在梦里，把不好的东西去掉。这样，他们像小树苗长成大树那样，长大的时候，就不会变坏。
- Pursuing fun and finding happiness is how Miko lives her everyday life.\nFor someone who enjoys studying humanity like her, "perspectives" and "virtue" play distant second fiddles to "fun."\nEven a great shrine maiden of a different faith or an enemy general might pique her interest.\n...That said, this appreciation can sometimes lead to some innocuous trouble.\nAs opposed to those conscientious underlings or worshipful juniors, Miko's favorite person at the shrine is a shrine maiden named Kano Nana.\nYes, that Kano Nana, the novel enthusiast (just like Miko) who constantly frets over Sayu.\nWhile laying about indoors, Miko would often see Sayu flash past the window, followed not long after by a hurried and angry Kano Nana.\nLike lightning and thunder they were, which caught Miko's attention, to the point where she would even sometimes give wrong directions just to let the ruckus go on for a little longer.\nThere was another time when Sayu told Miko that the afternoon sun was the most pleasant after the latter had helped her steal some time for napping.\nPerhaps encouraged by these words, Miko would transform into an ordinary Inazuman lady on a wonderfully sunny afternoon, descend from the mountain and have a day out.\nThe Aisa Bathhouse in the city, Hanamizaka's Kiminami Restaurant, Ogura Textiles and Kimonos by the streetside... she did not miss a single store, and every one was an enjoyable experience.\nAnd in the evening, she was at Bantan Sango Detective Agency to tell them of a missing animals case that she had heard about on the way.\n"But you really must help, good detectives. I mean, one can barely stand to watch those owners cry their eyes out as it is..."\nHaving done all this, the lady could not help but let slip a pleased smile.\nTaking part in Inazuma's daily life in such an identity really was fun.\nWell, except that part where Kujou Sara shot her a suspicious glance as they passed each other by.\nRight, and also, she probably owed the boss of Aisa Bathhouse an apology — the outland-styled hot springs were indeed very good, but she might have accidentally shed some fox fur during the soak. ｜ 追求趣味，寻找快乐，是神子的日常原则。\n对爱研究人类的她而言，「立场」与「德行」之类的评判指标，都要远远排在「有趣」后面。\n无论是信仰有别的大巫女，还是阵营敌对的大将，都能成为神子青眼相加的对象。\n…虽然，这份欣赏有时也会化作一些无伤大雅的麻烦。\n比起兢兢业业的下属和葵藿倾阳的晚辈，神子在神社中最感兴趣的，是一位名叫鹿野奈奈的巫女。\n神子的小说同好——鹿野奈奈，每天都为照顾好早柚苦恼万分。\n神子躺在屋内，时而看见早柚从窗口一闪而过，不用多久，鹿野奈奈匆忙又愤怒的脚步声就会跟着到来。\n这种关系就像闪电和雷雨，令神子倍感趣味，偶尔还会特意指条错路，让热闹的场面多持续一会儿。\n更有一次，早柚特意为神子帮自己争取午睡时间向她致谢，并告诉神子，午后的阳光最为惬意。\n或许是受此鼓舞，不久后一个阳光大好的日子，神子摇身一变，化形为普通稻妻女子下山过了一整天。\n町街的「秋沙钱汤」、花见坂的「木南料亭」、街边的「小仓屋」…每一家都未错过，每一次体验都让她高兴。\n到了傍晚，更是去「万端珊瑚侦探社」委托了一起路上听说的小动物失踪案。\n「哎呀呀，您是没见过，那些失主呜呜哭得好可怜哪。两位侦探还请想想办法，帮帮他们吧！」\n做完这些，女子走在街上，忍不住愉快地微笑起来。\n以这种身份参与到稻妻的日常生活中，实在是一件乐事。\n如果擦肩而过的九条裟罗面上能不露出怀疑之色，就更好了。\n只是有些对不起「秋沙钱汤」的老板。异国风情的温泉虽好，泡完却不小心掉了些狐狸毛。

- While holding her Elemental Skill, Beidou will shield herself. Upon release, she will swing her great sword to deal DMG. Attacks absorbed by the shield increase the Counterattack DMG.\nBeidou's Elemental Burst summons her Thunderbeast's Targe. While the Targe is active, Normal and Charged Attacks will create a lightning discharge that can jump between opponents, dealing Electro DMG.\nAdditional Elemental Orbs will drop during the trial event challenge to facilitate the testing of the trial character's Elemental Burst. ｜ 使用元素战技的期间内，北斗会架起护盾。松开时她会挥舞大剑对敌人造成伤害。护盾期间受到的攻击，都会提升反击时造成的伤害。\n她的元素爆发可以召唤雷兽之盾，并在普通攻击或重击时释放一道跃动于敌人间的闪电，造成雷元素伤害。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。

- Allpa soars up into the sky with the "relic," while Chasca, riding on Coya's back, moves swiftly to close in on her. Suddenly, Coya grabs Allpa by the back of her neck, and the "relic" slips from her grasp. Chasca dives down and reaches out to catch it before forcefully tossing it high up into the air. Just as it is about to explode, Coya flies in front of Chasca to shield her from the impact. ｜ 阿尔帕带着「遗物」飞向高空，恰斯卡骑在柯娅背上疾速穿梭，转瞬之间逼近了阿尔帕。阿尔帕被柯娅猛然拎住后颈，怀中「遗物」失手掉落。恰斯卡向下俯冲，伸手抓住「遗物」，用力向高空抛远。「遗物」即将爆炸，柯娅飞到恰斯卡的面前，将她护在身下。

- A lively, energetic fish famous for its petal-shaped tail.\nMost such creatures lived out their lives peacefully as ornamental fish. But when it was discovered that their meat was flavorful, less bony, and very fatty, they would also come to find themselves carefully prepared and served up on meal tables. ｜ 活泼好动的小型鳉鱼，以优美的花瓣型鱼尾闻名。\n大多时候都以观赏鱼的身份幸福生活着。但在人们发现了它肉质醇香、少刺多脂的特点后，被精心料理、呈上餐盘的情况也便不罕见了。

- A plan is a reliable guide, but it's not an unchangeable or divine decree. Five hundred years ago, I could never have anticipated your arrival. But, after meeting you, I knew factoring you into my plan would be worth it. Judging from the outcome, choosing to fight by your side was unequivocally the right choice. ｜ 计划是最可靠的指引，但也绝非不可改动的神圣律令，我在五百年前无法预知你的到来，但当我见到并了解你之后，我就知道计划值得因你而变动。从结果上看，与你一同执剑，是无比正确的决断。

- Yes, but... that will make things difficult for you, Miss Kamisato. Unlike outfits tailored for martial arts, the outfits from the novels aren't designed for combat. ｜ 可是这…也太为难神里小姐了，毕竟小说人物的衣服，并不像演武华服那样是为了战斗而设计的。
- Talismans of this kind are often seen in the forests in Sumeru. They possess the ability to gather the power of grass and trees.\nTo prevent the erosion of the forest and, in darker times, to resist the invasion of vicious monsters, trees and vines would form impregnable shelters together.\nLord Rukkhadevata would grant these talismans to people, giving them unfettered access to walk amidst the forest under the guidance of streams and moonlight.\nOf course, when Lord Rukkhadevata and the Lord of the Forest died, the labyrinth disappeared, and the forest lost its intellect.\nEven so, the people of Sumeru take these talismans as symbols of the forest's protection — and the forest answers the request of such talismans and gives its power. ｜ 在须弥的林野中有时能够见到的神秘护符，具有召集草木力量的能力。\n为了防止沙漠入侵森林，以及在更黑暗的岁月中，为了抵御恶兽的入侵，树木藤蔓会结成严密的藩篱。\n树王会将这种护符交给人们，使他们能不受阻碍地穿行在树篱的迷宫中，得到溪流与月光的指引。\n在树王与森林之王死后，迷宫消失了，森林也失去了这样的智性。\n即使如此，须弥人仍然记得这种护符所象征的森林的护佑。而森林也会响应这种护符的请求，提供自己的力量。

It is said that in the beginning, this was just a cylindrical snack, but constant improvements wound up shaping it into the cutesy image of a fish. ｜ 鲷鱼形状的点心。脆脆的外皮包裹着甜滋滋的内馅，深受稻妻人民喜爱。据说一开始只是普通的圆柱形，后来经过不断改良，才逐渐变成了现在这般可爱的鱼形。

- Once upon a time, a noble crown was forged in Mondstadt from the blood and tears of the common folk.\nThe west wind blew, and those chains were shattered, and that crown fell into the flowing river of the years, raising naught but a few tiny spindrifts.\nTime may have gradually healed the wounds of that old era, but the scars can still be clearly seen.\nAnd where, oh where, shall those "spindrifts" go? ｜ 从前，蒙德有一顶以平民的血与泪锻造的贵族王冠。\n西风吹过，枷锁断裂，王冠坠入岁月的长河，只扬起几朵浪沫。\n时间逐渐治愈了旧时代的创伤，但一道道战痕，依然清晰可见。\n如今的「浪沫」，又该何去何从呢？

The kids at Hanamizaka love that game — and I've got a deck I put together as well!"\nHint: "Yoimiya" is the offensive core of Yoimiya's deck, which comes with a great number of cards that can be used to enhance Normal Attacks. ｜ 「七圣召唤？花见坂的孩子们都挺喜欢玩的，我也组了一套牌组呢！」\n【提示】宵宫的牌组以「宵宫」为进攻核心，包含大量能够强化「普通攻击」的卡牌。

- This building can be found within Aaru Village and has an exceedingly compact design, such that an entire troop of guards can store their equipment here without any issue.\nIt is said that one of the selection rituals for the Guardians of Aaru Village is that one must "exceed the very first Guardian's distance on a throw using the heaviest weapon in the warehouse." At this time, the guard with two differently-colored eyes was not even eight years old, and when the people crowded around her and the warehouse doors were opened, they discovered that a ridiculously long spear rested against the wall. The wooden floorboards were dented by its sheer weight, and the spear's point was almost poking through the ceiling.\nWhat? Was this some sort of strength-training tool? A performance prop intended to catch the eyes of onlookers? Or just some obstacle intentionally placed in the path of the test-taker?\nYet the little guard said she did not mind, and simply carried the long spear out as if it were just another day. Deftly she hurled the spear, and what did they know? It landed just half a pace further than the previous Guardian's record\nAfter this incident, some obstinate former Guardians never again said a word of doubt against that young girl. This may or may not have been because of the way she smiled at them when the test was over, not minding in the least where that spear might have come from... ｜ 可见于阿如村的建筑，格外紧凑，被守卫们用来存放武器，通常只需这样一间小屋，就能容纳一队守卫常用的武装。\n据说在阿如村「守护者」的选拔仪式中，有一个环节是「将库存中最大最重的一柄武器全力投出的距离，必须远于第一任守护者的记录」。彼时，异色眼瞳的守卫还不到八岁，人们簇拥着她，打开库房的门，却发现墙边斜倚着一柄尺寸夸张的长枪，木质地板都被它压出了凹陷，枪尖快要刺透库房的天顶。\n是练习力量的器械，博人眼球的表演道具，还是刻意为难受试者的障碍？当时所有人都来不及细想。\n异色眼瞳的守卫却说无妨，像往常一样，轻盈地拎着长枪出门，轻巧地向远处投掷，恰好只比上任守护者的记录远出半步。\n自此往后，某些顽固的前任「守护者」再也没有对异色眼瞳的守卫提出过半句质疑，或许是因为，异色眼瞳的守卫通过那环考验后，还能平静温和地向他们微笑，并且没有计较那柄长枪的来历吧…

- Ah, unfortunately, the correct answer is "high-efficiency blast furnaces." ｜ 很遗憾，正确答案是——高效率高炉。
- Only when Mr. Nagato witnessed his wife's distress and decided to sell his collectibles did you finally have an opportunity to reach out to Amenoma Yuuya and make your escape. ｜ 直到这次，因为妻子的悲愤而醒悟的他决定进行藏品的交易，你才有机会接触到天目优也，从而逃脱。
- Your foe has entered Variation Level 6 and has increased ATK! ｜ 敌人已进入六阶变奏状态，攻击力提升！
- What kind of problem? ｜ 到底是多大的难事…
- ...I think I have figured out what those stars are hiding. ｜ …我想，我知道那些星中藏着什么了。
- Uh oh... She's getting even angrier! ｜ 哇…它怎么更生气了！
- You should stay here, Little Layla. I understand that you want to help Haniyyah, but she's not the kind of person you're good at dealing with. Leave it to them this time. ｜ 小莱依拉，你就留下来吧？你想帮助海妮耶的心情我理解，不过她并不是你擅长应付的类型哦。这次就先交给小家伙们吧…
- "And a fitting place it is indeed! I'm sure I'll be able to draw a cover that will satisfy her!"\n"I didn't think that such a special place existed in Fontaine... I'll go have a look myself once the work's done!" ｜ 「非常到位！有了这份素材，应该就能绘制出让那位老师满意的封面了！」\n「没想到在枫丹还有这么特别的地方…完成工作后，我也想去游览一番！」
- Okay, this is the spot. ｜ 嗯，就是这里了。
- Other people would say that I look like someone whose soul's been torn out of their body when I think about colors and paints, and I didn't have many friends. ｜ 别人都说，我思考颜料和色彩时，就像丢了魂一样，动不动就没了反应，不怎么带我玩。
- Afterwards, Ororon will clear his black mist, and then we all go back to chillin' with each other. Any questions? ｜ 那之后，欧洛伦控制黑雾消散，大家也重归于好。没问题吗？
- I wonder what kind of Saurian Ifa is going to bring home next time? ｜ 不知道伊法哥哥下次回来，会带什么样的龙回家呢？
- It seems like the last Bloomflower Trials were also held to save the life of an ailing saurian. ｜ 最后一次举办荣花演武，似乎也是为了救一只生病的小龙。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Filter Songs ｜ 筛选歌曲
- Sorry for telling you all that. ｜ 难听的话都和你说过了，我很抱歉。
- Attitude and appetite... ｜ 态度和肚子…

- Paimon, ever-gluttonous, pulls you over to Wanmin Restaurant for a good meal. There, you happen to meet Xiangling, who is deep in thought. You accompany her to look for new inspiration in order to help her win the Masterful Chefs competition. ｜ 馋虫发作的派蒙拉着你去万民堂吃好吃的，刚巧遇到了正在动脑筋的香菱。为了能在厨王争霸赛中一举夺魁，香菱邀请你们陪她一起寻找烹饪新灵感。
- Hurdle ｜ 障壁
- Seems we're gonna have to wait until <color=#00E1FFFF>nightfall</color> to sneak in... ｜ 看来只能等到<color=#00E1FFFF>晚上</color>再悄悄溜进去了。
- Of course. As I said, I never intended to hide anything from you. ｜ 没什么，我说过的，我不准备回避你的问题。
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>When played:</color> Draw 1 random {SPRITE_PRESET#3006}Talent card from your deck.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>When you play a {SPRITE_PRESET#3006}Talent card, or when your character uses a Skill with an original cost of at least 4 Elemental Dice: </color>Spend 1 less Elemental Die. (Once per Round)\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]: 3</color> ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>入场时：</color>从牌组中随机抽取1张「{SPRITE_PRESET#3006}天赋」牌。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>我方打出「{SPRITE_PRESET#3006}天赋」牌，或我方角色使用原本元素骰消耗至少为4的技能时：</color>少花费1个元素骰。（每回合1次）\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]：3</color>

- Wish ｜ 祈愿
- So, this "imaginary friend" of yours... When does Paimon get to meet them? ｜ 你的「幻想朋友」长什么样子，给我看看！
- Time Elapsed ｜ 挑战用时
- Rescue someone!? Oh no, what happened? ｜ 救、救人？！谁出事了？
- Among the Fontemer Aberrants, there are certain strange "Xenochromatic" lifeforms. It is said that these are not actually living creatures, but rather spirits from the ocean that have neither taken physical form nor swallowed bait. They are said to bestow blessings upon those accepted by the Fontemer as well as those that are able to control it.\nThe Xenochromatic Hunter's Ray's Ability allows the wielder to release Fontemer Water Blades that are long and sharp. ｜ …在原海异种中，存在着诡谲的「异色」生物。据说这种异色体并不是生物，而是海洋中未曾经受肉身诞生，不曾吞下饵食的灵魂，会向原海所认同者或是驾驭原海者施以祝福…\n而异色猎刀鳐的能力，是释放锋利细长的原海水刃。
- Ajaw ｜ 阿乔
- Mystic's Gold Dial ｜ 秘术家的金盘
- (Many pages in the middle are tainted by some black substance. When you clean it off, the writing in ink is also rendered entirely illegible.) ｜ （中间许多页被黑色的物质浸染，清除掉黑色物质后，墨水写下的字迹也被完全毁掉了。）
- Now we can head straight to the next location. ｜ 这不是正好吗，我们可以直接去下一个地方了。
- Little Rose ｜ 小玫瑰
- But forget it. That would be unfriendly competition — if you take my meaning. So have my real name instead: Chikya. ｜ 但算了，果然把她的名字当作假名对我自己不太友好，我就告诉你们我的本名吧：奇科娅。

- What I mean is, I often used to find odds and ends while performing my cleaning duties. ｜ 就是，在清扫工作中遇到的。
- You thought looking into the Battle of Seven Colors could give you answers — that's understandable. But, based on our progress, I'd say this is a dead-end. ｜ 你们觉得调查「七彩之战」对此事有帮助，我可以理解。但从之前问话的结果来看，这条路可能走不通。
- Skill CD increased by 100%. ｜ 技能的冷却时间延长100%。
- That's a little overboard... ｜ 「冷鲜肉」有点过分了…
- My camp is somewhere that we can talk openly without reservation. But before that... ｜ 回到营地就可以放心地聊天了，不过在那之前…
- "It's just weird when I think about it: there isn't much business to be had during the Sakoku Decree, so why are they still coming here?" ｜ 「想想还是有点难以置信，『锁国令』期间也没什么生意，他们来这里干什么？」
- Heh, who knows? Perhaps all of us — you, me, and Cyrus — were all just pawns in my grandfather's plan to set things straight. He was awful like that. ｜ 哎，谁知道呢？说不定居勒什也好，你们也好，我也好，都只是爷爷用来摆正轨迹的把手。他可坏了。
- Fair enough... Wait, does that mean you're involved in tonight's ceremony thing? I heard the announcement from the Ministry of Civil Affairs. ｜ 那好吧…说起来，你不会今晚就要去做那个什么祭仪吧，我听总务司发公告了。
- Of course, I do have an interest in such creatures myself. ｜ …当然了，我个人也对这些凶猛动物有点兴趣。
- Okay, stay safe! ｜ 保重！再会！
- What's this? Looks like... a missing piece of something. ｜ 这是…什么东西的碎片吗？
- Hello there, adventurer. You must be here for the commission to help us get our Film Kamera back, right? ｜ 您好，您好，冒险家。您一定是接到了协会的委托，来帮助我们拿回映影机的吧？
- A fruit stand by the side of a commercial street. A very wide variety of fruits are sold here, all of them local products.\nMany years ago, some outlander merchants attempted to ship large quantities of cheap fruits to the Inazuman mainland. However, the Shogunate acted after careful consideration, restricting the sale of imported fruits to Ritou and thus successfully protecting the local agricultural industry. ｜ 商店街路边的果蔬摊，在售果蔬种类丰富，生意兴隆，且所有果蔬均为稻妻本地的品种。\n据说多年前，曾有某些外国商人试图向稻妻本地大量销售廉价水果，不过，幕府谨慎考虑各方面的因素后，将进口水果的销售范围限制在了离岛，有效保护了本地果农。
- An artificed object that can be used to build landforms. Climbable. "Sticks to Ground" objects can be mounted here. ｜ 被拟想而出的物件，用于搭建地形结构，可以攀爬和布设贴地物件。
- Light Hit Taken: II ｜ 普通受击·其二
- You gain a maximum of 1 Resurgent Receiver effect\nWhen you gain <c1>1</c1>/<c2>2</c2>/<c3>3</c3> stacks of this effect, your characters' Max HP is increased by <c1>{1}</c1>/<c2>{2}</c2>/<c3>{3}</c3>% respectively ｜ 至多获得1项【愈生应振晶】映射效果\n该效果叠加至<c1>1</c1>/<c2>2</c2>/<c3>3</c3>层时，角色的生命值上限分别提升<c1>{1}</c1>/<c2>{2}</c2>/<c3>{3}%</c3>
- Hive Voice 1 ｜ 蜂巢心声1
- An unusual pattern that can be used to decorate a gift envelope. ｜ 奇异的花纹，可用于装饰祝柬。
- You mean you want to meet the Dendro Archon herself? Uh, this isn't exactly my area of expertise, but let me see what I can find in the Akasha... ｜ 你们要见草神大人？唔，这不是我擅长的领域啊。好吧，我帮你们在虚空里试试…
- We could follow her from the shrine. ｜ 可以从神社开始跟踪她。
- Windtrace Coin bonus for attaining "Tacit Understanding" ｜ 达成「默契之力」的「迷踪币」加成
- Walk around in Port Ormos ｜ 在奥摩斯港逛逛
- I'm going to become a renowned beast tamer! It doesn't serve me any purpose to settle disputes through violence outside of the arena. ｜ 我可是要成为知名驯兽师的人！使用个人武力进行赛场外的斗争，对我而言完全没有意义。
- Zhang Shun ｜ 张顺
- There were red crystals in the first tunnel, and this one has all these large purple flowers... ｜ 在第一个隧道里是赤红色的晶体，这个隧道里是紫色的大花…
- #Could they be hiding? {NICKNAME}, let's see what we can find. ｜ #难道说是躲起来了吗？{NICKNAME}，我们在附近搜寻一下吧。
- We've been here before... The Mary-Ann you're looking for probably isn't here... ｜ 嗯。之前我们就来过这里，西摩尔要找的「玛丽安」应该不在这里…
- Alert Mercenary ｜ 警觉的佣兵
- Do they have a chance? ｜ 有机会实现么？
- Dear Albedo, ｜ 阿贝多亲启：
- Good luck. You will never find him! Five rounds, you hear!? ｜ 找吧！你们就算绕五圈也找不到的！五圈！
- Only listening to my stories can't be that much fun. ｜ 光是听我讲故事，也很没趣吧。
- Based on what I have seen today, I am forced to accept that Inazuma is a completely different place from the one I remember. ｜ 如果用这些东西来定义，那如今的稻妻已经与我的印象大相径庭了。
- When used, a Scatter Bomb will be placed at the current character's location.\n2s after being deployed, the Scatter Bomb will trigger a cross-shaped explosion, <color=#F39000>launching</color> all characters in its AoE into the air (including those who are mid-air or in the water), and the user will <color=#F39000>obtain a large number of Adventure Coins</color>. In addition, all characters who are <color=#F39000>knocked airborne in this way</color> will lose a certain amount of Adventure Coins. ｜ 使用此道具后，将在当前角色的位置布置一颗扩散炸弹。\n扩散炸弹：在被设置的2秒后，扩散炸弹将产生十字型的爆炸，<color=#F39000>击飞</color>爆炸范围内的所有角色（包括空中和水中）并<color=#F39000>获得大量冒险币</color>。另外，所有<color=#F39000>被击飞</color>的角色将损失一定数量的冒险币。
- Qiqi ｜ 七七
- Me? I'm... a researcher. I'm looking into the historical architecture and relics of the Guili Plains. Y—You can call me Bao'er. ｜ 我？我…是一个学者，正在研究归离原的古代建筑和遗物。你…就叫我宝儿吧。
- Wow, he seems like such a nice and gentle person! No wonder his disappearance affected you all so much. ｜ 难怪他失踪了以后，你们那么着急，原来是这样一个温柔的好人呀。

- Servant C ｜ 侍从丙
- My dear Lutong, we have spoken of this matter before. You know my answer... but I will always respect your choices. ｜ 亲爱的路通，我们之前就讨论过这个问题了，你知道我的回答…而我也会始终尊重你的选择
- (Weirdest photo experience of my life...) ｜ （真是一张奇怪的照片啊…）

- Relax, Auntie. I can handle the work. But once Nechca is back on her feet, you should get back to work and let me have a vacation. ｜ 放心吧婶婶，我能忙得过来。但是，等妮赫佳康复后，你可要快点回归岗位，让我好好休一个长假。
- Are you feeling unwell? ｜ 你身体不舒服么？
- Ah, young Penny! She must trust you quite a bit, if she's willing to introduce you to her animal friends. ｜ 哦，小佩妮！既然她愿意把那些动物朋友们介绍给你，她应该相当相信你。
- When Thunder Strikes ｜ 打雷的时候…
- "A shooting star of vines carries me, traversing a forest so quiet and peaceful, to finally arrive in secluded dreamland so pure." ｜ 「藤蔓的飞星承载着我，在安静的林间穿行，终于进入了无人打扰的清净梦乡…」
- Musou Isshin Energy Restoration|{param17:F1} ｜ 梦想一心能量恢复|{param17:F1}
- The Children of Echoes' forward defensive works have come under brutal assault by monsters. The gathered warriors fight fiercely, but their foes show no sign of diminishing in number... ｜ 回声之子的前方防御阵地遭到了魔物的猛烈袭击，集结在此处的战士正浴血奋战，但魔物的数量似乎并没有减少的趋势…
- Let's play Genius Invokation TCG. ｜ 进行「七圣召唤」的对局吧。
- I've got other things to do right now... ｜ 暂时有别的事…
- Opening Treasure Chest: III ｜ 打开宝箱·其三
- Many Treasure Hoarders have been spotted recently near Stone Gate and Dihua Marsh. Passersby should take caution. ｜ 石门至荻花洲一带近来多有盗掘犯罪团伙活动，过路行人须多加小心。
- Honestly, even Paimon doesn't understand how it all works. ｜ 老实说，我也完全不知道其中的原理。
- Trial Grounds of Restive Nightsouls ｜ 夜魂游荡的试炼场
- Continuous Healing|{param2:F1P} DEF+{param3:I} ｜ 持续治疗量|{param2:F1P}防御力+{param3:I}
- Hotel Debord ｜ 德波大饭店
- There is absolutely no chance of it exploding, catching fire, leaking energy, the casing melting, or anything else of the sort... so please don't worry. ｜ 绝对不可能出现诸如爆炸、燃烧、能量外溢、外结构融化之类的事故…请您放心。
- Charge Level 2 Frostflake Arrows or Frostflake Arrow Blooms decrease opponents' <color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo RES</color> by 15% for 6s upon hit.\nA hit also regenerates 2 Energy for Ganyu. This effect can only occur once per Charge Level 2 Frostflake Arrow, regardless if Frostflake Arrow itself or its Bloom hits the target. ｜ 二段蓄力重击的霜华矢或霜华绽发命中敌人时，会使敌人的<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素抗性</color>降低15%，持续6秒；\n此外，命中时会为甘雨恢复2点元素能量。每次二段蓄力重击只能触发一次元素能量恢复效果，无论霜华矢或霜华绽发是否都命中目标。
- Content does not exist ｜ 此内容不存在
- An intricate mechanism that has been redesigned by Tubby. It has similar functionality to "Allegro Bloom: Special Tuning" and its color scheme has been changed to a bright blue and white palette. According to Tubby, though it might not be able to conserve adeptal energy, it is still slightly easier for her to create as porcelain is more familiar to her.\nAfter hearing rumors about the Golden Apple Archipelago and obtaining the experimental samples of the Melodic Bloom, Tubby wondered how to set up more of these fantastical furnishings into the teapot. However, as she is also making a great many other fascinating mechanisms, combined with the complexity of the Puffy Tubby, the redesign could only be completed recently. It appears that even a teapot spirit has moments when they are overwhelmed...\nWhen this furnishing is placed, it creates a continuous wind current. ｜ 经由阿圆重新设计的精巧机关，与「疾奏音律花·特殊调弦」有着相仿的功能，主要的色彩则换成了明亮的蓝与白。虽说不一定能节省耗费的仙力，但据阿圆所说，制作起来要略为顺手那么一点，毕竟她对瓷器更为熟悉。\n从旅行者和派蒙口中听说了金苹果群岛的见闻，并获得「音律花」的研究样本后，阿圆就在琢磨，如何将这种奇妙的陈设多多摆放在洞天之中。不过，由于阿圆同时制作着多种有趣的机关，「圆圆呼呼」的制作难度又相对较大，因此等到最近才完成重新设计。看来，壶灵也有忙不开的时候呀…\n摆放该机关后，将持续生成风场。
- A magnificent, dramatic, and wondrous trial, a trial to end all things... Ah, how could you hope to understand... ｜ 盛大的，如同戏剧般的，可以终结一切的美妙审判…唉，说了你应该也不明白吧。
- *sigh* It's not like I had any other choice! The more unusual a subject is, the easier it is to write a paper on it. ｜ 唉，这还不是没办法吗？越偏门的课题就越好发论文。
- Transfer Replica ｜ 转存摹本
- Folklore spoke of a vast shadow entrenched in the depths of the ocean capable of swallowing passing warships...\nAt tale's end, they believe that Rex Lapis once wielded a spear that pierced the rainbow, pinning the churning vortex that had once terrorized the oceans in the center of the deep sea. ｜ 在坊间的传说故事之中，深海里盘踞着巨大的阴影，吞没来往的舰船…\n在故事的结尾，岩王帝君曾以长枪贯穿长虹，将肆虐大海的漩涡钉死在深海的中央。
- Poca ｜ 波卡
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Opponents defeated by throwing them off the platform ｜ 以击落至平台下的方式击败
- *cough* ｜ 咳咳…
- Pyro ｜ 火
- It's just burnout from work stress. She'll be fine after a good old rest. ｜ 呼…只是工作辛苦造成的身体虚弱，多休息下应该就没事了。
- Every time I think about that terrifying woman, I feel like I want nothing to do with Yae Publishing House. But then, whenever I think about how my replies can help so many people, I feel a sense of responsibility. ｜ 一想到那个可怕的女人，我就不想跟八重堂打交道。但一想到我的回信可以帮助到很多人，我又会有一种责任感。
- You see, there's an art to even setting up a tour itinerary. It must be fresh and innovative, but it also needs to be rigorously managed, and you need to adapt to the situation on the ground. ｜ 你看，制定游玩行程也挺像搞研究的呢，既要有突破和创新，又要严谨规划，同时也要根据实际情况灵活调整。
- The place is filled with spores and seems to have become the Fungi's lair. Clear the spores that are covering the Varuna Contraption. ｜ 地下四处都是孢子，看来有蕈兽将这里当作了巢穴。清理掉孢子，也许能让法留纳神机重现。
- Who are these formidable opponents? ｜ 哪两个强敌？
- My, my, I never thought I'd see the day when Noelle would finally come around to the idea of joining the Adventurers' Guild... ｜ 哎呀，不过真是没想到，诺艾尔你终于想明白，要加入冒险家协会了…
- A hideous iron mask that has been left half-shattered from vicious battles. ｜ 在不顾生死的厮杀中一半破碎的骇人铁面具。
- Her work is incredible! Especially this Guoba hat. It's just as cute as the real Guoba! ｜ 那位设计师真厉害，特别是这顶锅巴帽子，跟真的锅巴一样可爱！
- Energy Cost|{param5:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param5:I}

- I did order the flowers, but they will only arrive after the opera ends. ｜ 我倒是订了花，但要等到歌剧结束之后才送过来啊。
- Hi there. We wanted to ask you what you know about the masked shrine maiden, Tsumi. ｜ 你好啊。我们想打听一下那个面具巫女阿祇的事情。

- Hmm? It seems like it came from that direction. Come on! ｜ 声音好像是从那边传来的，我们快去看看！

- As the leader of Watatsumi Island, Her Excellency is responsible for assessing the scenario and formulating a plan. It is then my duty to put every detail of the plan into action and to keep the situation under control on the front line. We are united with the whole resistance in achieving a single purpose: victory. ｜ 珊瑚宫大人作为海祇岛最高领袖，负责掌控大局，制定计划。我负责将细节落实，把控前线的形势。反抗军上下一心，只求胜利。
- Are you ready now? ｜ 准备好了吗？

- ...Interesting... such an exquisite gift box. What's it doing out here in the wilderness? ｜ 这么精致的礼盒，却出现在这种荒郊野岭，好有意思。
- I'm sure it could be used to produce a drink with an entirely new sort of mouthfeel! ｜ 如果放进酒里，肯定是前所未有的口感！
- There's only one thing I fear now... and that's that I'll forget her again before we manage to find her... ｜ 我只怕…在找到她之前，再一次，忘掉她的事…
- Okay! Without further ado, let the cooking commence! Begin! ｜ 我宣布，本届璃月厨王争霸赛决赛——开始！
- Hmm... We already finished it! ｜ 嗯——我们已经吃完了耶！
- Hahaha, he spoke the truth. My name is indeed Cacucu, and I did pick those words up from hearing Ifa repeat them. ｜ 哈哈哈，他说的都是真的。我是叫咔库库，我说的话也确实是伊法经常说的。
- Season Fortune Slip ｜ 本期签文
- Isn't that all the more reason for us to go? There could still be guards trapped there, waiting for someone to rescue them! ｜ 那不是更得去了？说不定还有士兵被困在那边，等人带他们回家呢！
- You cannot get closer due to Saurian obstruction... ｜ 因为龙的妨碍，完全无法靠近…
- Why don't you speak? ｜ 你为什么没有说话…
- Haha, do you want to ship me off to the Fortress of Meropide? ｜ 哈，这次要把我送去梅洛彼得堡吗？
- Whoa, you really entered the wall. ｜ #呜哇，{NICKNAME}真的进入到那些纹路里了。

- We'll play until sundown! ｜ 玩到天黑！
- Do you know how to get on top of the buildings here? If not, you can just wait down here and I'll take care of it. ｜ 喂，你知道怎么爬上屋顶吗？如果实在不会的话，你在下面看着也行，我自己就能搞定。

- Ugh, no choice but to keep kicking some Tenryou butt! ｜ 呃，那就…再打！

- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- New bombs... ｜ 新型炸弹…

- Losing his sister all those years ago... What has been going through his head? What has he been forced to endure? ｜ 失去姐姐之后的这么多年里，基里亚都经历过什么，都在想些什么？
- Successfully replenished Original Resin ｜ 原粹树脂补充成功
- *sigh* You two are surprisingly serious about this nonsensical discussion. Fine, I'll play along for a little longer. ｜ 唉…你们对这种莫名其妙的讨论还真是认真啊，好吧好吧，就让我再陪你们一会儿。
- They might have forgotten you. ｜ 他们可能不记得你了。
- Based on your analysis, you believe the murderer Cowell planned to use Water from the Primordial Sea to dissolve Halsey, and used the hooked rope to pop the balloon and drop the water, using this to control when Halsey would be dissolved, and these mechanisms were hidden by him within the magic box. ｜ 经过分析，你认为凶手考威尔是借助「原始胎海之水」使海尔希溶解的，他通过钩绳破坏气球使水落下，由此控制了海尔希的溶解时间，而这些机关被他藏在了魔术箱内层。

- I won't spoil the surprise for you. ｜ 为了新鲜感，我会对你保密的。

- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nSummons forth kitsune spirits, initiating a maximum of 3 attacks that deal <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color>.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to deal <color=#FFACFFFF>AoE Electro DMG</color> after a short casting time.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges towards the ground from mid-air, damaging all opponents in her path with thunderous might. Deals <color=#FFACFFFF>AoE Electro DMG</color> upon impact with the ground. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n驱役狐灵，进行至多三段的攻击，造成<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，短暂咏唱后，造成<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n凝聚雷霆的力量，从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素范围伤害</color>。

- The Little Witch and the Undying Fire (I) ｜ 小魔女与不熄灭的火·卷一

- Who knows, perhaps you will have a completely different impression of me after I change outfits. ｜ 说不定你看到了之后，也会对我有完全不同的印象呢。
- Thank you very much. I'll be waiting for you here. ｜ 那就拜托你了，我就在这等着你。
- A rather exquisite wine cup used in pre-combat rituals. ｜ 稍微有些精致的酒杯，是仅在武人上场前使用的仪式器具。
- I'm just browsing... ｜ 我随便看看…
- Namecard style.\nMay the moonlight wash over you, O pursuer! ｜ 名片纹饰。\n愿逐月华流照君。
- To spice things up, we've added special ritual items into the mix. Attackers can charge them up to destroy the defenders' special barriers. ｜ 为了让比赛更有趣味性，我们制作了特殊的仪式道具。进攻方需要为它积蓄能量，破坏掉对手的特殊结界。
- Unlock the "Court of Fontaine" Teleport Waypoint in Fontaine ｜ 解锁「枫丹 枫丹廷」传送锚点
- Nice! I'll take that as agreement — and if it does prove impossible, you'll just have to make me breakfast in the future, eh, Frejus? ｜ 好耶，那我就当你答应啦。做不到的话，以后我的早餐就由弗雷瑞斯前辈本人来做好了！
- (Hmm? Shinobu walked off to grab a few stones, then she took out some twigs and Lavender Melons from her pocket... What?) ｜ （嗯？阿忍走到一旁，似乎找了几块石头，又从口袋拿出树枝和堇瓜…嗯嗯？）
- *cough*... Phew... ｜ 咳咳…呼…
- Whew, finally! Otherwise, I was gonna have to blast some of my loudest rock 'n' roll in his ears. ｜ 说了！太好啦，不然我就要对着他的耳朵来一曲摇滚了。
- Well, defeating the dragon and the monsters should be straightforward enough... But how do we fix the magic? ｜ 后两个问题还好说，但困住人们的魔法…这该怎么解决呢…
- Flaming grass... Oh, you mean Flaming Flowers! ｜ 冒火草…啊！说的是烈焰花吧。
- Okay, let's go have a look. ｜ 嗯，过去看看。
- Talk to Sucrose ｜ 与砂糖对话

- Aww, it's okay then. Come play with me when you have time! ｜ 嗯嗯，我明白了。有时间的话要来陪我玩哦！

- Here. Your compensation, as agreed. ｜ 这是给您的报酬，收下吧。

- I'll leave you to it then. I need to get back to work. ｜ 那你们自己解决好了，我就先回去忙活了。
- After a character uses their <color=#FFCC33FF>Elemental Burst</color>, they gain a Geo Shield that absorbs DMG equal to 35% of their Max HP for 7s. ｜ 角色施放<color=#FFCC33FF>元素爆发</color>后，将获得一个伤害吸收量等同于生命值上限35%的岩元素护盾，持续7秒。
- Hmm, it's just empty boxes in here. ｜ 唔，怎么看都是些空箱子吧。
- Somehow, those two words seem to explain everything now... ｜ 这么说的话，好像就能解释得通了…
- Hey! Those flowers are for display only! If you want to buy flowers, come look over here. ｜ 哎！那些花是用来展示的，要买花的话请来我这边！
- Goodbye. I hope everything will get better. ｜ 再见，希望以后能好起来啊。
- Easy job... ｜ 也就这样…

- Disengage, that's an order! ｜ 听我指挥，拉开间距！
- ...I smell something burning on the wind. ｜ …风里似乎有灼烧的气味。
- Haha... During this time, we pray to bring peace and ward off bad luck. Liyue locals call it "bidding farewell to the old and welcoming the new." ｜ 在这段时间里，可以祈祷平安、祛除厄运。用璃月人的话说就是「辞旧迎新」。
- What the... What's this sword doing here? Is it supposed to keep out intruders? ｜ 这什么…一把剑？卡在帐篷里面干什么，防盗？

- My boss? Uh, well, it's a really rich merchant in Liyue. Really rich. ｜ 我老板？啊…那个，是璃月港里一个很有钱的商人，很有钱。
- When using an Elemental Skill, All Elemental DMG Bonus will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>10%</color> for 15s, and a Bond of Life worth 24% of Max HP will be granted. This effect can be triggered once every 10s. When the Bond of Life is cleared, every 1,000 HP cleared in the process will provide <color=#99FFFFFF>2.5%</color> All Elemental DMG Bonus, up to a maximum of <color=#99FFFFFF>15%</color>. This effect lasts 15s. ｜ 施放元素战技时，所有元素伤害加成提升<color=#99FFFFFF>10%</color>，持续15秒，并赋予生命值上限24%的生命之契，该效果每10秒至多触发一次。生命之契清除时，每清除1000点将会提供<color=#99FFFFFF>2.5%</color>所有元素伤害加成，至多通过这种方式获得<color=#99FFFFFF>15%</color>所有元素伤害加成，持续15秒。
- Is that true? Can Aranara lose their memory? ｜ 真的是这样吗？兰那罗会失去记忆吗？
- There's no time to lose. Let's go to Gandharva Ville! ｜ 那事不宜迟，我们出发去化城郭吧。
- I know! He must have recognized a scent. The bottle must have Rocher's scent on it. ｜ 我知道了，小狗认出了熟悉的气味！报社门口的酒瓶上有罗谢大叔的气味！

- It's so lonely here... Let's offer some flowers, shall we? ｜ 孤零零地太可怜了…我们在墓前放些鲜花吧？
- (If a "Misfortune" or "Great Misfortune" is drawn, tying it over here can help change the luck.) ｜ （如果抽到了「凶」和「大凶」，结在这里就可以逢凶化吉。）
- Don't say that. I just haven't seen my friend Xingyan for some time and miss her very much, that's all. ｜ 这怎么是串供呢，我只是好久没见「星燕」了，很想念她这个好朋友。
- Stare ｜ 盯
- Aradasha cultivated slowly, starting from destroying mushrooms, all the way to shattering Big Iron Chunks. He defeated eighteen bad guys in total. ｜ 不过兰帝裟慢慢修炼，从打碎蘑菇开始，一直修炼到可以打碎大铁块，一共打败了十八个坏家伙。
- <color=#00E1FFFF>The shattered stone, restore it completely... Quick, lift the seal...</color> ｜ <color=#00E1FFFF>破碎的石块，将之补全…快，揭开封印吧…</color>

- It is true that Her Highness resides in a tall tower, and that this kingdom does indeed have its own series of arduous trials... ｜ 虽然西梅公主殿下确实居住在高塔里，这片王国里也确实有一连串艰难的试炼…

- After him! ｜ 我们跟上去！

- Even though it relies on the relic for eighty percent of its power supply, I've at least taken the first step. ｜ 虽然百分之八十的功能都要依赖于烬城的古董，但好歹还是迈出了第一步。
- I'm sure you'll do just fine, Yun Jin. ｜ 云堇肯定能做到。
- You wouldn't be wrong for thinking that... I don't sleep much, so I get light-headed pretty often. ｜ 没事，会这么觉得也没关系。毕竟睡不好，很多时候都晕乎乎的。
- These have been our most popular products across the years, our star merchandise! Guaranteed to provide only the biggest and the most beautiful fireworks for your satisfaction. ｜ 这是我们历年最受欢迎的明星产品，客人绝对能放出最大最美的烟花。
- Can be obtained from a limited-time event ｜ 可在限时活动中获取
- This is a magical item known as a "Magic Pocket." Perhaps you can help me distribute them to the people here. ｜ 是这个东西，一种被称为「魔术口袋」的魔术道具，先帮我一起把它们发放给这里的民众吧。
- My ears... It burns! ｜ 耳朵，耳朵好痛。
- In whose memory is this place? ｜ 此处是在谁的记忆之中？
- Aybak ｜ 阿巴克
- Go to the Fontaine Fishing Association ｜ 前往枫丹钓鱼协会
- DMG Bonus|{param3:F1P} ｜ 伤害加成|{param3:F1P}
- There are several indications that you have been investigating the prophecy on the sly. ｜ 种种迹象表明，你一直偷偷地调查有关预言的事。
- Well, I've never actually used Pursina's Spikes before, but their basic principles have been rigorously proven. Things should not go wrong — in theory. ｜ 虽然我还没有实际使用过「普尔希娜光钉」，但驱动它运行的基本原理是经过学术界验证的，理论上不会出错。
- Present From the Past ｜ 远古的馈赠
- Word-for-word, huh. Your memory ain't so bad after all, Paimon! ｜ 只字不差，真亏你记得这么牢…

- More About Diona: V ｜ 想要了解迪奥娜·其五
- I will take it on walks during the daytime... and it can stretch with me before bedtime. ｜ 白天，我陪它散步。睡前，一起做柔软体操。
- Ganyu ｜ 甘雨
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:P}
- Heh, maybe a story for another time. More importantly — I'm sure Yanxiao would be comfortable leaving his kitchen in your hands, if anyone's. What do you think, Yanxiao? ｜ 哈，不用在意细节。总之，你要是愿意来的话，言笑应该也能放心把厨房交给你吧？你说是吧？
- The Ashvattha Tree has been corroded. But from its fruit, Arama seems to have gained new knowledge, memories, and... manners of speech. According to Arama, you should eliminate Marana's Avatar next so that the new Ashvattha Tree may be born. Only then can the Bija be formed. ｜ 「觉王树」已经被侵蚀了。但兰罗摩似乎通过结出的果实，获得了新的知识、记忆与…说话方式。接下来，依他的说法，应当要消灭「无留陀的化身」，让新的「觉王树」长出来。如此，才能结出惟耶之实。
- Voice from Upstairs ｜ 从楼上传来的声音
- But Sudabeh and Kavus did. Everyone was worried, but not me, because I know Arana would take them home. ｜ 不过，之前素达蓓和卡乌斯走失过。大家都好担心。不过，我不担心。因为我知道，兰拉娜会帮助他们，送他们回家的。
- The Ley Line Blossom did not respond... ｜ 地脉之花没有回应…
- ...Tch. Grab that <color=#00E1FFFF>dragon scale</color> over there before you leave. It'll come in handy later. ｜ …啧。走的时候去把那边的<color=#00E1FFFF>龙鳞</color>拿上，等下有用。
- Complete the Act 8 Performance Challenge in Imaginarium Theater and finalize ｜ 在「幻想真境剧诗」中，成功通过第8幕的演出挑战并完成结算
- We'll never forget how you saved us! We know you're busy, though, so no need to worry about us — we'll see you around! ｜ 我们会记住这次救命之恩的！各位请忙吧，不用在意我们，再会再会。
- A grilled fish dish with a faint floral scent. It is said that Lambad once adventured far and wide in his youth. Everywhere he went, he would taste the grilled fish at local taverns. This dish was not a signature food in Sumeru, and Lambad thought it was a pity, so he invented his own fish roll. According to the gourmets who often dine at his tavern, the tales of his adventures aren't necessarily true, but his fish roll is undoubtedly delicious. ｜ 略带花香的烤鱼。据说兰巴德大叔在年轻的时候，曾四处冒险，吃遍了各地的烤鱼。他遗憾于须弥没有代表性的烤鱼，亲自创作了这道菜肴。酒馆内的老饕们一致认为，冒险故事的真实性有待考证，但鱼卷的美味是毋庸置疑的。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Really? You're willing to be my partner? ｜ 真的吗？你愿意当我的搭档吗？
- Isn't this just an ordinary little hill with an ordinary little waterfall next to it? ｜ 这不就是一个普普通通的小山坡，旁边有个普普通通的小瀑布吗？
- Ergh, Paimon suddenly feels afraid of heights... ｜ 呜哇，突然觉得有点恐高…
- *ahem* You may want to hold your tongue, Paimon... ｜ 咳，派蒙，少说两句…
- Kid? What kid? Wait... You're not talking about Tribunus Mettius, are you? ｜ 孩子？哪有孩子？等等…你说的该不会是墨提乌斯长官吧？
- It is no difficult matter, saving Mihir. Perhaps I might even call it trivial. But we Pari each have our mission, and we also have different... ideals. ｜ 解救米希尔对我来说可不是什么难事，应该说，不费吹灰之力。只是吾辈花灵各自使命不同，理念…理念也不同。
- Good, very good! Hahaha, my little girl's a real good tinkerer, she is, eh? ｜ 很好，很好！哈哈哈，都是我那丫头把烟花鼓捣得好啊！
- Sort of... We believe the Wayob dwell beneath the earth, while the Pyro Archon hails from above. ｜ 差不多吧，我们都认为，火神来自地上，而「大灵」位于地下。
- About improving efficiency... ｜ 关于提升经营效率。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- *cough* *cough* I'm sorry... ｜ 咳咳…！咳咳…抱歉…
- All demons who wander in the wilderness or live amongst mortals will be attracted by the sight of the Almighty Narukami Ogosho, represented by the Electro Mitsudomoe. Though their lives may be longer than any creature, they will at last come to their end. If those with limited lifespans hanker after eternity, then they can only pray that "Eternity" remembers them. And she did indeed answer their prayers, remembering them all, friend and foe alike, in her heart. No matter whether it was the demon owls who resided amidst the fog and ripped through the skies, the bake-danuki who dared to trespass her imperial gardens, or that female oni, lovely as the moon and mighty in battle, yet who would eventually come to blows with her... Whether it was the tengu who soared on dark wings or the Kitsune Saiguu who once walked by her side, but who eventually disappeared forever...\nThese countless tales have come to rest within her heart, and someday, they will surely shine again in the eternal paradise of her dreams. ｜ 漫游在荒野中，或是与人一同生活的妖物都会被「雷之三重巴」所代表的御建鸣神主尊所吸引。纵使他们的寿命远远久于万物灵长，也有终结的一日。要在有限的寿命中求得永恒与无限，就只能骥望于「永恒」能记住他们了。而她也回应了他们的愿望，将所有的敌手与友人铭记于心。据说，无论是栖息在迷雾当中、撕裂天空的魔性之枭，胆敢擅闯御苑的怪化狸，还是那位武艺高强容貌如月、最终却对自己露出尖牙的鬼族少女；无论是曾经展开黑翼自在空行的天狗，抑或是与她同行，最终又永远消失的「狐斋宫大人」…\n无数的故事静静地沉睡在她的心中，终有一日会在她所梦想的永恒净土中灼灼发光吧。
- Once this much fruit goes bad— You can't even imagine the smell. I'll never manage to wash it out. ｜ 你绝对不想知道，这么多水果在车里烂掉之后，车上那股子洗不掉的味道…
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- The color looks nothing like Mondstadt wolf fur, based on what the books say. Could it be that they're from somewhere else entirely? ｜ 毛色和书上说的蒙德狼毛色出入很大。说不定真的是外来的狼？
- And yet, one of those very beasts saved your life. ｜ 偏偏就是这样的野兽救了你。
- Return to the Hut of Blessings ｜ 返回「赐福小屋」
- Camera has been adjusted to the correct angle ｜ 已经将镜头转至正确角度
- She even factored my immaturity into her plan. ｜ 甚至，连我的这份不成熟，都被她计算在内。
- Other Rules ｜ 其他规则
- Do you remember the place Mountain mentioned, the spot where we met? That place is super foggy, and I know of a secret cavern that leads there. Even the other locals don't know about it. ｜ 还记得大山说的，我们认识的地方吗？有很多雾的地方！我知道有个隐秘山洞，可以通往那边。那条路，就连我们沉玉谷的本地人，都没有人知道呢。
- She probably thinks that all of this happened because she was staying here. ｜ 她会认为是因为她待在剧场，所以剧场才会被拆掉。
- So I thought of using Inazuman ingredients like the chefs from Liyue. That way, I might be able to make something new and exciting. ｜ 所以，我想要以璃月厨师的思维，来处理这些稻妻的食材。这样的话，说不定就能做出新奇的好菜。
- Alpha Pose ｜ 叉腰
- Heh, a child that made some poor choices... ｜ 犯了错的孩子…呵呵。
- Elemental Skill: IV ｜ 元素战技·其四
- Tell me about yourself... ｜ 关于你自己…

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making A Thousand Swings.\nThis is a place where true swordsmanship is forged. Many hereditary clan swords are arranged here, and a solemn, upright-seated armor sets the austere atmosphere. The Evil-Slaying Bows and Spiritchaser Screen that serve as ornaments have the ceremonial purpose of purging both the surroundings and the hearts of those training there of any wicked thought.\nMost Inazuman martial artists believe that aside from swinging your sword a thousand times, you only need to maintain the will to sharpen your skills and put your utmost effort into it, and you will surely push yourself to the pinnacle of your art.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Placement Screen.\nThis Furnishing Set is favored by the following companions: Raiden Shogun, Kamisato Ayaka ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「千振致业」的放置方法。\n锤炼正统刀术的道场。多具宗传刀架陈列四周，并以正襟危坐的盔甲肃正气氛。作为饰物的「破邪之弦镝」与「驱鬼之羽屏」，则有着驱除周遭邪祟与修行者心中邪念的功用。\n稻妻的武人们大多坚信，不谈每日挥刀素振千次，只要维持磨砺刀术的意志，并为之付诸全力，定能不断接近刀术的极致。\n使用后可进入放置界面查看。\n偏好这套摆设的同伴：雷电将军、神里绫华

- Shouki no Kami, as an artificial divinity created using all the might of Sumeru's Six Darshans, has power that rivals that of true gods.\nBut those of this world who call such a being a "false deity" misunderstand the true meaning of the word.\nShouki no Kami now understands countless things and shoulders unassailable might, and may be said to surpass mortals.\nIf gods must love mortals,\nthen Shouki no Kami, who grants failure in equal measure to humanity, loves them also.\nIf gods must watch over humanity,\n...\n...\nthen Shouki no Kami, who has borne witness to infinite love, hatred, partings, grudges, and maddening anger — thus does he watch over mortals.\n\n<i>"Too much happiness you have had!"</i>\n<i>"It has made you foolish. Arrogant. Horrifying in your greed."</i>\n<i>"Let this era end!"</i>\n<i>"Let the new god announce the defeat of the old."</i>\n<i>"Foolish mortal... There is yet time for you to kneel."</i> ｜ 汇聚须弥教令院六大学院力量制造出的人造正机神，拥有比肩真神的威能。\n世人若称之为伪神，则是不懂得「神」的真意。\n假如超人者为神，\n正机神已通晓万事背负无上力量，谓之超人。\n假如爱人者为神，\n正机神亦懂得赐予人平等的失败，谓之爱人。\n假如观人者为神，\n……\n…………\n正机神窥得无数爱憎别离怨嗔痴，谓之观人。\n\n<i>「汝等已拥有太多的幸福，</i>\n<i>「因此变得愚昧自大，贪婪可怖。</i>\n<i>「终结这个时代！</i>\n<i>「新的神明，宣告旧神将败北。</i>\n<i>「可悲的人类…现在还来得及跪下。」</i>

- An instrument of incredible workmanship, it will surely produce moving music when played by able hands.\nMondstadt has a long-standing tradition of poetry and song, and thus also boasts a long history of constructing instruments to that effect. Bards are most proud of their songs and poems, and perhaps the instruments, too, would be proud of their owners and their musical tradition. ｜ 做工极为精致的乐器，在善于演奏的人手中，能奏响清澈动人的乐曲。\n蒙德有着诗与歌的传统，所以在此类乐器的研究上也有着悠久的历史。吟游诗人以自己的音乐、诗为傲，而乐器也会以自己的主人及诗歌的传统为豪吧。

- Qilin are paragons of benevolence among the adepti, drinking only freshwater and eating only plants. Flies they will not hurt, and a bruised reed they will not break. They do not travel abroad, do not gather in herds, and no trap will hold them. They are leisurely yet composed, active but reserved — a gentle and elegant race. Yet when a wicked beast from the sea arose and threatened the land beneath their feet, that peaceful life ceased to be an option. Three thousand years ago, Ganyu answered the call of Morax the God of Geo, aiding him in the Archon Wars. And when the war was over, she chose to stay in Liyue and help the humans build a better polity there. The first Liyue Qixing would need support, and she took this task up as a matter of course, becoming their secretary. The moment she made that decision, a Vision appeared at her hip, granting her power to resonate with the world to a degree beyond her natural abilities. Whether she would grow strong enough to no longer need it, or whether she would use it as a last resort in Liyue's defense... Regardless, she chose to serve as the bridge between adepti and humans. Her Vision, then, was proof and witness of her new duty. ｜ 麒麟是仙兽中的仁兽，饮必甘露，食必嘉禾。\n不履生虫，不折生草，不群居，不旅行，不入阱陷，幽闲则循循如也，动则有容仪，是温柔而优雅的一族。\n而当海中巨兽为非作恶、足下的土地遭遇危机时，和平便不再成为生活的选项。\n三千年前，甘雨回应岩之神摩拉克斯的召唤，成为他在魔神战争中的助力。\n战争结束后，她选择留在璃月帮助人们建设更完美的城邦。\n初代璃月七星需要辅佐，甘雨毅然接过这一差事，出任他们的秘书。\n她作出这一决定的瞬间，「神之眼」在腰间显现，令她拥有了超越肉身、与世界共鸣的力量。\n这一刻，甘雨内心充满了平和的安定感。\n哪怕变得更为强大，也无需驱动「神之眼」之力，而是将「神之眼」作为保护璃月的终极手段。\n作为仙兽与人类的混血，她选择成为两个种族的桥梁。「神之眼」，便是她的新责任与新见证。
- So, you see? I'm not just another celebrity. I've got solid directing chops, too! ｜ 你看，不止是大明星，我连「导演」一职也能担任得足够完美！
- Huh? How come? Did they eat too many nightmares last night? ｜ 啊？难道白音和阿紫昨晚吃了很多噩梦？

- An elite agent among the Fatui.\n"Operatives" have no ordinary military rank among the Fatui. Based on their orders and the content of their missions, they can work in concert with other soldiers, work alone, or in tandem with the "tacks" hidden and scattered across the world. They spy, conduct counter-espionage, protect, assassinate, and conduct other tasks. In order to effectively carry out missions of a more special nature, "Operatives" also need to master all kinds of other skills and even various arts and talents. ｜ 愚人众当中精锐的特务。\n役人在愚人众中并没有常规的军种编制。依据命令与任务的内容，她们既可以与士兵同进退，也能独自或者与埋在各地的「钉子」一同，进行谍报、反侦察、护卫、抹杀等工作。为了那些更为特殊的任务，役人往往也需要掌握多种多样的技能乃至才艺。

- After triggering Burning, Quicken, Aggravate, Spread, Bloom, Hyperbloom, or Burgeon, a Leaf of Consciousness will be created around the character for a maximum of 10s. This effect can still be triggered if the character is not on the field. The Leaf of Consciousness' effect cannot stack. ｜ 触发燃烧、原激化、超激化、蔓激化、绽放、超绽放或烈绽放后，将在角色周围产生至多存在10秒的「种识之叶」。拾取种识之叶的角色元素精通提升<color=#99FFFFFF>60</color>点，持续12秒。每20秒至多通过这种方式产生一枚种识之叶。角色处于队伍后台时也能触发。种识之叶的效果无法叠加。

- A gamepiece based on Electro Slimes.\nA small monster created by the sedimentation of Electro dispersed throughout nature, it is one of the most common dangers faced by adventurers and the security services of various nations alike.\nFor a human warrior with a given amount of training, a single slime poses a very limited threat. But when moving in groups, they become far more dangerous. They can be considered a standard unit for executing Elemental warfare, and discovering effective tactics for dealing with other Elemental creatures. ｜ 以「雷史莱姆」为原型的兵棋。\n逸散在自然之中的雷元素沉积形成的小小魔物，也是各国将士与冒险家们最常应对的威胁之一。\n对于经受了一定训练的人类战士而言，单个史莱姆的战力相当有限，但集群行动时，它们的危险性则会大大上升，可被视为运用元素力作战的基准单位，进而探索高效应对其他元素生物的策略。

- "Tales of Humanity":\nTo the guy shooting accusations left, right, and center about the Gardes in the last issue:\nThe Gardes are extremely short on manpower. They're run off their feet as it is, let alone if they had to organize some plot.\nIf I were you, I'd worry about more pressing concerns — like the fact your shop's coffee is a bit weak. Did you switch to cheaper coffee beans?\nAnyway, is there anyone out there willing to give the Gardes a hand? Sort out the <color=#3399CC>clockwork meka</color> that have deviated from their assigned patrol routes in the countryside, you would sure save our resident coffee shop-owning conspiracy theorist a lot of worry. ｜ 「人间百态」：\n上一期六问枫丹警备队的家伙，警备队注册在籍的人员数量就那么些，连自己的工作都做不完，我觉得他们很难有空和别人勾结。\n换个问题想吧，最近你家店里的咖啡味道有点淡，是不是换了咖啡豆？\n对了，有人有空帮警备队一点小忙吗？去清理一下野外那些脱离设定巡逻路线的<color=#3399CC>发条机关</color>吧，省得咖啡店老板成天担心。
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Skill DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:F1P}
- We can go for dinner afterwards, my treat. You in? ｜ 通知完去吃饭，我请客，怎么样？
- Retrieve the Jade of Return ｜ 收取「回还之玉」
- Make no mistake, the purpose of our trip wasn't to find any solid evidence. We just need to figure out who's behind Zhiyi. ｜ 别搞错了，我们此行的目的，原本也不是找到什么切实的证据。只要推测出知易背后是谁就够了。
- Yeah, you're right. First anger, then tears... Wait! Who are you calling a crybaby? ｜ 你说得也有道理，可能是先气醒过来，再开始哭…不对，谁哭？
- Incinerating Transmitter ｜ 烧灼响振晶
- Gotta admit, I'm not feeling it right now... ｜ 有点提不起干劲…
- Heyo, looks like everyone's about done mingling and riddling! Gather round, and look this way! ｜ 哟，看来大家逛得差不多了。来来来，大伙看向这边喽。
- Sesshou Sakura DMG: Level 2|{param2:F1P} ｜ 杀生樱伤害·贰阶|{param2:F1P}
- Let me see if I can find some way to optimize this... ｜ 我得想想有什么改善的方法。
- Character Level-Up Material ｜ 角色培养素材
- Even though he only has a fraction of his full power left, that's still a fraction of a former Harbinger. If you could accompany him, it would put my mind at ease. ｜ 就算失去了绝大部分力量，散兵怎么说也是执行官。你能跟他一起行动的话，我也好放心些。
- Testimony From Jacques' Family ｜ 雅克家人的证言
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- "I see. This is something that causes people to lose their minds, talk nonsense, and even start dancing strange jigs. Its craftsmanship can be traced back to ancient times. Don't touch it... and don't drink it either." ｜ 「那我明白了。这是能让人失去理智、胡言乱语、甚至还会开始跳舞的奇物，其工艺可以追溯到远古。别乱碰为好。也别喝。」
- The minority must obey the majority, right? This is how the world works. ｜ 世界正是靠着「少数服从多数」才能运行下去的，这是原则。
- The characters were honestly a little bit ridiculous. Paimon didn't get what you were trying to do — the moment anyone started to show any kind of substance, suddenly the scene was over! ｜ 出场人物也有点莫名其妙，没看懂为什么要这样编排，才看出一点内涵，突然这段就切掉了！
- #As I'm sure you realized when I offered you this deal, my {M#handsome young specimen of a man}{F#charming young specimen of a woman}. That said, there are indeed a large number of these pitch-black monsters inside the volcano... ｜ #接下这活的时候就该发现啦，{M#英俊的小伙}{F#美人}。不过，其实是这样，火山内…有许多这样的漆黑魔物…
- Over time, the artistic content expanded from those patterns into all manner of different expressions, growing increasingly free-spirited, eventually evolving into its modern form. ｜ 久而久之，喷涂的内容就从「燃素刻录纹」扩展成了各种图形，主打一个随心所欲的表达，演变成了如今的涂鸦。
- A fragment of an ancient ruin device. It is believed that when completed, this device can be used to open the cabin door of a Ruin Golem. ｜ 古老遗迹机关的碎片，据说完成之后便能够用来打开「遗迹巨像」的舱门。
- Then on behalf of our special review board, I will be entrusting you with this task. I'm confident that we will make a wonderful team. ｜ 喔？那可太好了，那我就代表特别小组，把这事全权委托给您了。我相信我俩一定能合作愉快。
- "If the door is still open for me to return, please write me back! Even one sentence will do, just telling me how you're doing." ｜ 「若您还愿意为我开门，请给我回一封短信吧！一句话就好，让我知道您的消息。」
- (Yes, judging from Cloud Retainer's expression, it seems this gift was a success.) ｜ （嗯，看表情，留云真君很喜欢这份礼物呢。）
- What are you trying to say, Mr. Bai? Whose side are you on here? ｜ #白老先生，你是跟{M#他}{F#她}一边还是跟我一边的？
- (Liloupar... uh... I wonder if she feels lonely too...) ｜ （利露帕尔…唔，她也会感到孤独吗…）
- Let's see... ｜ 我看看。
- Person Idly Chatting by the Roadside ｜ 路边闲聊的人
- I have no business taking sides. As the Divine Priestess of Watatsumi Island, I abide by the principle of clear and consistent rewards and punishments. ｜ 当然不是。我是海祇岛的「现人神巫女」，遵循的是「赏罚分明」的原则。
- "Regarding the recent decline in the mine's output: I spoke with Mr. Dai. We both think the Mingyun Village mine is about to run dry." ｜ 「关于最近矿量减少一事：和老戴讨论了一下，我们推测明蕴镇的矿藏应该快掏空了。」
- Disabled ｜ 关闭
- Xinyan's Hobbies ｜ 辛焱的爱好…
- This sort of eel hides in the deep sea coral formations and is especially sensitive to musical melodies. When agitated by such, they will poke their heads out.\nWhen <color=#FFE14BFF>all their heads are sticking out</color>, <color=#FFE14BFF>Press to unleash a Pause Soundwave</color> and cause them to be unable to duck back into the coral, leaving them bopping to the melody constantly... ｜ 这种鳗鱼躲藏在深海的珊瑚礁里，其对音乐的律动十分敏感，受到刺激便会探出头来。\n趁它们<color=#FFE14BFF>一起探出头</color>时<color=#FFE14BFF>点按释放休止音波</color>，就可令其无法躲回珊瑚礁中，只能随着旋律不断摇曳…
- Dropped by Lv. 60+ Praetorian Golems ｜ 60级以上魔像禁卫掉落
- I once told him that I would pay any price to fulfill his wishes, such was the debt I owed to him for giving me the gift of consciousness. ｜ 我曾对他说，为了他的夙愿我可以放弃一切，以报答他赐予我的意识。
- When did I give you the right... to issue your own orders? ｜ 我什么时候给过你们，自作主张的权力了？
- Either way, it is good to be here together with everyone. It has lifted my spirits. ｜ 但是，能这样和大家在一起，不知不觉就打起了精神呢。
- #Oh, no... When did you become a heartless adventurer, too, {NICKNAME}...? ｜ #呜呜我们家的{NICKNAME}什么时候也变成这种冷酷无情缺乏人性的冒险家了…
- Heavy Hit Taken: I ｜ 重受击·其一
- "The Thundering Seamstress" Chiori ｜ 鸣雷的裁锦师·千织
- When active character's HP is lower than 50%, ATK is decreased by 25%. ｜ 当前场上角色的生命值低于50%时，攻击力降低25%。
- Audience ｜ 观众
- And that's why I named my store after them. ｜ 这就是为什么我会给自己店起名叫「伊杜坎的秘藏」。
- That's right, Arapacati. Don't get mad. Happy occasions should be celebrated with the "taste of happiness"! ｜ 对，兰帕卡提不要再生气了，快乐的日子，应该拿出「快乐的味道」来庆祝！
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- It really feels like we're about to embark on a great adventure! ｜ 真的有种要开启一场伟大的冒险的感觉呢！
- Smash our rival's sales numbers and win our readers back. That is how Yae Miko wages war! ｜ 堂堂正正地在销量上击败对方，把民众的注意力吸引过来，这才是我的战斗方式！
- Energy Cost|{param5:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param5:I}
- No, not at all. The purpose of the trip is to relax, after all. Simply do as you please. ｜ 不用，本来就是为了放松而规划的旅行，随性而为就好。
- So you've finally remembered. Just hurry up and take out the cat food already. ｜ 看来你还是有点记性的嘛，那就快点把猫饭拿出来吧。
- You ask me what my game is here? Well of course... it was to use this incantation as a means for all the souls of the departed youkai to make their glorious return to the world and plunge all of Inazuma into a brutal, bloody war! ｜ 你问老身这样做的企图？嗯…当然是要借助咒语，让妖怪的亡魂重新回到大地，在稻妻卷起一场血雨腥风！
