- Xuanlian Sacred Water ｜ 「悬练仙水」
- Vision helps Razor... fight with lightning tooth! Protect Lupical! ｜ 「神之眼」，师父帮忙。雷的牙打架，保护「卢皮卡」。
- Step aside, it's my turn! ｜ 闪开！这里让我来！
- When the Action Phase begins: Your opponent gains <color=#{0}>3 stacks of Multiplied Damage</color>. Multiplied Damage increases the DMG dealt by characters by 1; DMG further increases by 1 for each stack of Multiplied Damage. (Up to 3 stacks)\nAfter you play an Action Card: Generate 1 Omni Die, and remove 1 of your opponent's stacks of Multiplied Damage. (Can be triggered up to 3 times per Round) ｜ 行动阶段开始时：敌方获得<color=#{0}>3层「多重毁伤」</color>。「多重毁伤」会使角色造成的伤害+1，并且每有1层「多重毁伤」都会使角色造成的伤害额外+1。（最多3层）\n我方打出一张行动牌后：生成1个万能元素骰，并移除1层敌方的「多重毁伤」。（每回合最多触发3次）
- Join the three Aranara in using the Kusava's power of dreams to clean up the influence of The Withering from the surrounding areas. ｜ 随三位兰那罗一起运用「苦舍桓」中蕴含的梦之力量，清除各处盘踞的死域影响吧。
- Now for the final stop on our Cor Lapis crawl — to Chang the Ninth's place! ｜ 这样一来，就只剩下常九爷手上的石珀了。
- Get it together, Layla! Believe in yourself, and in the person who's helped you come this far. The two of you together can solve any problem that comes your way!\nWhew... Alright! Time to leave my worries behind. Let's go! ｜ 莱依拉啊莱依拉，要相信自己，也要相信帮了你那么多的那个人。你们一起，什么问题都能解决！\n呼…好了，所有担心我都抛到脑后了，咱们出发吧！
- Congratulations are in order! Here's what Great Fortune From Heaven means: "The blessings of the gods are upon you. Your voyage ahead shall be plain sailing, and all your endeavors shall prosper." In other words, your good luck isn't about to run out anytime soon! ｜ 客人恭喜啦，「大吉·天」，意为：云天有神威，风调雨顺，万事兴盛。您一定会继续交好运的哦！
- The sights here aren't as grand as you'll see in the city, but everyone here lives a leisurely life. ｜ 风景大概比不上城里那么华贵，但镇上的居民过得都很悠闲。
- Paimon thinks... probably yes? Anyway, no harm in giving it a try! Let's look for <color=#00E1FFFF>shards of meteorite</color> using Fischl's <color=#00E1FFFF>Vision</color> — clearing them away will help make the area less dangerous. ｜ 感觉…也许可以？要不我们就先试试，能不能利用<color=#00E1FFFF>神之眼</color>来搜索<color=#00E1FFFF>陨石碎片</color>、清理危害吧？
- At the Construction of the Endless Wall ｜ 万里城垣建造时
- Right, before talking to the Fatui inside, we should disguise ourselves... Put on a mask or something... ｜ 对了，跟里面的愚人众对暗号之前，我们先进行一些乔装吧…比如以前用过的面罩什么的…
- 200 Mora. ｜ 200摩拉。
- Watch out for <color=#FFCC33FF>Shattered Floating Tiles</color> and collect Adventure Coins ｜ 小心<color=#FFCC33FF>碎裂的空悬石板</color>，拾取冒险币
- What a strange pen name... Definitely your doing. Having been around you so much recently, Paimon's slowly starting to understand your unique tastes. ｜ 好怪的笔名，是神子起的吧。经过这段时间相处，我已经逐渐了解了你的品味。
- The dragon just dropped us off here...? ｜ 那头邪龙…把我们放到了这里…？
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>After this character uses Normal Attack:</color> Draw 1 card. (Once per Round)\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>After this character uses a Skill:</color> If you do not have more Elemental Dice than cards in your Hand, you will gain 1 Elemental Die of the attached character's Type. (Once per Round) ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>角色使用「普通攻击」后：</color>抓1张牌。（每回合1次）\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>角色使用技能后：</color>如果我方元素骰数量不多于手牌数量，则生成1个所附属角色类型的元素骰。（每回合1次）
- Complete the "Liyue: Theater Mechanicus" quest to unlock ｜ 完成「璃月·机关棋谭」任务后解锁
- Are they a sage? ｜ 是贤者吗？
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- H—How long will that take? ｜ 那、那要建多久啊。
- Dropped by Lv. 40+ Fatui Skirmishers ｜ 40级以上愚人众·先遣队掉落
- But Anemoculi never had a physical form from the start. ｜ 但其实「散失的风神瞳」本来就没有实体。
- Then, Sangonomiya's people destroyed the wards which suppressed the Serpent's remains. The Tatarigami arose and everyone on the island fled in a panic. ｜ 然后，珊瑚宫的家伙破坏了镇压大蛇遗骨的镇物，「祟神」暴起，岛上人人死走逃亡。
- That is not going to be an easy task... ｜ 看上去不太好劝…
- Aaaah! A—A Nara discovered Aranakula! Wh—What should Aranakula do... ｜ 呜哇！被、被那菈发现了！该、该怎么办…
- ...Huh? ｜ …欸？
- I... I think I got it... ｜ 记，记住了…
- Well, I never! A visitor turning up at our time of crisis, a Guardian emerging from the trials victorious... and the relic in our possession, intact and unharmed! ｜ 喔喔喔！危难之时来访的客人，突破试炼的守护者…完好无损的圣物！
- Heyu Tea House Ad ｜ 和裕茶馆广告
- It's so long, even my lowly servant couldn't manage to give a simple summary, heh! ｜ 就算是我这下仆都没法简单概括的那种，哼。
- Max Duration|{param9:F1}s ｜ 最大持续时间|{param9:F1}秒
- How about a change of scenery? ｜ 那我建议换个地方。
- We can't compete with Dawn Winery, but Sailing Breeze has made quite a name for itself in Inazuma. ｜ 凭我们的实力可没法和晨曦酒庄竞争，但「远航之风」的酒在稻妻也算闯出名气了。
- Voice From Downstairs ｜ 从楼下传来的声音
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- So glittery... Must... control... urge to pounce... ｜ 亮晶晶的…想要…扑过去！
- Still, thank you, friend. Please take this as thanks. ｜ 不过还是要谢谢你，朋友。这是我一点心意，请收下吧。
- Uh, not exactly! They have mystical powers... ｜ 不对不对！应该说，有神奇的力量…
- One of the fishing points registered with the Natlan Fishing Association. It is to the south of the Ancient Mountain Path and contains a wide variety of fish... ｜ 纳塔钓鱼协会注册钓点之一，位于「觐山古道」南侧，鱼类资源丰富…
- No? ...Careful Toba, you look dangerously close to cursing me out right now. Tut-tut, we can't have that. Cursing is for grown-ups only. ｜ 咦？多巴，你怎么露出了那种想要骂人的眼神？不可以哦，那是大人的特权。
- I guarantee you'll never meet anyone else who's as infuriating as him! And for the record, yes, I would say that to his face. Sure, he's smart, and sure, geniuses often come with a bad temper, but that's only half the story with him... He knows perfectly well how to appear friendly and likable to others, he just doesn't want to.\nIf he ever gives you the impression that he doesn't really have a temper, or that he's rigidly logical like a machine, then you just don't know him well enough yet. He definitely has a personality, it's just... too big a personality. Most people wouldn't get it. ｜ 谁都不可能从人群中找出第二个像他一样令人无语的家伙！这话就算他本人来了我也敢说。\n你也知道他很聪明，都说聪明人容易脾气差，这话算是对了一半吧，可他不一样…他完全清楚怎么表现得更符合大众定义的友好，只是不想。\n假如你觉得他脾气很好，或者觉得他死板教条像台机器，那说明你们还不够熟。他就是太有性格，普通人理解不了。
- Research Terminal ｜ 研察终端
- The loud sound was from <color=#60B4D2>Lyney and Halsey's fight</color>, but Lyney claimed that he heard nothing in order to cover the truth up. ｜ <color=#60B4D2>林尼和海尔希争斗</color>制造了那声巨大的闷响，但林尼为了隐瞒真相，故意说没有听到声音。
- Maybe there's something preventing them from lighting up at the same time. ｜ 或者存在什么谜团，不能同时把它们点亮！
- If you act quickly and <color=#FFCC33FF>dash forward</color> to pop the Stonehide Lawachurl's <color=#FFCC33FF>Slime</color>... ｜ 如果抢先用<color=#FFCC33FF>突进</color>击破岩盔王的<color=#FFCC33FF>史莱姆</color>的话......
- The Steambird Culture and Arts Section ｜ 蒸汽鸟报文化艺术版
- Initiate's Flower ｜ 初学者之花
- ...If there really are that many, shouldn't this place be called Whopperflower Mountain? ｜ …可如果真有那么多，这里不应该叫骗骗花山才对吗？
- Another occurrence of forbidden knowledge pollution... ｜ 禁忌知识的污染再次出现了么…
- Isn't it called a Fortune Slip Box? ｜ 记得是叫「御神签箱」…
- The Sumpter Beast went ahead. Let's keep up with it! ｜ 驮兽往前走了，我们快跟上去吧！
- The rocks this place is built from, believe you me... they ain't gonna budge come hell or high water. Safety guaranteed! You're a traveler, right? Must have seen the world? Tell me, have you been to Sumeru? ｜ 我们建造仓库的岩石，风吹不动，火烧不进，绝对安全！你是旅行者，你见的世面多，你到过须弥吗？
- #No way, she hit every cube in one shot and finished even faster than you, {NICKNAME}! ｜ #几乎每一下都打在关键地方，用时比{NICKNAME}还要少！
- Increases all party members' CRIT Rate by 9% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色暴击率提升9%，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Sweeping Fervor ｜ 热情拂扫
- (This is an unusual place, and Idyia would suddenly become very busy from time to time. Plus, she knows Alice...) ｜ （确实有些不寻常的地方，伊迪娅有时会变得很匆忙…何况还有艾莉丝这层关系在。）
- Well, I managed to scrounge some milk from Dongsheng next door... ｜ 嘶，新货的话，倒是从隔壁东升那儿讨了点牛奶…
- By the way, we were just getting ready to go to the opera house to meet the Hydro Archon. Would you be able to show us the way? ｜ 说起来，我们正准备去歌剧院见水神，如果方便的话，你们能帮我们带路吗？
- Return to the venue and keep playing "Marechaussee Hunter: Judgment Day" ｜ 返回游戏场地，继续游玩《逐影猎人：审判之时》

---
### Part 135

- #Good to see you again, {NICKNAME} and Paimon. ｜ #很高兴见到你们，{NICKNAME}，派蒙。
- Suspicious Radish and Fish Stew ｜ 奇怪的鲜鱼炖萝卜
- After the Rain ｜ 雨过天晴…
- Talk to Sangonomiya Kokomi ｜ 与珊瑚宫心海对话
- What I may lack in faith, I'll make up with my actions. ｜ 就算信心不足我也会用行动补上。
- Your attitude is so negative. Have you given up on yourself? ｜ 你这不就是自暴自弃，「随便别人怎么说」的消极态度吗？
- Hmm? Who might you be... ｜ 咦？请问您是…
- Father wouldn't do something like that! ｜ 老爹才不会做这种事！
- Besides, you're the ones people are scared of! Hiding behind bushes and scaring people off the road, what are you trying to do here? ｜ 你们才是！一路上装神弄鬼，到底想干什么？
- <color=#FFE14BFF>Mallow Tree</color>\nThis towering tree has a unique bark texture that protects it from pests in extremely wet environments. Despite its short lifespan, it's extremely easy to plant and cultivate in large numbers.\nCut down Mallow Trees to get <color=#FFE14BFF>Mallow Wood</color>. ｜ <color=#FFE14BFF>「悬铃树」</color>\n魁梧挺拔的乔木，有着质感特别的树皮，能在至为潮湿的环境下抵御虫害。虽说树龄并不长，但极易大量栽种与培养。\n砍伐「悬铃树」可以获得<color=#FFE14BFF>「悬铃木」</color>。
- Lady Ningguang said that the first three contestants to procure all three materials will be awarded the chance to ask a question. Well, there are three teams here. We can split the prize between us. ｜ 凝光小姐说过，前三位找齐材料的人均可获得奖励。三次提问的机会，我们三人正好平分。
- An entire set of all their light novels... That's worth a lot of money! ｜ 全部轻小说一套，这可是值好多钱哪！
- Do tell, do tell. I'm listening. ｜ 您请说，我好好记着。
- Your friends, Mr. Cyno and Mr. Tighnari, are really famous themselves. ｜ 还有你的好朋友，赛诺先生，提纳里先生，他们也都非常有名哦。
- Yeah, have you ever met Mr. Chatillon? How is he? ｜ 对啊，布蕾斯特小姐有见过沙蒂永先生吗？他还好吗？
- Remind me what my personal best is? ｜ 我的最佳成绩…
- I know you won't believe me without trying it. Here, take some and have a taste! It's on the house! ｜ 空口无凭，送你一些，权当试吃！
- Well, the components are treasure... Huh? There should be some here... ｜ 这些零件就是宝物…咦？这里应该有啊…
- The Hunter not only possesses faster Movement SPD and greatly decreased Stamina consumption, but can also use extremely powerful Windward Arts. Their Windward Arts have the ability to seek the opposition out, expose disguises and more.\nAs for the Rebels, they can use their Windward Arts to disguise themselves as specific objects on the map, place bait, or temporarily enter a hidden state. ｜ 「猎手」拥有更快的移动速度，体力消耗大幅降低，还可以使用强大的「风行秘技」。「风行秘技」具有探测对方位置和识破对方的伪装等效果。\n而「游侠」可以使用「风行秘技」伪装成当前地图内特定的物件，布置诱饵，或暂时进入隐形状态。\n
- According to the plan, we should first go to Pardis Dhyai, and ask for Forest Watcher Tighnari. ｜ 按照计划，我们要去禅那园找巡林官提纳里。
- Oh well, we don't always get what we want in life. So instead — pull up a chair, and let's get some rest. ｜ 哎呀呀，天不如人意，你也找个舒服的椅子躺下休息休息吧。

- There's a Ley Line Monolith just up ahead that will attract nearby monsters. ｜ 在前方有一块地脉镇石，会将魔物吸引过来。
- You've finished the outline of the light novel. While the authors are rushing the manuscript out, time to go to Yae Publishing House to ask for Ms. Hina's endorsement. ｜ 轻小说的大纲已经完成，在作者们赶稿期间，向八重堂申请希娜小姐的荐言吧。
- Sparks fly as hammers clash against anvils... ｜ 火花飞溅，铁锤和铁砧不停碰撞…
- So you are still here, brave warrior. ｜ 你还在这里啊，勇士。
- The gods gave humans barely enough knowledge for them to fill their stomachs. Yet, they used it to craft tools, write books, and build cities, and now they've set their sights on the stars and the abyss... With every moment that goes by, they're creating brand-new knowledge, so I never want to take my eyes off them. ｜ 神明只送给人类填饱肚子的知识，人类却借此制作了工具，书写了文字，壮大了城邦，现在又放眼星辰与深渊…他们每时每刻都在创造全新的「知识」，也令我再也无法移开双眼。
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- Well, I guess it's supposed to be a bit difficult — that's what makes it a challenge. But please come back and try again anytime you want! ｜ 不过，所谓的挑战总要有点难度才好，下次再来试试，请一定要再来哦。

- Don't mind me. Just do whatever you like. ｜ 别在意，你忙你的就好。

- This might look like a tiny pile of stones, but it may just be the protruding tip of one colossal rock, most of which is underground. Having lain in the grass for so long, Liyue locals have taken to calling it the "Hiding Grazestone."\nThis stone is difficult to dig out of the ground, and in attempting to do so, one is likely to happen across an ancient Boom Blossom in the process. For these reasons, workers would rather build their road around it to avoid having to deal with it. ｜ 这种石堆看似小巧，但可能只是地下埋藏巨石的一角，常年低伏草中，因此被璃月居民称为「伏青石」。\n伏青石难以铲除，还有可能挖掘到古董级别的爆爆瓜。因此工人们宁愿修路绕道，也要尽量避开它。
- Well, I'd call this less "not being gullible" and more "knowing what to look out for from experience" — weren't you the one who fell afoul of not one, or two, but several plainclothes police, to the point where you nearly got sent to court? ｜ 与其说是「没那么好骗」，倒不如说你之前也已经惹过好几次便衣警员了，差点把自己送进审判庭去，算是久病成良医吧…

- But you're the one who can fly. ｜ 会飞的明明是你。

- There's absolutely no need to worry about Sayu. If anything, she's extremely loyal and would never act presumptuously. ｜ 哎，这就更不用担心了，对忍者来说，很重要的一条原则就是忠诚，他们是不会擅自行动的。
- Ah. That. ｜ 啊。那个啊。
- Only a skilled sculptor can create eye-catching tabletop ornaments. It is said that this kind of ornament is carved from the coral that fishermen salvaged from the sea. The original is extremely gorgeous and has been purchased by wealthy outlander merchants in Ritou at high prices. ｜ 色泽明丽的桌面摆件，唯有手艺娴熟的雕刻家才能打造。据说这种摆件是以渔民从海中打捞上来的珊瑚为摹拓对象雕刻而成的，原品极为华丽，已被离岛的外国富商高价购得。
- A Prize Catch ｜ 极致一钓
- Activate Left Rune ｜ 激活左侧符文
- Cleanse the filth near the "root" ｜ 清除「根」附近的污秽
- *cough* ...I see. Then it's more or less as I anticipated. ｜ 咳咳…嗯，和我预想中的差不多。
- Spice Merchant ｜ 香料商人
- "It's like senpai said, Master Kamuna's shikigami grant us power beyond mortal scope!" ｜ 「前辈所言不假，「惟神大人」给我们的「式神」…能让我们拥有凡人无法比肩的力量！」
- Well, come on then, don't drag your feet. You dilly-dally some more, and you can forget having any meatballs to eat tomorrow! ｜ 快点！婆婆妈妈的，再磨蹭你明天甭想吃狮子头！
- #{NICKNAME} reached Natlan, and took a trip to the land of the dead while there. It must have been incredibly dangerous. ｜ #{NICKNAME}的旅途已经到了纳塔，我听说还涉足了那里的死者之国，一定凶险万分。
- Indeed! An excellent division of labor. Now, allow me to start it up. ｜ 很好！非常好，完美的分工，那我现在就启动它。
- It wouldn't be long until the Phantom would figure out exactly how she had been mistreated, and turn their eyes towards the one organization that has been sending boatloads of animals out of Fontaine. ｜ 推理出伪装的手法，接着怀疑到频繁出口宠物的「爱心社」，也就顺理成章了。
- Pay attention to the HP of Driftstone Raft and replenish Drift Energy in time ｜ 留意「飘曳石筏」的生命值，及时补充「飘曳能量」
- Food ｜ 食物
- I should've known, really. Men like him, they just enjoy being surrounded by fawning women... They're not interested in a serious relationship. ｜ 早该想到的，他这种男人就喜欢被女人簇拥的感觉，肯定没心思认真谈一场恋爱。
- I'll make Paimon a jetpack! ｜ 给派蒙做个喷气推进背包！
- Hmm. How odd. That, err, collar? Pendant? I could swear I've seen that accessory before... ｜ 奇怪，仔细一看，它的…呃，项圈？或者说挂饰？我好像见过类似的东西…
- You got it! ｜ 嗯，没错。
- She will definitely become a great archon. ｜ 一定会成为非常伟大的神明。
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param8:P}/{param9:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param8:P}/{param9:P}
- Yes, but the rule of the game is no Fishing Rods allowed. We're going fishing by hand. ｜ 按照游戏规则，就算你带了鱼竿也不可以用。我想说的，当然是抓鱼了。
- Treasure from the Land of Wisdom ｜ 「卓识之地的瑰宝」
- The King versus the Grandmaster! This will be legendary! ｜ 大激斗，鬼王对玉将！
- A certain researcher from Fontaine is currently performing some esoteric research in The Chasm. ｜ 某位枫丹的科研专家似乎正在层岩巨渊进行着深奥的研究…
- The current server is full. As such, you are currently unable to access the game.\nIf you remain at this screen, you will attempt to log in again automatically. You can also manually do so after 1 minute. ｜ 由于当前服务器爆满，旅行者暂时无法进入游戏。\n旅行者可以在本界面等待自动重试，或一分钟后重新登录。
- She should have followed in her father's footsteps and become a mercenary, adventuring in the vast desert... But she chose the path of a researcher. ｜ 她本来应该像她父亲一样，成为一个佣兵，在广袤的沙漠冒险的…但她选择了学者的道路。
- Oh, I see. Well, last night, this fellow touched the meteorite, and then he fainted just moments later. ｜ 噢，好的。昨天晚上，这个人摸了地上的陨石，很快便昏睡过去。
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:P}
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- #{PLATFORM#[Ps4]button: Hold to open the Shortcut Wheel and view your Adventurer Handbook#[Ps5]button: Hold to open the Shortcut Wheel and view your Adventurer Handbook#[Default]button: Open the Shortcut Wheel to view your Adventurer Handbook} ｜ #{PLATFORM#[Ps4]键（长按）：开启快捷轮盘，以查看冒险之证#[Ps5]键（长按）：开启快捷轮盘，以查看冒险之证#[Default]键（长按）：开启快捷轮盘，以查看冒险之证}
- Use the Windbite Bullets to perform Swirl reactions and bring the Setekh Wenut in its floating form down. ｜ 通过使风蚀弹发生扩散反应，击落浮游状态的风蚀沙虫。
- Ah, the suspense is killing Paimon! ｜ 好着急啊！
- Guess I'll take a break before making any more plans! ｜ 歇一阵子再做打算吧！
- Challenge failed. The door of the Spiral Abyss only opens to those who are worthy. Challenge this floor again? ｜ 挑战失败。深境螺旋的大门只对有实力者敞开。是否重新挑战此关卡？
- If it were just Arama alone, it wouldn't have worked at all. I am too young and don't have many memories, so I am not as powerful as other Aranara. ｜ 如果只有我一个的话，肯定不行。我经过的时间很少，记忆也很少，所以，没有别的兰那罗力量那么强。
- But what if one of those suspicious Sumeru folk reel him in, and then, and then... Ah! No, no, how horrifying! I can't bear the thought! ｜ 要是他被那个可疑的须弥人吸引，然后，然后…啊啊，我都不敢想下去了！
- Don't worry. You tried. ｜ 不要在意，谢谢你们。
- Back then, I still fantasized about obtaining an Anemo Vision. Well, the thought of using the power of Anemo to pull my house along is quite romantic even now... ｜ 当时我还在幻想要是能得到风元素的神之眼，到时候操控风元素托着房子四处旅行也是挺浪漫的，呵呵…
- Auspicious Beast's Shape ｜ 瑞兽之形
- What I would say is, if that really was the power of the Turnfire, I'd sooner believe that the Mountain King summoned it himself. ｜ 但退一步说，如果真的存在回火的力量，我更相信是山王自己召唤的。
- Source of All Waters ｜ 万水之源
- And I, for my part, promise to uphold the principles of fairness, impartiality, and transparency in my officiation of the proceedings. ｜ 而我也将本着公平公正公开的原则见证本届决赛。
- Is this not precisely the meaning of love!? Truly, the power of love transcends all boundaries! ｜ 简直就像是爱情！爱情的力量，能够超越一切！
- The Floral Courtyard: Part III ｜ 花影瑶庭·其三
- Huh? ｜ 咦？
- Let me adjust my deck first... ｜ 先调整一下卡组…
- CD|{param9:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param9:F1}秒
- You are in Co-Op Mode. Invite your teammates to attempt the challenge together? ｜ 当前处于联机状态，是否发起挑战邀请，邀请队伍成员参与挑战？
- Let Paimon guess! Madiha is going to say: Please help me complete the final tests, and I'll reward you. ｜ 让我猜猜看，玛蒂哈的下一句话是——「拜托你们帮我完成最后的测试吧，我会给你们一笔报酬的」。
- "Born in an instant"... "Often contradicting, your company in eternal rest, never separated"... "Fire cannot burn it"... ｜ 「生于一瞬」…「常与相违，伴你长眠，从不分离」…「烈火难及」…
- Ride the wind currents generated by the Eye of the Storm's Hurricane Sphere to evade damage. ｜ 利用狂风之核召唤飓风领域时造成的风场，可以升空避开伤害。
- ... ｜ ……
- This is a great chat and all, but can we talk about that crazy thing that happened during the show? It nearly gave Paimon a heart attack! ｜ 比起这个，还是刚刚突发的情况把我吓坏了。
- Uh, is it just Paimon, or has Sorush been really stubborn ever since we got the Chaplet? ｜ 不知道是不是我的错觉，似乎拿到花冠之后，斯露莎一直在逞强的样子。
- I really like it here. It's a place where I can finally enjoy a moment of peace. I'll use this time to revitalize myself and prepare for the next time I need to administer judgment. ｜ 我很喜欢这里，在这里我可以获得片刻的安宁。我会利用这段时间调整好状态，为下一次审判做准备。
- Yeah, you're right. Now's not the time to get all melancholy. ｜ 也对，还不是感伤的时候。
- Complete Ley Line deposit challenges 1 time ｜ 完成地脉淤积点挑战1次
- Ah, Monsieur Neuvillette? Sorry, I accidentally fell asleep. ｜ 那维莱特大人？不好意思，我刚刚不小心睡过去啦。
- And it's not just that we're high up — don't forget about the gaseous phlogiston! ｜ 而且，不仅仅是高，别忘了那些气态燃素呢！
- Calla Lilies that grow by the riverbanks are the best quality, so that's where I get mine whenever I can. Calla Lilies found elsewhere pale in comparison in terms of medicinal value... ｜ 在那边河滩上生长的嘟嘟莲质量最好，我一般只在那里采需要入药的嘟嘟莲，其他地方生长的嘟嘟莲，药效会差很多…
- Brutal Tactics ｜ 痛击战法
- It sounds like you underestimated me. And the children, as well. ｜ 那你们也太小看我，和这帮孩子了。
- Gernot ｜ 深渊法师·革诺他
- Uh, yeah, we could tell that from your getup. But at the same time... When you talk, you don't really sound like someone who's used to waving a sword around... ｜ 唔，这倒是能从你的衣服上看出来。但你一说起话来，又不像是舞刀弄枪的人…
- Thanks for liking it here... ｜ 谢谢你喜欢…
- Remove all threats to Eternity — by order of the Almighty Shogun. ｜ 处理掉所有威胁「永恒」的因素，这是将军大人的命令。
- Don't fuss over the details too much. ｜ 不要在意这些细节…
- These are principles of writing that I've extracted from successful novels. They are tried and true guidelines. ｜ 那些可都是我从成功的小说里提炼出来的写作原则，都是前人的经验。
- Crystal Shrapnel Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 裂晶弹片持续时间|{param3:F1}秒
- You don't have to be so hard on yourself anymore. ｜ 你不用继续苛责自己。
- Uh... It's a long story, if you would... ｜ 那个…说来话长…
- Aghhh! ｜ 呃啊！
- At the core of any myth is a true story, but once a story comes to bear the hopes and dreams of an entire people, fantastical fictions inevitably become mixed in with the truth. ｜ 传说的本质是「故事」，但当它承载起众人的期许，不免会杂糅杜撰的奇迹。
- But it's all over now! Isn't that wonderful? ｜ 现在「眼狩令」终于废除了，真是大快人心！
- Head to the garden cared for by Aranakula ｜ 前往兰那库拉照料的苗圃
- Oh, one other thing — I believe that this picture behind me matches Enkanomiya's topography. I suggest you study it carefully before heading out. ｜ 哦，对了。背后这张图我觉得应该和渊下宫的地形是相匹配的。建议你出门前好好研究一下这个地图。
- My friends... ｜ 朋友们…
- Actually, this whole compound is the family's private property. I asked Miss Kiminami to prepare some ingredients and utensils for me so that I could cook a special dish here. ｜ 这间院子也是他们家的私人区域，我是请店主帮忙准备了一些料理用具和食材，想在这里做一道特色料理。
- Reach {param0}% collection progress ｜ 收集进度达到{param0}%
- Yes, it'd be so nice if they could go back to the way things were. ｜ 嗯，要是他们的关系能和好如初就好了呢。
- Hmph! Didn't he say "The Guhua Clan used to accept rice and salted meat"? Then why don't we fulfill his wish, and make him some salted meat? ｜ 哼哼，那家伙不是说「古华当年收的是稻米和咸肉」嘛，那我们就按照他的要求，给他做一份咸肉好啦！
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Hued Vase: Amber.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「妙彩宝瓶-『熟麦』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Yeah... It's almost like nothing strange is strange here! ｜ 说的也是，感觉发生什么奇怪的事也不奇怪呢！
- A common bird feather. Experts use it to practice strength control, while rookies use it to make fans. ｜ 随处可见的鸟类落毛，高手用来练习力道，新手则用来制成扇子。
- You hear from the scouts that Jeht has joined the Tanit tribe, but you first need to get a feel for the place... ｜ 你们从斥候口中得知婕德加入了塔尼特部族，但你们还需要先了解一下这个部落…
- I should also mention... He was my teacher, the one who taught me the basics of perfumery when I apprenticed in Sumeru. ｜ 另外，他也是在须弥…领我入门的调香老师。
- (I... I always thought that was just a local legend...) ｜ （我，我还一直以为那只是清泉镇的传说…）
- Aw, there goes the holiday mood... ｜ 唉，假日的气氛一下就消失了…
- A feather carried over by whimpering sea winds and crimson waves. The passage of time has changed its shape and color. ｜ 随呜咽的海风、腥红的海浪而来的飞羽，年岁改变了它的形状与颜色。
- Oia ｜ 奥娅
- Low HP: III ｜ 生命值低·其三
- Hello there! I'm Woliu, a hydrologist working for the Ministry of Civil Affairs, and currently conducting a routine survey of Chenyu Vale's hydrological and pedological conditions. ｜ 你好啊，我是隶属璃月总务司的「水文学家」斡流，正在沉玉谷例行勘测水文与土壤状况。
- If this were my son, oh, he'd get the scolding of a lifetime! Hmph! ｜ 要是我儿子做出这种事，一定得狠狠教训他一顿。哼。
- You have drawn your weapons. I see your answer. ｜ 对我拔剑相向了。看来答案不言自明。
- A rock with the same properties as a Statue of The Seven, allowing it to resonate with scattered Oculi. After using it, the approximate location of nearby Oculi will be revealed. ｜ 与七天神像拥有相同性质，能和散失的神瞳产生共鸣的石头。使用后，如果附近有散失的神瞳存在，将会指示其所在的大致范围。
- Anna ｜ 安娜
- It's only been a few days and a new Withering Zone has popped up already. So close to the main road, too... ｜ 啊呀，怎么才这么几天，这里就出现了新的「死域」…而且还在这么靠近大路的地方…
- Pyro DMG ｜ 火元素伤害
- Hmph. Don't think that Paimon's gonna forgive you just because you're getting all serious now! ｜ 别以为你突然严肃认真起来，我就会原谅你！
- Wow... Paimon understood almost none of that, but it's why nothing moves here, right? ｜ 唔…虽然听不明白你在说什么，但应该是这里所有东西都静止不动的原因吧？
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}

- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Fleuve Cendre ｜ 灰河
- Rules ｜ 规则说明
- Wow, how should Paimon put this... It's definitely not your typical festival, but it sure looks like it'll be quite the party! ｜ 哇，该怎么说呢，虽然和普通的祭典感觉不太一样，但感到了另一种层面的厉害…
- Oh? In that case, why don't you finish this one for me, Hu Tao? ｜ 哦？那不如请胡堂主接我一对——
- Read all the fashion reading materials. ｜ 翻阅了全部时髦读物。
- Pavilion: Stargazer's Shelter ｜ 古宅凉亭-「夜观七宿」
- Leaves on the Wind ｜ 落叶归风
- At the feet of the Anemo Archon Statue in the plaza in front of Mondstadt Cathedral, you and Paimon discover a little girl playing with her imaginary friend... ｜ 在蒙德教堂前、巨大神像脚下的广场，你和派蒙发现了一位小女孩，正在与「幻想朋友」一起玩…
- But even during our time there, we never doubted each other. We always believed that Dougier was manipulating us, trying to make us mistrust each other. ｜ 但即便是在那种环境下，我们也从来没有互相怀疑，我们都坚信是杜吉耶在耍手段，挑拨离间。
- #Alright, we should be out of ear-shot. So... what do you think, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #这个距离应该听不见了…{NICKNAME}，你怎么看？
- Now then, water from the Offering Pool on this island's shrine is required to raise Spiritherbs. This is because the water there contains "wishes." ｜ 想要供养「灵草」，需要取自岛上神社奉纳池中的水才行。因为那里的水饱含着「愿望」。
- Yeah. Consider this our way of helping her out! ｜ 嗯，就当是帮帮莉诺尔。
- Vultur Gryphus ｜ 神鹫座
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- She saw it as a personal betrayal, threw a huge fit, and then flew off. We hadn't seen each other since... until today. ｜ 柯娅认为是我背叛了她，大闹一场后飞向了远方。从此我们就再没见过面，直到刚刚。
- Have a "chat" with them ｜ 与这些人「聊聊」
- Anatole ｜ 阿纳托尔
- <color=#FFCC33FF>Is there anything you'd like to do?</color> ｜ <color=#FFCC33FF>有什么想做的吗？</color>
- *sigh* Let's try someone else. ｜ 嗯…问问别人好了。
- Talk to Xiao ｜ 与魈交谈
- Once we've got this Raptor guy, we'll pick up where we left off. ｜ 别担心啦，等抓到怪鸟之后，我就直接…
- A friend's friend is also our friend! Golden Nara and White Floaty are both Aragaru's friends! ｜ 朋友的朋友也是朋友！金色的那菈，还有飞飞白毛都是兰迦鲁的朋友！
- *sigh* Not that he seems to understand anything that's going on, of course. ｜ #唉，{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}倒是一副没有听懂的样子。
- The trashed goods should have been discarded after the bandits got to them... ｜ 那些垃圾应该是劫匪得手后丢弃的…
- Revives a character and restores 100 HP. ｜ 复苏选中的角色，为其恢复100点生命值。
- Chosen of Dragons, hope resides within you. This is not the end. Take the token of the oath, and go unto the sacred mountain. ｜ 受龙所选者啊，希望在你的身上。这里还不是终点，带着誓约的信物，前往圣山吧。
- Inazuman Workshop: Multipurpose ｜ 稻妻工坊-「适称兼用」
- New strategy. ｜ 计划变更。
- Unlocks the associated character ｜ 角色解锁
- It's just a shame... *cough* Everything behind it has been buried under rocks. For all we know, this was once an important route into the satellite city. ｜ 只可惜…咳咳，这后面都被山体掩埋了，说不定以前这里也是「卫城」的某个重要通道。
- ...You two again. ｜ …又是你们。
- Haha, the worst of it is over. ｜ 哈哈，我已经好得差不多了。
- Continue the pursuit ｜ 继续向前追踪
- Meet up with Fukumoto at Puspa Café ｜ 前往普斯帕咖啡馆与福本会合
- After Albedo leaves, you and Paimon wait outside the cavern for a while... ｜ 阿贝多走后，旅行者与派蒙在洞外等候了一段时间…
- Hahaha, please, we crossed that bridge a long time ago! ｜ 哈哈，听听你在说什么呀，我们早就是了。
- Is something the matter? ｜ 怎么了？
- What's next, Jakob? ｜ 接下来呢，雅各布。
- Lyney: Serious ｜ 林尼·认真
- Still, it won't stop me from trying. You and your friend are here to catch the storyteller, right? The tea's on me — it's the least I can do. ｜ 这个人情我会努力还的，凯亚队长你们是来听说书的对吧？茶钱我请了。
- Of course. Being dignified comes with being a true champion. ｜ 这是当然的。强者有强者的风度。
- See you. ｜ 再见。
- Even when I'm staring death in the face, I don't think I'll regret this decision. I bear the name "Bar{RUBY#[D]Blessing}aka." This is a part of my duty. ｜ 即便是站在寿命的终点回望此刻的我，我也不认为我会后悔——因为这就是我的使命，「巴{RUBY#[D]祝福}莱卡」之名的意义。
- "We, the Chasm Exploration Team, have made this place our temporary base camp. All members, please pay attention to act within safety parameters at all times. Do not act alone without permission, and do not touch any unknown materials within the depths of The Chasm!" ｜ 「层岩巨渊勘探队在此暂行驻扎，请各位队员行动时注意安全规范，如无许可请勿单独行动！请勿擅自触碰层岩巨渊深处出现的不明物质！」
- Tavern Dining Cart - "A Snack Between Dishes" ｜ 酒馆餐架-「局间餐点」
- Nothing, really, it's fine. But no matter how good it is, you can't just keep eating the same thing day after day, can you? Though on the other hand, Ripple's been getting a bit pudgy lately, hasn't he? Then, stop all actions immediately to create Supersense Particles.\nSupersense Skill\nUnleash a shockwave at the character's position, dealing True DMG to nearby opponents and restoring HP to all nearby party members equal to 100% of the character's Max HP.\nAdditionally, all your party members will gain a 75% Geo DMG Bonus for 20s. ｜ 「溢神能量」足够时，施放<color=#FFCC33>元素战技</color>或<color=#FFCC33>元素爆发</color>后立刻停止行动以生成「超感光粒」。\n「超感技能」\n在角色的位置释放冲击波，对附近的敌人造成真实伤害，并为队伍中所有角色恢复生命值，回复量相当于角色生命值上限的100%。\n此外，队伍中所有角色获得75%岩元素伤害加成，持续20秒。

- Well said. Then without further ado, I hereby announce that the Bloomflower Trials have come to a successful close! ｜ 很好。那么我宣布——本次荣花演武圆满落幕！
- The swords of Inazuma have always been famous the world over, and the best works of the Raiden Gokaden in particular are national treasures.\nHowever, only a short time ago, more than half of the five artisan lineages were cut off.\nA great number of powerful people were caught up in that conspiracy, and those responsible were all called to account and banished.\nEven the Yashiro Commission's Kamisato Clan was implicated due to their failure in supervising their subordinates...\nBut before the Shogun could give her final judgment, the Lady Guuji, who usually did not meddle in government affairs, suddenly interceded, rescuing the Kamisato Clan in their hour of peril.\nThus, while they suffered a serious blow, they were spared from dismissal.\nIn the years that followed, others would speculate greatly concerning the Guuji's actions.\nSome observed the close relations between the Yashiro Commission and the Grand Narukami Shrine, and guessed that she had intended to foster advocates loyal to her.\nAnd yet the shrine had always been an entity unto itself, and the Lady Guuji did not usually meddle in governance. Thus this action seemed a sacrifice greater than the reward — hardly a wise decision.\nSome others said that the Guuji suspected something to be wrong with the whole situation, and now that the list of those involved was so extensive, any major shakeup in the Yashiro Commission could destabilize Inazuma itself.\nThis thought, too, seemed reasonable on face, yet did not stand up to scrutiny. After all, was not the rise and fall of great houses merely ordinary in the grand scheme of mortal affairs? And even if the Kamisato were to fall from grace, new leadership for the Yashiro Commission would emerge.\nYet another story said that Miko engaged in secret talks with the Kamisato clan head just after the initial shockwaves had died down.\nBut the wounded clan was like a candle in the wind at this point. What power could they have to change the situation?\nTo this day, all these speculations have never amounted to anything, nor have any answers emerged concerning Miko's actions and motivations.\nBut what none know is how Miko's words that day would become as engraved into the Kamisato Clan as their house's crest.\n"That the Kamisato Clan has survived this incident is only due to the Shogun's mercy. Do not forget this in the days that follow."\nThese words would serve as a seed of destiny, foreshadowing the Yashiro Commission's future position.\nIn some other time, if a storm were to descend upon Inazuma, and even if they were to come into conflict with the other two commissions, the Yashiro Commission's Kamisato Clan would remember the favor they were shown and abide the Shogun's path to Eternity.\nThis was a move that the Guuji played with no regrets whatsoever. ｜ 稻妻刀剑自古闻名天下，「雷电五传」的杰作更是国之重器。\n然而，仅过去短短数年，五支传承竟已折损大半。\n汹涌暗流牵扯了无数权贵，涉事世家大族均遭到问责贬谪。\n就连执掌社奉行的神里家，也因督导下属不力而备受牵连。\n将军降下最终裁决之前，久未涉足政事的宫司大人突然向将军进言，赶在风雨飘摇之际保下了神里家。\n由此，神里家虽元气大伤，却终是免去罢黜之虞。\n随后数年，外界对宫司此举多有猜测：\n一说社奉行与鸣神大社关系密切，此行是为了在扶植忠诚于自身的代言者。\n——然而，鸣神大社本就自成一派，更未见宫司平日有意涉政。帮助社奉行，收益小于付出，未必是明智之举。\n一说宫司怀疑事有蹊跷，如今受牵连者甚广，社奉行若再生变故，恐令稻妻大局不稳。\n——此话乍看有理，细想却站不住脚。需知，豪门起落只是人间再平常不过的戏码。即便神里失势，社奉行也会有新当家。\n又有一说，神子在风波初定之后，曾与当时的神里家家主进行过密谈。\n——但年迈重伤的神里家主已如风中残烛，又有什么能力左右大局？\n至此，坊间种种猜测均无结果。神子所想所为，皆没有答案。\n人们不知道的是，神子当日给出的嘱咐，如同家族规章一般留在了神里府中。\n「神里家能从此次事件中幸存，还是将军宽容。从今往后，切莫忘了将军的恩典。」\n这句话成为了因缘之种，预示着社奉行未来的位置。\n他日，若风暴降临稻妻，即便与另两家奉行针锋相对，社奉行神里家也要牢记恩惠，恪守「将军」的永恒之道。\n棋盘上，宫司走出了无憾的一着。

- Yes, the items seized at that time are currently stored in the warehouse next to the Police Station. Since Kaedehara has come back to Inazuma, those items should be returned to their rightful owner. ｜ 当时查抄所得的物品现在被收在奉行所旁边的仓库里，既然枫原现在已经回到稻妻，那些东西也理应物归原主。

- A teamwide tally will be increased by 1/2/2 stacks respectively after a character's Normal, Charged, or Plunging Attacks hit an opponent. Each stack of the tally grants all party members a <color=#FFCC33>7%</color> All Elemental DMG Bonus for 4s. Can be triggered up to once every 0.2s, max 8 stacks. ｜ 角色的普通攻击、重击与下落攻击命中敌人时，将分别为队伍累计1/2/2层计数，每层计数将使队伍中的所有角色获得<color=#FFCC33>7%</color>所有元素伤害加成。此效果持续4秒，每0.2秒至多触发一次，至多叠加8层。

- It's one thing to trust that Miko has good intentions, but would you let your guard down around her? ｜ 你可以信任她没有歹意，但你会对她放下戒心吗？

- ... ｜ ……
- Comes from a now-defunct Secret Source Automaton.\nIt appears to be an intact core by which the Secret Source Automaton was powered, a strange device that seems to have been produced as a universal component. According to legend, the ingenious thinkers of antiquity drew upon the same wisdom used in the creation of golden patterns to design the blueprints by which these extraordinary machines functioned. Perhaps this core was one of them. ｜ 来自不再活动的秘源机兵。\n看上去是完整的驱动秘源机械体运作的核心，似乎是作为通用的组件而被制造出来的奇特装置。传说古老文明的伟大住民会用金纹创生的智慧勾勒奇异机械体运作的蓝图，或许这核心也是其中之一吧。
- Nightmare ｜ 「魇」
- Huh! ｜ …喝！
- It's You ｜ 是你
- A traditional staple from Mondstadt. Not only is the pickled meat within deeply flavorful, but the meringue has also maintained its sweetness and moisture through the baking process. This dish is not to be missed at any festival in Mondstadt. ｜ 蒙德的传统主食。腌制过的肉类不仅风味浓郁，经过酥皮的烘烤后，更保持了香甜与湿润。是蒙德节日不可缺少的组成部分。

- This is the Northland Bank, which was opened in Liyue by Snezhnaya. It's also the only non-local bank here in Liyue. ｜ 这里是北国银行，也是至冬国在这里开设的银行，也是唯一一家非璃月本土的银行。
- Meow... "But first things first, Shuyun. Before that, our TCG newcomers should receive their free gift..." ｜ 喵呜…「不过在此之前，恕筠啊，别忘了还有要赠送给新人的…」
- After casting an Elemental Skill, gain 1 Succession Seed. This effect can be triggered once every 5s. The Succession Seed lasts for 30s. Up to 3 Succession Seeds may exist simultaneously. After using an Elemental Burst, all Succession Seeds are consumed and after 2s, the character regenerates <color=#99FFFFFF>6</color> Energy for each seed consumed. ｜ 施放元素战技后，获得1个胤种，该效果每5秒至多触发一次。胤种持续30秒，至多同时存在3个。施放元素爆发后，会清除持有的所有胤种，并在2秒之后，基于消耗的胤种数量，每个为该角色恢复<color=#99FFFFFF>6</color>点元素能量。

- Instead of lubricating the bearings of the Numbering Machine, the lubricant actually made them more likely to get stuck. ｜ 做出来的润滑剂不仅没有起到润滑「推数机」轴承的作用，反而让它们更容易卡死了。

- The more imbeciles we take in, the more stupid things we'll have to deal with every day. It threatens our efficiency. I don't know what's on their mind. ｜ 哼，推荐这些进来的人也不好好想想，加入的笨蛋越多，我们每天就要为处理更多的傻事而费心，效率反而会降低的。
- Strange... Why are these hilichurls standing around a drawing board? Huh, wait, are they the ones we ran into on the beach earlier? ｜ 奇怪…这些丘丘人怎么围着一个画板呀？啊，难道是之前在海边碰到的…
- Anyway, let's head to the Stadium. We shouldn't keep everyone waiting. ｜ 我们也动身去圣火竞技场吧，不要让希诺宁她们等急了。

- Huh? Why's that? There doesn't seem to be much use for that down here... ｜ 为什么呀？这里又不需要学问和智慧…
- Of course! Let me put it this way — every time you eat meat in the city, you're eating something caught by a Springvale hunter. ｜ 当然！但凡你在城里吃到的肉，都是出自我们清泉镇的猎人之手。
- "Due to the recent sudden surge of anomalies within The Chasm, the renovation of the storehouse has been stopped. All workers, please halt work and stand by for further notice. The old storehouse will be kept as-is for the use of the Millelith and any Ministry staff who may come to observe the area." ｜ 「由于层岩巨渊近期突发异变，紧急暂停库房改建计划。施工人员请暂候进一步通知。旧库房暂且保留，以供千岩军及总务司相关勘察人员方便所需。」
- I—I'm coming, too! ｜ 我、我也要去！
- Normal Attack and Charged Attack hits increase ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>5%</color> and Normal ATK SPD by <color=#99FFFFFF>1.5%</color> for 6s. Max 4 stacks. Can only occur once every 0.3s. ｜ 普通攻击与重击命中时，提升<color=#99FFFFFF>5%</color>攻击力与<color=#99FFFFFF>1.5%</color>普通攻击速度。该效果持续6秒，最多可以叠加4层，每0.3秒只能触发一次。
- Default ｜ 默认
- Y—Yes, ma'am. ｜ 知、知道…
- Hey, Paimon might be short, but she's got a big brain! ｜ 喂！别看我个子不高，我的脑容量可是很大的！
- Namecard style.\nSharks that live in the sea don't actually like eating people — they prefer marine creatures. So as a shark that lives in freshwater hot springs, it's only natural that Mualani's Sharky Surfboard will only eat hot spring creatures. ...Just kidding, those Capybaras can sleep easy. Firstly, because their meat's too tough. And secondly, because... it's a surfboard? ｜ 名片纹饰。\n海里的鲨鲨其实不喜欢吃人，只喜欢吃海洋生物。玛拉妮的鲨鲨冲浪板原型是淡水温泉鲨，所以只吃温泉生物。骗你的，不吃豚兽的啦。一是因为肉很柴，二是因为冲浪板不吃东西。
- What are you up to? ｜ 你在做什么呢？
- Of course we do. To tell you the truth, I'm already cutting out quite a few steps here compared to the proper protocol. If Mr. Flois were here, it would be another week before we'd finish working through his process. ｜ 那当然了。我还是略过了很多步骤，要是弗洛瓦先生来，按他的流程，我们至少还得多花一周。
- Huh, you know that name too? Or do you know someone else who's trying to investigate the Water Imp? ｜ 又是？还有别人在调查水妖？
- By royal decree! ｜ 以断罪之名！
- #Did you hear that, {NICKNAME}? All the nonsense aside, he's calling for help! ｜ #你听到了吗，{NICKNAME}？他虽然讲话乱七八糟的，但确实是在求救！
- You wait for a while longer once again... ｜ 又又又等了一会儿…
- Huh? Why are you still in Aaru Village? Are you thinking about trying to get something from me? ｜ 嗯？你们怎么还在阿如村？难道是想从我这里捞到些什么？
- Crucabena, you mean? But, but... ｜ 杀死库嘉维娜…？可是、可是…
- She's a good egg, really. ｜ 菲谢尔是个很热心的好人呢。
- We got the four Spirit Pearls! ｜ 我们已经取得四颗「御灵珠」啦！
- Wait... there's some people coming! ｜ 等等，看那边，好像有人过来了！
- Some time ago, in a team far, far away... ｜ 早些时候，另外一队…
- Processed from cocoa fruit. Its unique aroma can be used to add a rich flavor to the drink. ｜ 由可可果加工制成，独特的香气能为饮品增添醇厚的风味。
- A Welfare Meal from the Coupon Cafeteria. As it's free, there's an element of surprise and risk.\n\nUse to obtain a meal and a Fortune Slip. ｜ 特许食堂发放的福利餐。因为免费，所以惊喜与风险并存。\n\n使用后能获得一份料理和一张幸运签。

- Let's go talk to him. Maybe he's found something. ｜ 我们去找他聊聊吧，说不定他会有什么发现呢。

- This pot used to carry concentrated and extremely potent concoctions. It is now empty, but still gives off a strong smell of medicine. ｜ 原本装满了提炼后极浓的药汁，如今只剩下浓烈的药味。

- Woah, this is a ton of Mora! C—Can we keep it? ｜ 这是…呜哇，好多摩拉！我，我们能收着吗？
- No. Negative. Not possible. That way the gift would mean nothing. I'll further modify the arithmetic formula and generate another music score! ｜ 不！不不不，不行，绝对不行，那样就失去意义了，我再修改一下算式，等会回去再输出一份！

- (Though it has little to do with tribal life, the people of the tribe are quite fond of this book... You notice the edge of the pages has been discolored from repeated friction, doubtlessly inflicted by rubbing fingers.) ｜ （看似与部族生活完全无关的内容，却似乎很受欢迎…你注意到书页的边缘已经被翻看得磨损褪色了。）
- Oh, so the Eremites mistook us for you... ｜ 是嘛，这么说来之前镀金旅团的家伙好像把我们认作了你…
- We'll leave you be, then... ｜ 那就不打扰了…
- Hmm... Urville might look better sitting down. What should the background be? ｜ 唔，尤维尔是不是坐下比较好？坐在哪里取景比较好看呢？

- Darn, what a letdown... ｜ 原来是这样，有点失望…
- Alright then, thank you! Honestly, it was great meeting you. Someday, I hope that I'll be able to traverse this world without fear of causing harm or death to others. ｜ 嗯，谢谢你！能见到你真是太开心了。希望在未来能够有这么一天，我能够昂首走在大地上，而不用担心让别人受伤、死去。

- I'll be there, Ponche. ｜ 庞塞先生，我会去的。
- I'm starving. ｜ 饿了。
- N—Not to worry... ｜ 不，不足挂齿…

- So! Seen anyone who looks a lot like me? ｜ 你见过长得和我很像的人吗？
- Come up with questions during the intervening days, and I will answer them to the best of my ability. ｜ 在那之前，你可以收集一些问题，我会予以必要的解答。
- #Th—Thank you, {NICKNAME}, I can't believe my luck... I was sure I was done for... ｜ #谢，谢谢你，{NICKNAME}，太好了，我还以为这次完蛋了…
- Yeah, and speaking of what happened that day, we didn't use that Crafting Bench in the first place because it seemed weird. ｜ 嗯，说起来那天一开始我们也是因为觉得合成台怪怪的所以没有用呢。
- Thanks so much! Off you go then. ｜ 那就拜托你了，冲吧！
- You mean... They thought they had become a god? ｜ 以为，自己成为了神吗？
- And it's someone I know, too! Well, that's my worries about insufficient samples gone out the window! ｜ 而且还是熟人，这下我不用担心样本不够了嘿嘿。
- I've been friends with the two young masters of the family he serves for a long time. The younger of them, Xingqiu, is a warm-hearted and chivalrous soul for someone of his age. I was definitely right to put my faith in him. ｜ 我跟他家两位公子都是老朋友了，其中二公子行秋虽然年轻，但古道热肠，颇通侠义，信任他果然没错。

- Oh, I know that she's an adeptus. I met her during a delivery once. But hasn't she been in the city lately? She's even tried... with some limited success, to change her terms of self-address, or something like that... ｜ 我知道她是位仙人啦，以前在送镖路上遇见过。但她最近不是来城里了嘛，连自称也勉为其难地改了，时不时还会念错…
- Need help with something else? ｜ 有什么事要帮忙吗？

- The caravaners grew disheartened after their goods were stolen, so they probably didn't feed their animals as scheduled. Let's give it something to eat. ｜ 货物被劫后，商队气氛低落，大概也没有按时给它喂食。我们给它点东西吃好了。
- Sweet Flower needed for making Angler Kayvan's special bait. For some reason, Sweet Flowers of this kind hold some appeal for monsters such that they would willingly collect them... ｜ 渔师凯万制作特别鱼饵所需的甜甜花。不知为何，似乎对魔物有一定的吸引力，居然会被魔物主动采摘…
- Gasp! Shock! We were tricked! ｜ 震惊！我们被骗了！
- In the Masters of the Night-Wind, meditation is usually accompanied by some sort of action. Lucky for us, spacing out means doing absolutely nothing. ｜ 两者的区别就在于，「烟谜主」需要在冥想状态进行某种行动，而我们，只需要享受发呆带来的平静就好。
- Huh? That old man is your dad? ｜ 咦？那个老爷爷，是双叶的爸爸？
- Food ｜ 食物
- Paimon's heard that everyone's supposed to wear a mask at these kinds of festivals. Is that rule still around nowadays, or...? ｜ 听说参加祭典要戴面具，现在还有这种规矩吗？
- Please adjust the camera angle to face the Mikage Furnace's storage devices from below ｜ 需要将镜头转至正确角度，从底部对准「御影炉心」存储装置

- Three hundred to dear mama ｜ 剩下三百给老妈
- If you really must know... ｜ 我有必要告诉你吗？

- Find the Seal ｜ 寻找封印
- Receiving a Gift: II ｜ 收到赠礼·其二
- Even though unexpected situations and problems struck during the filming process, you were able to overcome them all... ｜ 虽然中途又发生了些意外，但都被大家一一克服…
- A Thousand Floating Dreams ｜ 千夜浮梦
- It is no difficult matter, saving Mihir. Perhaps I might even call it trivial. But we Pari each have our mission, and we also have different... ideals. ｜ 解救米希尔对我来说可不是什么难事，应该说，不费吹灰之力。只是吾辈花灵各自使命不同，理念…理念也不同。
- Bring Uncle He back to camp to meet Jinwu ｜ 将老何带回营地见瑾武
- That's the Mountain King up ahead, right? ｜ 前面那个就是沉睡的山王吧？
- Hahaha, well then, last but not least, let's say our good-byes to Big G. ｜ 哈哈哈。那么，最后的最后，每人都给狼哥送上一句告别吧。
- Th—That's right! ｜ 是、是的！
- You...! ｜ 你…！
- Aimed Shot|{param5:F1P} ｜ 瞄准射击|{param5:F1P}
- A sign that you have tested your limits. Collect these to score points. ｜ 挑战极限的象征，收集后，可以获得评分。
- Farewell, humans, creators of miracles. A new era awaits you. ｜ 再见了，创造奇迹的人类，新的时代在等着你们。
- Yes, I suppose... Okay. Souvenir run it is. They're mostly people you know, so it'll be a chance for you to say hi to some people you haven't seen in a while. ｜ 不错的建议，那我们一起去把纪念品带给大家吧，你也可以和许久不见的人打个招呼。
- To serve as an answer to your questions? ｜ 为了回答你的问题？
- Was that really not a "herb"? ｜ 那真的不是「药材」吗…？
- Brand image... ｜ 形象的宣传…
- "I've heard that a large fleet has arrived from Liyue, but I don't know where they are docked." ｜ 「听说最近从璃月方向来了一队大船，也不知道他们停泊何处。」
- Hmm... Paimon wonders if he really took in a word we said. ｜ 唉…也不知道他听进去了没有。
- Start Challenge ｜ 开始挑战
- Virgil ｜ 维吉尔
- Hahaha, I can't believe it — you didn't get picked? Well, never mind, don't get mad — I'll make some more for you when we get back. ｜ 哈哈哈，怎么没抽到你们呀？没事没事，别生气啦，回去我再做给你们吃。
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- There is something elegant about this match.\nIf nothing else, both sides may concede defeat without regrets. ｜ 在对局之中，也隐有风雅之礼。\n至少…对局双方都「落牌无悔」。
- Oh... Alright then, I'll ponder this a bit longer. ｜ 噢…好，我再琢磨琢磨。
- Reward for inviting Tartaglia to a duel at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives ｜ 在猫尾酒馆中邀请达达利亚进行对局，完成相应挑战目标后获取
- Miitoboru ｜ 「大肉丸」
- *cough* ...I didn't expect someone to just... show up and settle the matter on my behalf... ｜ 咳咳…没想到今天被你们打开了…
- Yeah, guess that's all we can do now. Alright then, we'll see you around, Furina... ｜ 也只能这样了。那我们就先走了，芙宁娜。
- I will help too. ｜ 我也来帮忙吧。
- Ahem, well, the truth is... we were planning a festival. ｜ 其实…我们是想举办一场庆典。
- "Cassiodor" ｜ 「卡西奥多」
- Um, Paimon doesn't mean this in an insulting way, but... he seems like the kind of guy who'd be really easy to take advantage of. ｜ 我也不想说这种话，可那种性格的人弱点好多，很容易被人抓住把柄的吧。
- Brouhaha Ball ｜ 四处捣乱球
- Well, the biggest thing for us is that we can finally get back out on the ocean to fish. ｜ 对我们来说，最近的大事就是终于可以出海捕鱼了。
- Greetings. I'm Deyou, a merchant from Liyue. ｜ 你们好啊。我是来自璃月的商人德佑。
- Tell me a bit about yourself... ｜ 关于你自己…
- There may be worse things behind that gate. ｜ 大门后的环境可能更加凶险。
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param6:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param6:F1}点
- Ugh, Ogawa! This isn't over, you'll pay for this. You haven't seen the last of me! ｜ 小川！你骗我的这笔账，等会儿再跟你算！
- She's been here a few times with Master Jean for afternoon tea before. I think she normally orders <color=#00E1FFFF>something vegetarian</color>. ｜ 以前偶尔见到她和琴团长来吃下午茶，好像…主要会点<color=#00E1FFFF>蔬菜类</color>的吧？
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P}+{param5:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}+{param5:F1P}
- Okay, got it. I'm here to pay back Lesser Lord Kusanali for helping Grandpa. I won't get cold feet! ｜ 嗯，我明白的。我是为了替「爷爷」报答小吉祥草王才来的，不会临阵退缩的。

- Difficulty ｜ 挑战难度
- *sigh* I should just go get myself some Dandelion Wine... ｜ 欸，我还是去再喝点蒲公英酒好了…
- Consumable ｜ 消耗品
- I once hoped that Finch would be able to move on, and meet me "when the stars in the night sky have all gone out." ｜ 我原本希望芬奇能够迈开脚步前行，在「夜空里所有星星熄灭的时候」与我相见。
- The Narrows ｜ 狭间之街
- Not yet available ｜ 暂未开放
- Just as you thought it was all over, a light once again shines from behind you: the final radiance of Halfdan's soul. He says to Dainsleif:\n"Apologies, Captain Dainsleif, Twilight Sword. Back then... I failed you, and failed to protect our people."\n"No, for five hundred years, you have faithfully done your duty."\n"To this day, I am proud of you all."\n"Khaenri'ah... didn't fall, did it? Since you're still here..."\n"Correct."\nHaving received Dain's acknowledgment, the valiant knight can finally rest in peace.\n"So... no need to revive the homeland," Dainsleif murmurs softly. ｜ 你们本以为一切已经结束，却再次有光在你们身后亮起，那是哈夫丹的灵魂在散发出最后的光芒。他向戴因说道：\n「抱歉，『末光之剑』戴因斯雷布大人，那时…我辜负了您，没能守护好国民。」\n「不，这五百年间，你尽到了自己的责任。」\n「直到今天，你们仍是我的荣耀。」\n「坎瑞亚没有亡国，是吗？毕竟您还站在这里。」\n「嗯。」\n得到了戴因的肯定，这位勇敢的骑士终于安心离开了。「所以…也不需要复国。」戴因斯雷布喃喃说道。
- Wh—Why are they being so mean!? ｜ 这、这说的都是什么话呀，根本不是人话吧！
- A blooming wild flower that a Hilichurl Rogue treasured, bereft of any special qualities.\nThe eternal outlander asks not for reward, but only to see their deeds come to fruition... ｜ 丘丘游侠曾珍视的盛放野花，并不具有什么特别之处。\n永恒的异乡人从不索要酬劳，所行所为最终都将开花结果…
- You must activate three Light Realm Chisels at the Three Border Corners of Enkanomiya to cleanse the darkness. ｜ 为了涤除黑暗，你们需要激活位于渊下宫边陲三角处的光界锥凿。

- Hair looks different at every place on the body, same applies to wolves. You don't know where it's from... ｜ 狼身上有好几种毛发，颜色深浅都不同啦。

- ...That's one heck of an info dump! It sounds like you left the Sumeru City space when you set foot outside of the walls. ｜ …信息量好大，听起来出了须弥城就到了这个「空间」之外了吗？
- A mantle brooch that has lost its luster. The gold plating that once adorned it was ground away by the wind and the waves long ago. ｜ 色泽暗淡的斗篷别针。原本镀上的金色已经被海风磨去。
- The true heart of an Oceanid. This item is truly hard to find, for one must become one with the waters to truly perceive the heart of the springs. ｜ 纯水精灵的真心。因为需要融为一体才能见到纯水的真心，所以世上难觅。
- Momoyo ｜ 百代
- She's a real happy camper right now. No need for you to be a wet blanket. ｜ 它…现在应该很开心，不要说任何煞风景的话。

- Talk to Ms. Qiu ｜ 与邱老板对话
- Supreme... ｜ 鱼钩上的…
- Rumor has it that people who've ascended to Celestia have also witnessed the same helix-shaped divine ladder that can be seen within Visions. Venturing out into the universe and down into the abyss are the same in that both are braving the dark unknown. ｜ 相传通往天空岛之人，在神之眼中——在幻视中，看到的天梯也是如此螺旋的形态。我们走向宇宙，或者下到深渊。并没有差别，因为都是未知的漆黑。
- Played by Clorinde ｜ 克洛琳德饰
- Paimon agrees! You made the right decision, Eula! It's what we business owners call a win-win situation! ｜ 喔噢噢！优菈的决定真是太明智了！一举两得！
- I've been to five out of the seven nations in Teyvat. I suppose that makes me something of a traveler myself. Even though I live in Inazuma, I often have business in Natlan. So, as fellow travelers, we should stick together! ｜ 我也算是一位旅者，造访过提瓦特七国中的五国。即便如今定居稻妻，我也得时常去往纳塔，处理生意上的事务。所以，我们是同路人，可以多多结伴同行。
- An emerald leaf as fluffy as a feather. Plucked from the raiment of a forest scholar. ｜ 飘逸如羽的翠色叶片，取自林中智者的衣衫。
- The Forest Watchers played an essential role in helping the rainforest to withstand the Withering and continue to flourish, and Tighnari is the best of them all. Still... I do hope he learns to be a little gentler with people. Otherwise, it's gonna be difficult for the Forest Rangers to attract new top talent. ｜ 雨林能够对抗「死域」的侵蚀，至今都生机焕发，巡林官们的付出举足轻重，而提纳里又是他们之中的佼佼者。只是…希望他可以稍稍温柔一些，这样才更有利于巡林员招新纳贤嘛。

- \nThe illusion shall manifest at the end of the threefold trial. Proceed onward, for this is the sacred realm that all the people of King Deshret aspire to enter. ｜ \n三重试炼的尽头是幻景的显现，前进吧，这是所有赤王子民都渴望进入的神圣之域。
- One day, you and Paimon receive a mysterious commission from the Adventurers' Guild: "Protagonist Wanted." You set off on a new journey, searching for wondrous companions... ｜ 某天，你和派蒙在冒险家协会处接到了一份「寻找主角」的神秘委托，踏上了寻找奇妙伙伴的旅途…
- You need to fish for a Paimon. ｜ 你需要钓起一个派蒙。
- The high-class silks from Liyue remain out of stock, but we still have the latest kimonos. ｜ 虽然璃月的高档绸缎仍然断货，但新款的着物还是应有尽有的。
- A seed obtained from the Seed Dispensary. A quality seed full of life, just waiting to be planted in the fields of the Realm Within. After some time, it will grow into a Cecilia. ｜ 通过「化种匣」获取的种子，富有活力，品质上佳，种植于壶中洞天的田亩后，可在一段时间后生长为「塞西莉亚花」。

- ...I just need to tune my instrument. ｜ 那么…请先容我调下琴。
- Absolutely! You sorted out the Tenryou Commission and the people in the city got to see a happy and healthy Shogun. All the awful rumors will disappear in no time. ｜ 是啊，天领奉行的事解决了，城里的人也见到了健康的将军，不好的猜想都会自然而然地消失。

- A <color=#e09800>Roaring Rockbreaker</color> descends on a nearby opponent, dealing Geo DMG, for every <color=#f39001>{0}</color> Elemental Shards produced by the <color=#f39001>Electro Crystallize reaction</color> that characters pick up ｜ 角色每获取<color=#f39001>{0}</color>枚<color=#f39001>雷元素结晶反应</color>产生的晶片，将对附近的一名敌人降下<color=#e09800>轰转磐岩</color>，造成岩元素伤害
- The ancient machines that set the forest alight several hundred years ago were ultimately beaten and sent to slumber in the derelict underground city.\nDefeating these creatures should grant you access to materials that can enlighten you as to the nature of talents and their advancement. ｜ 数百年前曾经点燃森林，最终又被击败的古代机械静静沉睡在地下的废都中。\n能够粉碎其中的机关魔物的话，或许能获得令人参悟天赋成长的物资吧。
- You Can Do This! ｜ 加油
- All thanks to you. Once again, I am in your debt. ｜ 嗯，又欠你一个人情。
- Boxes made from Athel Wood planks that have undergone simple processing. One could never call this "high quality," but it is built very simply and is quite cheap — all one needs to do is collect some dry wood along the way and lash them together using sturdy ropes to produce such boxes in bulk. Their lack of artistry is no obstacle. After all, no one will look at such a thing with high expectations for its life expectancy. ｜ 以简单处理后的「柽木」板材拼接而成的货箱，质量算不上好，但胜在制作简单，且相当便宜——只需收集沿途的枯木，再准备几捆结实的绳索，就能批量生产，工艺粗糙也无妨，毕竟所有人都不会高估它的使用寿命。

- What about us? What should we do? ｜ 那我们呢？我们该做什么呀？

- Restores 32% of Max HP and an additional 1,250 HP to the selected character. ｜ 为选中的角色恢复生命值上限的32%，并额外恢复1250点生命值。
- Shoot, that creepy Abyss thing is raining down a dangerous-looking substance again! ｜ 那个坏家伙，怎么又扔脏东西下来了！
- Eight Locales Over Mountains and Seas ｜ 山海八所巡礼
- Don't you get picky, now. I calculated this remuneration very carefully, and it is commensurate with the work. ｜ 可别嫌少，这酬劳可是我仔细算过的，和你们的工作刚好相称。
- Klee ｜ 可莉
- After all, I came to Inazuma under the pretext of evaluating a potential investment. If an acquaintance were to see me sitting here, then there would be no way to hide the truth from my father. ｜ 我毕竟是以考察商品的名头来了稻妻，若是被认得我的人看见我坐在这里，我爹那边可就瞒不住了。
- Enhance 3 weapons to Lv. 70 ｜ 将任意三把武器强化到70级
- ...I've heard a lot of stories like this before, and only kids take them seriously. But I know you said this with good intentions, Paimon, so thank you. ｜ 这样的故事，我以前也听过很多，只有小孩子才会把故事当真，不过我知道派蒙是好心，所以还是谢谢你。
- Elemental DMG dealt by your characters' Normal Attacks +1.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>After your active character takes DMG or is healed 3 times this Round:</color> Create 3 $[K411]. (Once per Round) ｜ 我方角色普通攻击造成的元素伤害+1。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>本回合我方出战角色受到伤害或治疗3次后：</color>生成3个$[K411]。（每回合1次）
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Did you know there are hot springs in Inazuma?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>...But there are no volcanoes.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Umm, Paimon heard that the heat comes from a giant furnace!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>If we get the chance, Paimon also wants to check out a hot spring. Unfortunately, it seems like only the big shots are granted entry.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Hmmm...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Let's head back to the Dadaupa Gorge in Mondstadt!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Eh? Why so sudden?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Back in the Dadaupa Gorge, the hilichurls have a huge cauldron that's heated by Flaming Flowers. It should be similar to a hot spring, right? You can bathe in their... soup, I guess?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>??? ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>稻妻城里居然有温泉！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>但是稻妻没有火山呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嗯，据说是用一个很大的炉子供热的！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>有机会的话，我也想去泡温泉，可惜似乎只有大人物才有资格。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>走了，我们回蒙德的达达乌帕谷吧！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸？为什么这么突然！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>达达乌帕谷那边，丘丘人的那口大锅是用烈焰花供热的，四舍五入和温泉也差不多吧。派蒙可以去那里泡…呃…泡汤？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>？？？
- There were three, actually... Huh, why *were* there only three? ｜ 其实是三个。咦，对啊，为什么四风守护只有三个？
- Composed-Looking Treasure Hoarder ｜ 看似沉稳的盗宝团

- A toolbox filled with all manner of items that can be used to repair the damage done to a Waverider.\nFor someone who is ever wandering such as yourself, your Waverider is like a "home," so take good care of it! ｜ 装有各式器具的工具箱，可以修理「浪船」所受的损伤。\n浪船对于居无定所的永恒旅人而言，是如同真正属于自己的「小屋」一般的存在。要好好珍惜爱护它。
- In any case, safe travels! Be careful on mountain paths, and mind you don't slip! ｜ 祝你们一路平安！走山路要小心，别摔着了！
- "Fortune slips are the manifestation of our archon's will. It is our place as mortals to respect it and do all we can." ｜ 「御神签是神明意志的体现。所以要尊重神明的意志，并且尽人所能及之力。」

- This is amazing! It tastes just like Xiangling's cooking. It's like they say: The apple didn't fall far from the tree, mmm... Wait, no, two peas in a pod! You two are like two peas in a pod. Hehe, I'm always mincing up my words when I get too excited. ｜ 太好吃啦！这厨艺简直和师姐「难舍难分」？不对，好像是「不相上下」！嘿嘿，瑶瑶一时激动，「口不择言」了。
- Then let us create a precedent for future rulers to follow. ｜ 那么，此后的王国就有先例可循了。
- A fruit and vegetable stall that can be found along the roadside of the Vasari Passage, often accompanied by grocery stores featuring metal and glass composite structures. It proudly showcases a wide variety of fresh fruits and vegetables, many of which are imported from distant lands via maritime trade. Due to stringent regulations, restrictions, and some vendors' own consideration of maintaining a good reputation, the prices of these imported items are kept relatively low. Only a small additional shipping fee is applied, ensuring they are affordable for the general public. ｜ 可见于瓦萨里回廊路边的果蔬摊，通常搭配金属玻璃复合建筑的果蔬店使用，陈列着琳琅满目的新鲜蔬果，其中不乏通过水路进口的外国品种。得益于相关法规的限制，以及某些商人出于口碑的考量，进口蔬果的价格并不昂贵，仅仅在采购成本之上分摊了少量运费，普通平民也能轻松消费。
- Got it, will do! See you later, Collei! ｜ 好的~我们记住了，再见柯莱~！
- *sob* I did not expect to be locked up in this cage... My dignity as one of the Masters of the Night-Wind is all but gone now, surely! ｜ 呜呜…没想到居然被关在这个笼子里，「烟谜主」部族成员的尊严真是荡然无存。
- Whenever Lantern Rite rolls along, the Ministry of Civil Affairs in Liyue Harbor is especially busy organizing street fairs, performances, and all sorts of other festive activities.\nMinistry officials — often rushed off their feet — can be seen dashing hither and thither, attempting to enlist the most capable members of Liyue society to contribute toward the most important festival of the year.\nIn previous years, the Chenyu Vale Artisans Association has always been happy to send their representatives to help. This year, the Ministry of Civil Affairs asked specifically for Lan Yan.\nFor Lan Yan, who grew up in the leafy confines of the vale, rarely venturing beyond its verdant slopes except to accompany her grandfather on his travels, this was her first real journey to the city.\nLike so many customers who have traveled to Chenyu Vale to seek the services of the famed rattan weaving master, those at the Ministry of Civil Affairs were shocked to discover that the master artisan whose help they sought was a fresh-faced, unimposing young woman.\nThe young artisan politely rejected the food and lodging the ministry offered, preferring to wander the city streets by herself, conversing with visitors and citizens alike — to use her own words, "This is my first time coming as far as Liyue Harbor, I'd like to find my own way around."\nShe ate her first meal in the Wanmin Restaurant, where she was taken unawares by the spicy boiled fish, and was left gulping down water to cool the fires on her tongue.\nShe then spent much of her first evening wandering Chihu Rock, before Liyue Harbor's nighttime soundscape soothed her to sleep.\nHer first conversation was with a soldier returning home from a posting to the Chasm. The soldier helped a lost Lan Yan find her bearings and, upon hearing she had come from Chenyu Vale, told her at length of the red mountains of the Chasm and played her a melodious tune.\n"The world truly is a large place," she thought.\nLiyue itself is already home to many people and places, each unique in their own way. The waters of Chenyu Vale sport gentle beauty and natural charm, the clamorous streets of Liyue Harbor burst with bustling color, and the stark landscapes of the Chasm are vast and imposing. And outside Liyue... an even larger world awaits.\nFor the first time in her life, Lan Yan desired to see more of the world, to use the rattan strands of her hometown to weave the scenes she might see there to become one with her own heart. ｜ 每逢海灯节，璃月港的总务司都会变得异常忙碌，街会、演出…种种节庆准备需人协助。\n忙得团团转的官员们不得不向各方发出邀请，寻觅璃月各地的能人来为这一年中最重要的节日出些力气。\n往年，沉玉谷手工艺工会也曾出人帮忙，今年，总务司邀请的是蓝砚。\n自小在沉玉谷长大的蓝砚不常出山，少有的几次远行也都是同爷爷一道，这次是她严格意义上的第一次远行。\n和许多慕名前往沉玉谷请藤编师制作家私的客人一样，总务司的雇员们惊讶地发现他们要接洽的大师居然是一个俏丽的小姑娘。\n年轻的大师婉拒了总务司提供的食宿，按她的说法「我第一次自己来璃月港这么远的地方，许我自己转转吧」，在璃月港的街头四处闲逛，和各种各样的人自由攀谈。\n她的第一顿饭在万民堂，被水煮鱼辣得喝了一大碗水。\n她落脚之后的第一晚，在吃虎岩逛了许久，璃月港夜间的市声伴她入眠。\n她第一个搭话的陌生人是从层岩巨渊回乡换岗的士兵，对方帮迷路的她搞清了方向，听说她从沉玉谷来之后，和她聊起了层岩巨渊红色的山峦，并为她拉奏了一曲磅礴悠扬的琴歌。\n「世界真大啊」，她这样想道。\n仅仅是璃月，就有那么多不同的风土与人情：沉玉谷的水俊秀柔美，当然是好风光；璃月港的街景五光十色，一年到头，几乎没有黯淡的时候；层岩巨渊的天与山豁达广袤，更令人遐想。不用说，在璃月之外，还有更大的世界…\n有生第一次，她打从心底希望自己能见到更多的风景，再用沉玉谷生长的藤枝把它们编入自己的心中。
- We have a spare barrel in the winery. It's a little old, but it's been specially treated for durability. You could leave it next to a Flaming Flower all day and there wouldn't be a scratch. I think that one should satisfy your needs. ｜ 庄园里有个酒桶，年份有些长了，但材质经过特殊加工，放在烈焰花边烤半天都不要紧。我猜，这个应该能满足你们的需要。
- Nights of Formal Focus ｜ 垂裳端凝之夜

- You got caught in the end. What've you to be so cocky about? ｜ 最后不还是被抓进来了，有什么好得意的。

- The preliminary work is now complete. All that's left is to help Hosseini perform some final calibrations, and you will be able to get rid of the obstacle that bars your path. ｜ 前期工作准备就绪，只要协助胡塞尼完成最后的校准工作，就有办法解决眼前的「阻碍」了。
- D—Destroy it!? That's a Statue of The Seven! As well as being a really important cultural relic, they're actually divine, too... ｜ 销、销毁？！那可是七天神像啊！不仅是很有意义的文物，而且是真正的、神灵的…

- When people meet Lisa for the first time, they often find themselves overawed by the famous alumna of the Sumeru Akademiya.\nHowever, though her attitude to life may appear at first to be one of ruthless efficiency, it is in fact better understood as a product of her incorrigibly lazy nature, which drives her to avoid troublesome issues at all costs.\nBy negotiating with Kaeya, she offloaded the job of restocking and dispensing medication to Huffman and Swan, and had Flora start sending Donna over to deliver herbs on a daily basis.\nThe only tasks that Lisa handles personally are the categorization and management of books and other documents.\nThis is the one area where Lisa feels more comfortable handling the work herself rather than delegating it. ｜ 初见丽莎的人往往会对她形成「不愧是教令院天才毕业生」的第一印象。\n但实际上，她在生活态度上与其说高效，不如说单纯是因为怕麻烦而倾向于能懒则懒。\n药剂的调配和补充用度的工作通过凯亚丢给了霍夫曼和斯万，每天的药草则是让芙萝拉差唐娜送来。\n唯独书籍跟档案的整理丽莎是必须亲力亲为的。\n只有亲自管理这些知识，丽莎才会安心。

- Ah, sorry. I'm rambling. ｜ 咳，抱歉，我一个人在这自言自语个没完。

- Well, it was a long journey, wasn't it? ｜ 说起来，还真是一段漫长的冒险呀。
- Small, multi-colored round pastries. There's a saying in Fontaine that a dessert spread without macarons is like having the many waters bereft of their source. Never mind the dessert artists in Fontainian kitchens — even dessert dilettantes on the streets know this adage by heart. ｜ 五颜六色的小小圆饼。枫丹有句俗语：甜点里若是少了马卡龙，就如同众水少了源泉。作为水之国最具代表性的甜品之一，不用说后厨的枫丹甜点师，就连街头的甜点爱好者都能将其制作方法倒背如流。
- (A board outside Wangsheng Funeral Parlor. Clients use the wooden tiles to write down their commissions, before sliding them under the crack of the door.) ｜ （往生堂用来接取委托的木板，委托人会取下木牌，写上内容，再塞进往生堂的门缝里。）
- Mr. Chaussivert, it seems you don't know the rules. I suppose that's as far as my warnings go. Farewell. ｜ …肖西韦尔先生，看来你不太懂规矩。那我的忠告也到此为止，告辞。
- About the story of the "Good Shelf"... ｜ 关于「好架子」的故事…
- ... But I did not give you your title for naught, Yasnapati. Do give praise unto my bravery more, pray. ｜ …「谒颂主」这个称号可不是白白赐予尔等的，应该多多夸赞我的勇姿才对呀。
- Our store was in a special situation, and Leah was supposed to be inspecting me, but I already knew the entire safety manual by heart. ｜ 我们店铺的情况比较特殊，原本应该由蕾娅来考察我，但我早就把整本安全手册背下来了。
- Fading Star's Might ｜ 熄星能量
- So, tell me about the ice. ｜ 关于那些冰…
- Haha... I kind of confused myself, honestly. I'm used to hearing that kind of talk in Ritou, so I guess I picked up a few things. ｜ 哈哈…老实说我也不太明白，不过在离岛的时候天天听惯了，也就随口说出来了。
- You are... ｜ 你是…
- If you see Mr. Nizam sighing slightly more than usual, it's a normal occurrence. ｜ 如果你看到尼扎姆先生比平时更喜欢唉声叹气，是正常现象。
- The Soup Kitchen needs two helpers to handle odd jobs. The salary is 1,120 Mora per day and paid out daily. Lunch and dinner included. ｜ 施粥铺最近缺两个打杂的，工资一千一百二十摩拉一天日结，包午饭和晚饭。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- (Traveling alone is so boring. I wish I had a buddy here to liven things up.) ｜ （好无聊啊，就没点有趣的事吗？）
- He doesn't like to abide by the rules and always gets himself in trouble. ｜ 平藏这孩子从小就不喜欢受规矩束缚，总是搞出些麻烦。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Available right away ｜ 初始可用
- Don't worry about the chest. I'll carry it over! ｜ 宝箱您不用费心，我给您搬到庄里去！
- Under normal circumstances, only the consciousness can enter, but there is a way to go there in person. ｜ 通常情况下，那里只允许我们的意识进入，但也存在将人完全送进去的做法。
- A hot air balloon carrying cargo seems to have been targeted by monsters. Stop the monsters from seizing the cargo and escort the hot air balloon safely to its destination. ｜ 一架用来运输物资的热气球似乎被魔物盯上了。不能让魔物夺取物资，护送这架热气球安全抵达目的地。
- A reliquary used to hold artifacts. May the one who sees it be blessed.\n\nEach reliquary will grant an artifact from the following sets:\n·Long Night's Oath\n·Finale of the Deep Galleries ｜ 收纳圣遗物的圣物匣。愿见者可以感受圣迹。\n\n每个圣物匣中，能获得以下圣遗物套装中的一件：\n·「长夜之誓」\n·「深廊终曲」
- Take your pick from this selection. All Master's own handiwork, so you won't find any second-rate items here. ｜ 请从这些里挑选吧。这些都是师父打的，他的手艺绝对不会有残次品。

- He's the White Glove. That's all you have to know. ｜ 他是「白手套」。知道这个就行了。
- It can be anything you want. Just imagine — it's your birthday, you're blowing out the candles, and your wish is... ｜ 对，什么都可以。想象一下，如果今天是你的生日，在吹蜡烛的时候你会许下什么愿望？
- Well, guess we've done our jobs for the day. Let's head back, Jinwu should know what it was we found... ｜ 嗯…手头的事情完成了，我们回营地吧？瑾武姐应该会知道我们遇到的是什么…
- Seems like a bird nicked it... ｜ 好像被鸟衔走了…
- Increases the pulling speed of <color=#FFD780FF>Gale Blade</color> after holding for more than 1s, and increases the DMG dealt by 40%. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>风压剑</color>长按超过1秒后，提升牵引速度，并使造成的伤害提升40%。
- I... feel so sad, Nana. ｜ 娜娜，我好难过。
- "This is the final action scene. Everyone, give it your best!"\nThe stage for the final battle is set, and the Kameras are ready to roll. The most unique scene in this experimental film is about to be wrapped up! ｜ 「这是最后一幕动作戏。各部门打起精神来！」\n终极一战的舞台已经铺设完成，留影机也已准备妥当——实验映影中最独特的镜头即将拍摄完成！
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- Try out the jar-smashing challenge I've constructed! I set this location up to train myself, but I wouldn't mind letting you have a go. ｜ 来试试看我准备的击罐挑战吧！这片场地原本是我为了锻炼自己准备的，借你用用也没什么问题。
- Well, Paimon was providing running commentary. That takes energy too! ｜ 我也有一路陪你说话嘛，说话也是会消耗能量的。
- As long as Arashakun has "courage," Arashakun won't be scared no matter how many "masked monsters" come! They will never steal "courage" again! Arashakun won't allow that! ｜ 只要有「勇气」，不管来多少「毛毛脸面具怪兽」，兰沙恭都不会害怕啦！我不会让它们再偷走「勇气」！

- Uh, n—no thanks... ｜ 不、不用了…

- Haha, that's for sure. Just wait to read my thank-you note. ｜ 哈哈，那是当然，你就等着看我的致谢吧。
- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 5 rapid strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash 2 rapid sword strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多五段的连续剑击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，瞬间向前方挥出两剑。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。

- G—Ghost! A talking ghost! ｜ 呜哇，有鬼！鬼说话了？！

- Does that mean I can come to you when I need healing, too? ｜ 那以后我也能来找芭芭拉治疗吗？
- As ill-luck would have it, that lab accident also sunk the hydrology observation station here. Fortunately, my colleagues and I were doing a study somewhere else at the time, so we weren't hurt. ｜ 很不巧，这边的水文观测站，也在那次实验事故中被炸沉了。万幸，我和我的同事们当时正在别的地方考察，才没有因此受伤。
- So you came here all on your own? What about those followers of yours? ｜ 你一个人来的？你的那些信徒们呢，怎么没带在身边？
- Paimon wants to come! Festivals here have loads of tasty snacks too, right? Oh, and fun and games? Hee-hee! ｜ 要去要去！祭典上肯定有很多好吃的吧？还有好玩的，嘿嘿！
- Yeah—! W—Wait, how did it end up like this so quickly? ｜ 噫——！怎、怎么一下子变成这样啦！
- Fresh flowers not only look and smell amazing, but they also make delicious pastries! The flavor is refreshing, but not too sweet. Ah, and it goes so well with a pot of floral tea... Ooh, let's go flower-picking right now! No need to bring a basket — I'll just weave one once we're in the mountains! ｜ 新鲜的花不仅好看好闻，做成糕饼还很好吃！清新不甜腻，再泡上一壶花茶…唔…走吧，一起去采花？不用找花篮啦，去到山里我现编一个。

- Petrichor is a romantic, idyllic place. People respect custom and are customarily polite and friendly to outside guests. ｜ 佩特莉可镇是个浪漫的地方，人们遵守传统，对于外来的客人——大多数时候是友好而礼貌的。

- Oh, yeah, yeah, yeah, and Aoi, too! Hey, wait up... ｜ 啊对对对，还有葵老板呢！嘿，等等我啊——
- An intricately-designed wine vessel that a world-famous martial artist once drank from. ｜ 精致的酒壶，曾经是名震天下的武人载酒的容器。
- He said that he shouldn't really be handing out free prescriptions since, and I quote, "it goes against generations of tradition handed down by our forebears." But he just felt like it was the right thing to do... What a great guy. ｜ 用他的话来说，这可是「违背祖宗的决定」，要不我怎么说白老先生是好人呢。
- I am Chiori, the owner of Chioriya Boutique. Feel free to find me if you'd like to commission any tailor-made outfits. As for any other requests, it all depends on whether you have enough to offer in exchange. Just the rules of the "business" — you scratch my back, and I'll scratch yours. Also, smoking, drinking, and causing a ruckus are all strictly prohibited within the Boutique. That whole "the customer is king" concept doesn't fly here... And even when royalty does come into the shop, if they don't adhere to the rules, they'll find themselves being tossed out and kissing the pavement just like anyone else. ｜ 我叫千织，「千织屋」的老板。有服装定制类需求的话，欢迎找我。其他需求，就看你有没有足够用来交换的东西了，有来有回才叫「生意」嘛。另外，「千织屋」内严禁抽烟喝酒，寻衅闹事。「顾客即是神明」那一套在我这里不管用，就算来的真是神明，不守规矩被丢出去的时候，也一样是屁股着地。

- I've witnessed your skills before. Another demonstration will prove to be a great inspiration, I'm sure of it! ｜ 您的身手我早有见识。如果能看见您施展拳脚，我肯定能找到更多，更好的灵感！
- Hurls a Lightning Stiletto that annihilates her opponents like the swift thunder.\nWhen the Stiletto hits its target, it deals <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color> to opponents in a small AoE, and places a Stiletto Mark on the spot hit.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Hold</color>\nHold to adjust the direction in which the Stiletto shall be thrown.\nStilettos thrown by the Hold attack mode can be suspended in mid-air, allowing Keqing to jump to them when using Stellar Restoration a second time.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Lightning Stiletto</color>\n If Keqing uses Stellar Restoration again or uses a Charged Attack while its duration lasts, it will clear the Stiletto Mark and produce different effects:\n·If she uses Stellar Restoration again, she will blink to the location of the Mark and unleash one slashing attack that deals <color=#FFACFFFF>AoE Electro DMG</color>. When blinking to a Stiletto that was thrown from a Holding attack, Keqing can leap across obstructing terrain.\n·If Keqing uses a Charged Attack, she will ignite a series of thundering cuts at the Mark's location, dealing <color=#FFACFFFF>AoE Electro DMG</color>.\n\n<i>"Humans are like moths, endlessly chasing the flame we call gods and adepti. But this light that I have here is my own."</i> ｜ 迅速投出雷楔，以疾雷之势歼敌。\n雷楔命中时会对小范围内的敌人造成<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>，并在命中的位置留下雷楔标记。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>长按</color>\n长按以调整雷楔标记投掷的方向。\n通过长按投出的雷楔，可以悬浮在空中，并使刻晴再次施放星斗归位时跨越地形。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>雷楔</color>\n在雷楔的持续期间内，刻晴再次施放星斗归位或施展重击时，会清除雷楔标记并造成不同的效果：\n·再次施放星斗归位时，瞬移到标记处进行一次斩击，造成<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素范围伤害</color>。瞬移至长按投掷的雷楔处时，可以跨越地形障碍；\n·施展重击时，在标记处引发雷暴连斩，造成数次<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n<i>「人像是蛾子，总奔着名叫神仙的火光而去。但是我这光是自己点的。」</i>

- Sister is angry, so Arachatora is keeping a piece of "Head Mushroom," till the Sunsettia ripens ten times. ｜ 妹妹生气了，所以我要留下一片「一头菇」，直到日落果成熟十次。

- Visitor's Message ｜ 游客留言
- O stars high above the wasteland;\nO nightingales weary from the day;\nIt's time to take off the crown of roses;\nCleanse yourself with wine made from grapes.\nSleep, close your eyes;\nYon golden slumber summons thee, wandering sand;\nDrink not that bitter salt water;\nFor the sorrows of tomorrow have gone away. ｜ 群星升起在荒原之上，\n夜莺也厌倦了时日的无穷，\n是时候摘下蔷薇的冠冕，\n洗去俗世的尘土，用葡萄的酒浆。\n睡吧，睡吧，\n黄金的梦乡在召唤流浪的沙子，\n在这里不必将那苦涩的盐水掬饮，\n在这里不会再有明日的愁肠。
- Gladly. ｜ 乐意效劳。

- Per my grandfather's last wishes, the Temple of Silence should submit to whoever possesses the largest number of Hermanubis fragments. That entitles you to be our new leader, Cyno. ｜ 按照爷爷的遗愿，缄默之殿将归顺拥有最多赫曼努比斯之力的人统帅，赛诺，你应该成为新一任首领。
- The aquabus is now entering Poisson Tunnel! Everyone should now be able to see the light from the aquabus more clearly. Beautiful, isn't it? ｜ 现在「巡轨船」进入了「白淞隧道」，大家可以更清楚地看到「巡轨船」发出的灯光了，很漂亮吧！
- It looks like you're doing well, but we've encountered a hiccup — Madame Madeleine and Kevin's father are both members of the Fatui. ｜ 看来你们挺顺利的，不过我们遇到了一点小麻烦——马德莱娜夫人和凯万的爸爸，居然都是愚人众的一员…

- Sara, we'd like to ask about the Kaedehara Clan's property that was seized by the Tenryou Commission. Do you know where all their belongings are now? ｜ 裟罗，我们想问问你，万叶家当时被天领奉行查抄后，里面的东西现在还能找到吗？
- Wow! A new trick! ｜ 哇！有新魔术看啦！
- A cake made from flowers. Prepared with Qingxin petals still glistening with their morning dew, the filling is wrapped in many layers consisting of two different types of pastry — a flaky crust and a buttery dough. Baked to perfection, Qingxin Flower Cakes are best enjoyed fresh from the oven. ｜ 花朵制成的糕点。取带有晨露的清心花瓣制成馅，一层层裹上酥与油两种饼皮，烤制而成。刚刚出炉的清心花饼最为美味。
- My thinking was that only people who pre-order the chess set at full price will be eligible to receive the limited-edition Traveler chess piece. ｜ 我的想法是，只有全价预定这套棋戏的玩家，才有资格获得你的这枚棋子。
- That must be the Fatui tunnel over there. We should steer clear and approach from the side. ｜ 那边应该是愚人众的行动通道。避开他们，我们从侧面潜入。

- Shall I help share the load? ｜ 需要我帮你收纳吗？
- Uh... *cough*... This, well... ｜ 呃…咳咳…这…
- A finely crafted weapon rack made from premium quality stone, carefully selected by the artisan who made it. Adorned with exquisite metal fittings, it is primarily used for displaying weapons, and can be found in the Temple of Pax within the Stadium of the Sacred Flame.\nIt is said that some of the weapons on the Temple of Pax's weapon wall once belonged to warriors who achieved great fame in past competitions. For these warriors, their weapons were not just companions in battle, but extensions of their very souls. And given the fiery nature of their spirits, perhaps the best place for their honor to reside is within the Stadium grounds, where their legacy endures... ｜ 由工匠精心挑选的优质石材雕琢而成的武器架，其上装饰有极为精美的金属配饰，主要用于展示武器成品，可见于圣火竞技场的帕克斯神庙。\n据说，在帕克斯神庙的武器墙上，有一部分武器来自于那些曾在比赛中名声大噪的选手。这些武器，对于它们的主人来说，不仅仅是战斗中的伙伴，更是他们的第二生命。而对于这些战士的热血而言，将自己的荣誉与竞技场共存，或许就是最好的归宿吧…
- No, you simply gave suggestions. I was the one who decided to follow through. Anis, too, was only following my instructions. ｜ 不，你只不过是提了意见，最后采纳的人还是我。阿尼斯也只是遵照我的意思行动。
- Windtrace Coin bonus for attaining "So Close, but So Far" ｜ 达成「功败垂成」的「迷踪币」加成
- Everyone clearly liked my hero stories at first, so why are they rarely coming to hear them now? ｜ 明明大家一开始都很喜欢我讲的英雄故事，为什么渐渐都不来听了呢？
- I'm Phonia, Investigative Team Signals Officer, and I'm responsible for testing alchemical detection equipment. This is my colleague, Investigative Team Weapons Officer Ematol, who has a... shall we say, rather unique interest in explosives. ｜ 我是调查小队的信号官方妮雅，负责试验炼金探测设备。她是我的同僚，武器官艾玛托，对爆炸物有着…独特的嗜好。
- I'll take the foot of the mountains. ｜ 去山底。
- *sigh* Ah, I really wanna be the captain... ｜ 哎呀，我还想做船长呢…
- ... ｜ ……
- Although, it would be more accurate to say that there is a certain level of prejudice involved... But, I don't intend to clear that up just yet. Prejudice has a funny way of concealing the real truth behind certain things — an attribute that I find to be quite advantageous. ｜ 严格来讲，算是某种偏见。我暂时不打算澄清，偏见会将真相包裹起来，对我来说是一件好事。
- Find the annotated books in the House of Daena. ｜ 在智慧宫翻阅留有笔记的书。
- Gorou's outfit. This light armor is designed to allow the marksman-general Gorou to handle his bow with ease. The armoring at the shoulder and elbow is also designed with this in mind. ｜ 五郎的装扮款式。为使神射将军五郎御弓灵便而打造的轻铠，肩头与肘部护有甲片，便于控弦。
- Hydro Crystal: <color=#e09800>Radical Deconstruction</color> ｜ 水晶·<color=#e09800>极限瓦解</color>
- Now that you're following me, you'd better grasp that as early as possible, Pale Floater. ｜ 白飘飘既然跟随吾之道路，也应该早日明白这个道理才是。
- Guess I didn't receive the favor of the gods, after all... ｜ 我果然，没在被神明注视着啊…
- The important thing about going on a trip is to enjoy yourself! You don't have to think so hard. ｜ 出远门玩，最重要的是尽兴啊，别想那么多。
- ... ｜ …
- Speaking of which, it's probably time we got going. Thank you for having us. ｜ 话说回来，我们叨扰了这么久，也该告辞了。
- You need ores? Head in this direction and you'll find them. ｜ 你需要矿石？那往这个方向走就能找到了。
- Nzaya and I will follow you there, but we won't take part in any fighting — not unless you end up in real trouble... ｜ 我和妮扎娅会跟着，但是不参与战斗。只有「你们」去面对那些怪物。除非你们遇到危险，不然我不会出手…

- ...Well, and his ears aren't all too good either. ｜ …另外，重佐叔叔的耳朵不太好呢。

Based on the number of them you've helped, your ATK is increased by up to an additional <color=#99FFFFFF>15%</color>. ｜ 攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>15%</color>。不仅如此！海沫村中曾蒙你帮助的美露莘们的声援心意充满了力量，依照她们的数目，攻击力至多进一步提升<color=#99FFFFFF>15%</color>。
- Wow! The water really is draining away! ｜ 哦哦！水真的流走了！
- The Tenryou Commission is heavily guarded. Be careful when you get near. Let's meet back here afterwards. ｜ 天领奉行附近的守卫很多，你们靠近的时候务必小心。之后我们再在这里碰面吧。
- If not for you, I'd be in mortal danger for sure! ｜ 要不是幸有你们相救，我这条命可就危险了。
- <color=#FFE14BFF>Hunting Traps</color> cannot attract boars, but boars tend to avoid people and run away in the exact opposite direction. Use this to your advantage to ensnare them with the traps to get more raw meat. ｜ <color=#FFE14BFF>狩猎陷阱</color>无法吸引野猪，但野猪会往远离角色的方向逃走。可以利用这一点，驱逐野猪接触陷阱，获得更多的兽肉。

- The next time this character acts, they will immediately use the Skill <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S35025]</color>.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>While preparing this Skill:</color> Grant the character to which this is attached 2 $[K6] points. Meanwhile, if the character takes <color=#80C0FFFF>{SPRITE_PRESET#2102}Hydro</color>/<color=#FF9999FF>{SPRITE_PRESET#2103}Pyro</color>/<color=#99FFFFFF>{SPRITE_PRESET#2101}Cryo</color>/<color=#FFACFFFF>{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}Electro</color> DMG, $[S35025] will deal +1 DMG and its DMG type will be converted to the corresponding Element as well. ｜ 本角色将在下次行动时，直接使用技能：<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[S35025]</color>。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>准备$[S35025]期间：</color>提供2点$[K6]，保护所附属角色；如果所附属角色受到了<color=#80C0FFFF>{SPRITE_PRESET#2102}水</color>/<color=#FF9999FF>{SPRITE_PRESET#2103}火</color>/<color=#99FFFFFF>{SPRITE_PRESET#2101}冰</color>/<color=#FFACFFFF>{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}雷</color>元素伤害，就使所准备的$[S35025]造成的伤害+1，并且转换为对应的元素类型。
- Ha! I knew this dirty dog would come for the treasure if he heard about the news. And I got him! ｜ 哼哼，老子是猜到这狗老贼看到了外面传的消息，会来找宝藏！果然被老子逮到了！

- A perfume must undergo a series of tests before it's released, including a shelf-life test. This can help answer several questions: How long does the product last? Is it prone to deterioration? Will it become toxic or even dissipate over time?\nHuh, now that I think about it... Wouldn't it be nice if there were a way of doing a shelf-life test for interpersonal relationships? ｜ 一款香水在出品前，需要经历一系列测试，其中一项便是闲置试验。它能存放多久，是否容易变质，会不会在一段时间后产生有毒物质，或者直接消散殆尽？\n话说到这里，有没有觉得人与人之间的关系也需要这种检验呢？

Ah, if only our dear former comrade Erge were here!" ｜ 「各位！还记得主屋的遗训吗？今天在矿里，我发现了大概是前矿主留下的线索。里面说红叶萋萋什么的。鸿老爷子不愧是文化人，我一点也看不懂！如果二哥还在就好了！」

- "Lively festivals — my favorite activity! You know what? The more I think about it, the more it seems like Amakane Island's the best choice for such a scene!" ｜ 「热闹的祭典是我最喜欢的活动，有位枫丹作者和我观点一致，在小说里写到了以祭典为原型的异国盛会。」\n「男女主角相约共同赴会，在暮色下相见的场景，在读者之中有着相当高的人气，很适合当成封面。」\n「想来想去，还是甘金岛最适合作为这一幕的原型呢！」

This attack deals Physical and Pyro DMG.\nAdditional Elemental Orbs will drop during the trial event challenge to facilitate the testing of the trial character's Elemental Burst. ｜ 辛焱在释放元素战技时会挥舞乐器，并依据命中敌人数量制造不同级别的火元素护盾。\n最高级别的护盾甚至可以持续对周围的敌人造成火元素伤害。\n她的元素爆发会字面意思的爆发出音波及炙热的烈焰，对敌人造成物理与火元素的伤害。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。
