- Tighnari starts to recover after getting some water... ｜ 提纳里喝完水后，稍微清醒了一些…
- Accumulate a total of {param0} points in "Xtreme Drive" during the "Roses and Muskets" event ｜ 在「蔷薇与铳枪」活动的「极限驱策法」玩法中，累计获取{param0}得分
- I am still very much in good standing as the Tianshu today. Nevertheless, I wish to pass on the position before my mental acuity begins to decline beyond redemption. ｜ 虽然大家都说我德高望重，但我也想趁自己还没老糊涂，把天枢星的位置交接出去。
- Speaking of value, the most logical would be Mora, of course. Ah, I'll just put some Mora in there... ｜ 说到价值，那最直观的当然就是摩拉了，唔…我多放点摩拉好了…
- Amazing! What an achievement! ｜ 太棒了！真厉害啊！
- Of Settled Thoughts ｜ 识见沉降之地
- Worry not. My Yasnapati has already taught them the lesson they deserve. ｜ 无需担心，吾之「谒颂主」已经让他们吃到了当吃的教训。
- Thank you. ｜ 谢谢你。
- Wh—What I meant was... I am not an official Knight of Favonius. I'm just a knight-in-training currently serving as a maid... ｜ 其实…我还不是正式的西风骑士，只是在西风骑士团见习的女仆…
- "This affliction may cause hallucinations or mental breakdowns and is extremely dangerous to those infected." ｜ 「此类疾病会让患者错认事实，进入一种类似于精神崩溃的状态，对患者个人十分危险。」
- Gain the most valued treasure of a great pirate from the ramblings of drunkards. ｜ 从酒醉的狂言中，寻到大海贼最宝贵的遗产。
- Hmm, the ore... ｜ …矿石？
- Little Mao ｜ 小茂
- #Of course, this could be because {M#he}{F#she} is so powerful that the capsule's contents were unable to produce a substantial increase. ｜ #当然出现这种结果，也有可能是因为{M#他}{F#她}的实力很强，罐装知识的内容已经无法产生有效提升了。
- Talk to Vile ｜ 与薇尔对话
- A murder involving firearms... But not that many people use those in Fontaine, right? ｜ 铳枪杀人…我记得枫丹用铳枪的人很少啊。
- I've been very fortunate to be well cared for by all the people in my life. I refuse to forget that. My feelings were so strong, they overrode my compulsion to sacrifice myself for their safety. ｜ 我蒙受过太多人的恩惠，无法接受就这么忘却一切，甚至舍弃我必须「奉献」的使命。
- Lights Will Guide You Home (I) ｜ 烁光引路人·其一
- ...If only you were an official Knight. We could definitely use more able hands like yours. ｜ …如果你是骑士团正式成员就好了，希望骑士团未来能有更多像你这样能干的人。
- #A real adventure is not only filled with challenges, but also with unknowns. The most important thing is to come back from completing those challenges and unknowns in one piece, and gain something in the end as well. Isn't that right, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #真正的冒险，不但充满挑战，而且还充满了未知。能从挑战和未知当中走出来，并且有所收获，才是最重要的嘛！对吧，{NICKNAME}？
- These Fravashi Trees are Pari that fought till the very end against the defilement that had been corrupting the land. Using the last remnants of their power, they transformed into this state that you see now. ｜ 这些「灵谷木」便是那些与侵害大地的污秽战斗到最后一刻的花灵，用尽最后的力量所化。
- But we didn't see anything scary after activating the device. Why's that? ｜ 明明我们开启机关后，并没有发生可怕事的啊？为什么呢？
- Maybe you truly did wield the power to rival the Shogun's light when first forged. But the long journey from Snezhnaya back to Inazuma has left you battered and broken. ｜ 就算你被锻造出来的时候确实拥有匹敌天光的能力，但从至冬国抵达稻妻的漫长旅途已经让你残破不堪。
- You have the four Spirit Pearls. It's time to report your progress to Tsuyuko. ｜ 既然已经取得四枚「御灵珠」，是时候向露子回报成果了。
- "The little dog laughed to see such fun, and the dish ran away with the spoon." ｜ 「狗儿欢笑，盘子跟着勺子跑。」
- Plunge DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param6:F1P}
- "Surging Harmonies of the Springs" ｜ 「流泉的涌浪和声」
- Xinyue Kiosk Ad ｜ 新月轩广告
- We should get going. But let's come back here and make an offering sometime. ｜ 我们也走吧？等以后有空了，再来上柱香吧。
- It's just like the detectives from those Fontaine crime novels — always embroiled in intrigue wherever they go. ｜ 就像是枫丹侦探小说，主角不管走到哪里都能惹一大堆事情上身。
- I have things to do now. Goodbye. ｜ 我手里还有其他委托，就先告辞了。
- About Beidou ｜ 关于北斗…
- Ah! A Secret Source Servant... Huh. Is it just Paimon, or is this one bigger than the others? ｜ 啊，秘源龙仆…咦，这只是不是比别的要大上一圈？
- Everyone living in Liyue Harbor has to abide by the rules. Those who do so will see their interests protected, while those who violate the rules will be punished accordingly.\nThe rules are rooted in ancient laws set down by Morax, Liyue Harbor's divine protector, and they are absolute. Over the millennia, each Tianquan has introduced amendments to the rules to ensure they are well aligned with current societal needs.\nThe laws are compiled and published along with a 279-page commentary, and a copy is given to each citizen of Liyue.\nNingguang likes it this way: Law and order is good for business, and she understands the intricacies of the laws that forge the order better than anyone else.\nHowever, there was a certain ship captain by the name of Beidou who acted with flagrant disregard for the rules, smuggling contraband goods by leveraging her exotic cargo and exclusive business intelligence. To Ningguang, captain Beidou was the black sheep of Liyue Harbor's business community.\nAs Tianquan, it fell to Ningguang to impose heavy fines on Beidou each time she transgressed the rules. But much to her consternation, Beidou seemed to take these fines in her stride, like water off a duck's back.\nOutside of the official channels, too, Ningguang tried to find ways to implore Beidou to change her ways and stop putting the Qixing in such a difficult position. In response, Beidou simply explained away her actions as "enacting justice," "helping the poor" and "keeping the sailors in their jobs." As a firm believer in the principle of live and let live, Beidou had no time for Ningguang's advice.\nIn the end, Ningguang agreed to disagree and gave up trying to convince the stubborn Beidou to change. ｜ 生活在璃月，人人都需按规则出牌。规则会保护他们的利益不受侵犯，相应地，违规之人也将受到惩罚。\n这些规则源自璃月守护神「摩拉克斯」制订的古老律法，绝对可靠。璃月数千年历史中，历任「天权」对每条律法逐一修订，使其符合璃月不同阶段的社会需求。这些古老律法被整合成册，附带一本两百七十九页的注释，发放到所有璃月人手中。\n凝光喜欢这样的璃月港。井然的秩序能让商业更具活力，而她又比任何人都更理解秩序的细节。\n唯独一位名为「北斗」的船长，仗着她珍奇的货物与独一无二的商业情报，屡次视律法于不顾，出海私运禁货。在凝光眼中，她是璃月港的「害群之马」。\n身为「天权」，凝光对北斗的违规行为向来予以重罚。可北斗总是坦然接受，让凝光稍感意外。\n规矩之外，她私下也不断旁敲侧击，暗示北斗改变行事方式，为七星留下转圜余地。北斗却一直用「路见不平」、「扶危济困」及「养活船队」等理由敷衍搪塞，永远我行我素，对凝光的提点置若罔闻。\n久而久之，除了一句「油盐不进」，凝光对这位船长再无其他评价。
- Martial Artist's Water Hourglass ｜ 武人的水漏
- This is Varesa's orchard... Must keep safe. No bad people or saurians allowed in. ｜ 这里是，瓦雷莎的果园。要努力保护好，不可以让很坏的人和很坏的龙进去。
- Startle not, human. This was my calling from the beginning. ｜ 不必惊叹，人类。这原本即是吾命定之事。
- Eh? You're... the one who snuck onto the ship, right? I could hear Uncle Juza yelling from halfway across the ship. ｜ 咦？你是…刚刚闯到船上的那个人吧，我隔着老远都听着重佐叔叔的大嗓门啦。
- Surf, Turf, and Perch ｜ 山与海与天空
- Oh, Paimon, you're just as carefree and enthusiastic as ever. Well, it's about time for me to get into character. As a contestant, I need to go and get ready for the tournament... ｜ 派蒙还是和以前一样无忧无虑，满是干劲呢。那我差不多也该进入我的角色啦。作为参赛选手，我要去做赛前准备了…
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Ah, how you worry your old Granny! *sigh* I don't know what's happened lately, but it feels like there's fewer and fewer people on this island every day... ｜ 真是让奶奶担心坏了…唉，最近不知发生了什么，岛上的人越来越少了…
- ...Let's see if we can find any clues nearby. ｜ …我们找找看有没有线索吧。
- Huh? I have and I liked it, but... How should I put it? The plot seems a little strange lately. ｜ 咦？看过倒是看过，之前我还挺喜欢的呢，不过…怎么说呢，最近的剧情好像略略有些奇怪。
- "Why not go out and walk around a bit more? Even if just to read The Steambird or something?" ｜ 「我觉得你们要不然多出门走走？哪怕多看看《蒸汽鸟报》什么的？」
- Ah, yes, yes. The artisan from the Children of Echoes has yet to mention the matter to me, probably because the young girl from the Masters of the Night-Wind is absent. ｜ 我已知晓，我已知晓，回声之子的工匠未向我提及此事，大概是因为烟谜主的少女并不在此地。
- Ancient Name Scholar ｜ 古名学者
- Huitztlan Campground: Distribution Hub ｜ 悬木营地-「集散中心」
- Alright. Well, my sincere thanks to you all. I will never forget your kindness. ｜ 好，那就多谢几位了，我一定不会忘记这份恩情。
- We have yet to ascertain their precise location, but the Knights of Favonius are on their trail. ｜ 目前尚不确定魔物的行踪，骑士团正派人排查。
- Thank you, both of you, for not holding a grudge. I made two copies of the formula as I promised, as my apology. ｜ 还要再次感谢两位恩人，感谢你们不计前嫌…我把配方复制了两份，就和之前说好的一样，作为道歉的诚意交给你们。
- It's "salary." ｜ 是「报酬」。
- Calm down! Everyone j—just calm down now! ｜ 冷静，总之先冷静！冷冷冷冷静啊！！
- "Tatarasuna." ｜ 「踏鞴砂」。
- The tragedy of mortals is to lack self-knowledge, and that of the youkai is the lack of any such tragic troubles. —Tanuki Historical Commentary ｜ 凡人之可悲，正在于其不自知。至于妖怪嘛，总是缺乏此种悲哀的烦恼。——狸史氏评
- While you two were busy with the shop, I was talking with Freda about some possible ways to make the business more efficient. ｜ 其实在你们忙着开店的同时，我和芙里达讨论了一下提升经营效率的事情。
- It's uncommon that a Spantamad researcher is able to create such an intricate machine. If he were still around, we could probably chat the day away. What a shame... ｜ 身为素论派的学者，却能完成这么精妙的机关。要是他还在，或许会和我很聊得来吧，真是可惜了…
- You idiot! The audience won't be able to understand what's going on if the competition becomes too complicated! ｜ 笨蛋！比赛搞得太复杂的话，肯定更难看懂，观众也会很累的！
- So it wasn't "you" who wanted to climb the mountain? ｜ 不是你自己想爬吗？
- Of Thorns and Crowns ｜ 荆棘与勋冠
- The Bloomguard, Sorush — renowned among the Pari. All children of the desert know your name. ｜ 尊贵而伟大的花灵，沙漠之子无人不识你们的名字。更何况是名为斯露莎的勇者呢？
- Ten spikes of Wheat... We can make something delicious out of that for sure! ｜ 整整十份小麦…应该能做出很好吃的东西了。
- Your Excellency! ｜ 珊瑚宫大人！
- Gorou's Troubles ｜ 五郎的烦恼…
- Finish the "film" ｜ 完成「映影」制作
- Yes, that is one way to look at it. You restored a Phlogiston Unit that had been corrupted by the Abyss. Only then could I extract anything from it... ｜ 是的，可以这么视为，原本被深渊侵蚀的「单位燃素」被你们恢复，才能被我提取…
- Chef Mao would like to treat you to a meal... ｜ 关于卯师傅的问题…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Youko ｜ 狐妖
- And we won't find out what this "journey" is or where it will end unless we keep going! ｜ 「旅途」是什么，「终点」又是什么，还等着我们去见证呢。
- It isn't maneuverable enough... ｜ 机动性太差劲了…
- Abhi, have you seen Miss Inayah? ｜ 艾贝，你看到阿娜耶姐姐了吗？
- Wonder who left it behind? ｜ 不知是谁遗弃的锋利爪钩
- Don't spill them all into the water. ｜ 你可别把颜料倒进水里哦。
- Energy Cost|{param5:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param5:I}
- Look at those scales, could those mean... ｜ 那个天平，难道就是…
- Hahaha, I'm just standing in for Mr. Alvard while he's off restocking the shop. ｜ 哈哈哈，埃尔瓦德大哥去进货了，这时候一般就让我来守摊子。
- Really? Is he okay? ｜ 真的吗？他没事吗？
- Alright, let's snap off that plank and go search for the other half of the ship! ｜ 拿下来之后，我们就快点去找另外半截船吧。
- Specifically, the hot springs in the cave to the north of our settlement — I'm sure you know the one. Apparently, she used to go there a lot before they became abandoned for some reason. ｜ 就是部族北边山洞里那个，你应该有印象吧？据说阿伽娅以前经常去，后来因为一些原因荒废了。
- Asami ｜ 麻美
- Charged Attack DMG Bonus|{param5:F1P} Max HP ｜ 重击伤害提升|{param5:F1P}生命值上限
- Azure Obsidian Ring ｜ 湛蓝曜石环
- #But you should know that {NICKNAME} isn't just any ordinary adventurer. {F#She's}{M#He's} an Honorary Knight of the Knights of Favonius! ｜ #要知道，{NICKNAME}可不是一般的冒险家，{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}还是西风骑士团的「荣誉骑士」呢！
- Perhaps. ｜ 或许吧。
- So... What exactly happened? ｜ 请问到底发生了什么？
- So you two are gonna head over? ｜ 你们两位也去？
- Complete "The Outlander Who Caught the Wind" ｜ 完成「捕风的异乡人」剧情
- "...I still need to make up an excuse for the boss. Hmm. I know! I'll just say that I found the treasure, but it was completely empty! It was all a load of tripe made up to trick fools by a bunch of stinkin', stupid liars..." ｜ 「…得编个理由跟老大汇报，就说宝箱已经找到了，里面空空如也，都是那群蠢货骗人…」
- From the moment he stole the Vision, I decided to use him for this experiment. ｜ 从察觉到他在偷那颗神之眼的时候起，我就决定用他来做这场「实验」了。
- Bye. ｜ 再见。
- Mona hasn't paid her rent, you say? ｜ 咦？莫娜还没交房租吗？
- Night Vigil's Harvest ｜ 夜巡之获

---
### Part 137

- Meh, we'll figure it out — just don't forget about the commission when we're done here. ｜ 总之，别把那份委托给忘了就行。
- Well, don't worry. Take your time — just let me know when you're ready. ｜ 那您接着准备吧，准备好了和我说一声就行。
- An hourglass used to keep time during a band performance. It once made a crisp sound, but their performance has since ended. ｜ 为乐团的演奏计时的沙漏，曾发出利落的声响。如今他们的表演已经落幕。
- Alright. Big shame, though... ｜ 好吧，真是可惜…
- I'm no amateur with border spells, but Sanhaj is in a league of his own. ｜ 虽然奶奶我的边界法术也不差，但比桑哈杰还差得远。
- #{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Click}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} Ready and wait for other players. Co-Op challenge will be automatically abandoned if not confirmed in {0} second(s). ｜ 点击准备等待其他玩家，{0}秒内不确认将自动解散挑战
- Obtain 150 Challenge Coins in total ｜ 累计获得150枚「挑战币」
- So, the next problem we need to solve is cost-effectiveness and accuracy. I'm not sure what to do right now, but I'll keep working on it — in the name of the Spark Knight! ｜ 所以，下一步要解决的问题就是性价比和精准度了！虽然我现在还完全不知道该怎么做，但我会加倍努力的！为了火花骑士大人！
- Get the invoices ｜ 拿到货单
- Mr. Zhongli was kind enough to help me with directions. I'm thankful. ｜ 多亏热心的钟离先生帮忙指路。
- Awesome! Thanks to that beam cannon, the Abyss around here should be all cleaned up! ｜ 好，谢谢光线炮，这里的深渊应该就全部被清理干净了吧！
- Ugh, Paimon just wanted to apologize, but now she's putting more and more of her foot in her mouth... Really, Paimon just got a little mad, since we thought, well... you were going to leave us out to dry... ｜ 我只是想道歉，结果好像越说越错。我…我是觉得你不会来了，就…一气之下…
- We're not picky about our destination. When we can't decide where to go next, we'll pick up a stick, head over to a Statue of the Pyro Archon, then spin it around on the ground — and whichever way it points is where we go. ｜ 我们对目的地没什么所谓，想不出去哪探险的时候，就在神像旁边找根木棍转一转，指到哪就去哪。
- This Ritou Harbor bulletin board was set up by the Shogunate. Notices regarding all kinds of matters will be posted here. Do not post without authorization. ｜ 此乃幕府所设离岛港口告示板，各种事务，尽皆公示。闲人请勿擅自张贴！
- Help me? With what? I—I can get it myself... ｜ 帮我？帮我什么？我、我自己也能拿到…
- Obtain a total of {param0} Incense Ashcrystals in the "Iktomi Spiritseeking Scrolls" event ｜ 在「暝视寻灵织卷」活动中累计获得{param0}焚香晶灰
- Come on! Don't look at me like that. I'm not some kind of villain! ｜ 喂！别用这种怀疑的眼神看着我啊！我又不是什么坏人！
- The most important thing about an experience is how you choose to interpret it. ｜ 重要的不是经历本身，而是对经历的解读。
- Alright, you can go ahead and get started now. I look forward to hearing your verdict. ｜ 那么开始吧，我也很期待你们的结果。
- ...But as things are right now, she's just a small bird in the sky that's about to lose its last feathers. All I can do is raise a gale to delay her fall. ｜ …可当前这种情况下，她就像羽毛即将被彻底拔光的小鸟飞在高空中，而我能做的只是卷起狂风来让它晚些坠落。
- Just think. As an adventurer, you'd get to go explore wherever you wanted, literally anywhere in the seven nations of Teyvat... ｜ 你想想，如果当上冒险家，就可以自由地在七国探索…
- Vayuda Turquoise Gemstone ｜ 自在松石
- Mposo ｜ 恩波索
- Everlasting Lord of Arcane Wisdom ｜ 七叶寂照秘密主
- One man's stone is another man's gem... ｜ 遗珠弃璧，吉光片裘…
- Through this tale, you can master the method to make the catalyst "Fruit of Fulfillment."\n\nThis tale is about portents and disasters.\n"In truth, the moon did not always look like a pearl..." ｜ 通过这个故事，能掌握法器「盈满之实」的制造方法。\n\n这个故事与异兆、灾祸有关。\n「其实，月亮并不总是如同珍珠一样圆…」
- Yeah, me neither! Not that I have low expectations of you, Mona, but personally, I think you're a kind soul, and you shouldn't feel like you have to live up to anything more than that. ｜ 我也没有。倒不是不对你抱有期待啦，但我认为，莫娜你本来就是个亲切善良的人，不需要伪装。
- *cough* Well! Uh, it's very good that we've retrieved these materials, in any case. Give me a moment to study their contents... ｜ 咳！总之，顺利回收到了资料绝对是一件好事，我先研究一下里面的内容…
- Don't worry, I said "a" drink. That means just one. ｜ 放心，说一杯就一杯。
- Let's see... What dishes did we talk about just now? ｜ 我想想...刚刚讨论了哪些菜？
- "Outlander Brigade," the latest trailblazer in Inazuman light literature, has just made its debut. Wanna have a look? ｜ 稻妻轻文学界的锐意之作《异邦人喧哗旅》横空出世，要不要翻翻看？
- Heh, nothing. Thanks for your hospitality. ｜ 没什么，这次多谢两位款待。
- Since we have the notes, we might as well see what they say! ｜ 既然有笔记，那我们看一下笔记上的内容吧！
- Oho? What a coincidence, I just finished my talks with the Sumeru merchant. Didn't expect to bump into you again. ｜ 哦？这么巧，我刚刚跟那位须弥的老板谈完合作，没想到在这里又碰面了。
- Yes. Do you need to take a photo, Oceanid Ann? I am equipped with the most advanced optics from the Fontaine Institute of Natural Philosophy. I can— ｜ 是。纯水精灵·安，您需要进行留影吗？我搭载了枫丹自然哲学学院最先进的光学设备，能够——
- Chasca ｜ 恰斯卡
- Yes, there were some accidents along the way, but I was still able to unlock and enter the underground ruins. ｜ 虽然发生了一些意外，不过还是顺利打开了进入地下遗迹的入口。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- But now, I absolutely cannot find her. I have no idea where she's gone. Please help me find her! ｜ 但是…现在我压根就找不到她了。这丫头到底跑到哪去玩了，你快点帮我找找吧！
- My original plan was to just relax and enjoy the sights. But then I ran into Miss Hu Tao and Mr. Zhongli, and well, you know the rest. I suppose it was meant to be. ｜ 原本我只是想来国外散心看看风景的。能有幸路遇胡桃小姐和钟离先生，应当说是命运般的指引吧。
- Your people really are difficult to get along with. All I'm asking for is a face-to-face conversation. Does she truly have no interest in the Fortress' secret? ｜ 你们的人还真是难相处，只是请你「父亲」见面谈谈而已，她不也想知道梅洛彼得堡的秘密吗？
- Perfect ｜ 完美

- Karya? What are you doing here? ｜ 卡嘉姐姐？你怎么到这里来了？
- Two letters lie beneath the bag, all of which have "D" as their sender. The letters are in great condition, and there is a time written on the back. This is most likely the time these letters were received. ｜ 布袋下方摆着两封信，署名都是「D」。信件被保存得非常好，背面标有时间，应该是收信的日子。
- You may have already heard about that Kautilya guy. He wants to use trained Fungi to replace some of the mercenaries in protecting important areas or performing dangerous tasks. ｜ 你们应该听说了吧，那个叫考特里亚的家伙，想要让受过训练的蕈兽取代一部分佣兵，去保护重要的区域，或执行危险的工作。
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- A feather of dreams that soars free like an eagle. At the end of the gladiator's legendary life, this parting gift was left upon his chest by a bird that knew true freedom. ｜ 如隼般自在的梦想之羽。在传奇生涯的终点，无羁的飞鸟在他的心口覆上了这根羽毛。
- No, I already have enough information on Setaria. The most important thing now is for you to pay attention to the vendor's talking style and key characteristics. ｜ 不，有关塞塔蕾的信息我已经足够了解了。现在最重要的是，你们要留意摊主的「说话方式」和「关键情报」。
- Long story short... A little more than four hundred years ago, I became the Iudex of Fontaine and initiated a series of institutional reforms. ｜ 长话短说…大概四百多年之前，我成为了枫丹的最高审判官，并着手进行了一系列的机构改革。
- Many Pari spend time with those flowers after they've finished their work for the day. ｜ 许多花灵在完成了每天应尽的职责后，就会与「净觉花」为伴。
- But now that Paimon has seen this ship for herself, she's been convinced! ｜ 但见识到了这艘大船，你们的话开始有说服力了。
- ...I do. It's something Daddy gave me. How could I not like it? ｜ …喜欢啊，我爸爸送给我的东西，我怎么可能不喜欢。
- But first, we should head to Jueyun Karst. If you'll excuse us, Madame Ping, we'll be leaving now. ｜ 但眼下还得先去绝云间。二位，我们先告辞了。

- About Razor ｜ 关于雷泽…
- ...Okay! I got something! ｜ …啊，有了！
- That's a pretty good idea, actually. ｜ 是个好办法。
- Please help me look out for her while you are out traveling. Please! ｜ 所以你在附近游览的时候，就请帮我留意下她的行踪吧，拜托了！
- Collected the most Adventure Coins in total ｜ 累计获取冒险币数量最多

- ??? ｜ ？？？

- Hi, here for the fertilizer? Can you give me your name? ｜ 你好，是来领肥料的吗？请报下名字。
- I like frank people, because we can freely speak our minds to one another. There is no need to hide anything that you wish to say. I hear the voices of all things in nature, and that includes yours. ｜ 我喜欢性格爽朗的人，这样相处时可以畅所欲言。有什么想说的不必藏在心里，我能够听到自然万物的声音，其中也包括你的声音。

- Guess this means we're in the Mora-making business together, then. Hey, why don't you try out one of our potions? ｜ 是不是等于，我们在和迪卢克老爷一起赚大钱了？迪卢克老爷也来试试我们的药剂吧！

- I wonder if there are any clever minds in Fontaine that can replicate this delicacy. I'd really like to taste it. ｜ 唔，不知道枫丹廷里有没有聪明的人能够仿制出这种美食…真想尝尝看…

- Alkami revealed his true thoughts, and claimed that though he does not teach any architecture fundamentals, his institution is still a legal one that Kaveh will not be able to challenge on legal grounds. But is there more to the story? ｜ 阿尔卡米坦诚了内心的想法，并认为「敷衍教学」并未违反教令，卡维也不能拿他怎么样。但一切果真如此吗？

- Great Envoy, and her honored Yasnapati, I fear that this is as far as I may attend you. ｜ 尊使大人，还有尊使的谒颂主，恐怕我只能陪你们到这里了。
- Just as you begin to celebrate your victory, a suspicious lump on the ground catches your attention. ｜ 正当你们庆祝胜利之时，地面上一块可疑的凸起吸引了你们的注意…

- By "clue," you mean... ｜ 你说的线索是…
- Oh, yeah. I remember that's the name of Autumn's dog. ｜ 哦对，我记得秋的狗是叫这个名字。
- I'd rather things not go that far, since... Though we haven't talked to each other for years, once upon a time, we were all a part of the Spina di Rosula family. ｜ 不要发展到那一步最好，毕竟…就算恩断义绝，两边也曾是一家人。

- "Facts are clearer than words." ｜ 「事实比语言更加清楚。」
- Use your understanding of your deck and the 5 Rounds you have to defeat a limitless tide of foes and score higher in this challenge. ｜ 运用对牌组的理解，在限定5回合内，击倒源源不断的敌人，挑战获取更高的积分！

- As for your tuition fees, by all means, wait until the course is over before paying. But don't even think about vanishing... ｜ 学费嘛，可以等教学完成再支付。别想逃开哦~

- There was one time his papers were blown away by the wind. He said it was no big deal. My father, however, thought that things written by intellectuals must be valuable, so he looked around for them at night with a torch. ｜ 有一次他的稿纸被风吹跑了。他说不要了，我爹却觉得文化人写的东西肯定值钱，于是在夜里打着火把四处寻找。

- A wise decision. ｜ 明智之选。
- Why's that? ｜ 为什么呢？
- I'll be counting on you. ｜ 那就有劳茜特菈莉了。
- A spore organism of some intelligence. It possesses extreme adaptability.\nThis mushroom quickly absorbs nutrients through its extended column, and its umbrella-shaped cap turns where the wind's flow carries it. ｜ 拥有一定智能的孢子生物。具有强大的环境适应能力。\n通过伸长的菌柱快速吸收养分的蕈兽，伞状的菌盖会随着风的流向转动。
- I gave up the path of seclusion, not because it's a mistaken path, but because I found a better path. Jeht, I hope you'll be able to take that bright path. ｜ 我放弃了避世的路，不是因为那是不正确的，只是因为我找到了更好的路。婕德，我希望你能走上那条有光的路。

- That's... probably not it. ｜ 应该不是这种原因。

- Increases all party members' ATK by 95 for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色攻击力提高95点，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Ningguang has been working pretty hard all day. You'd like to help her take a day off. She seems to have some idea of what she'd like to do during this down-time... ｜ 凝光一直都很辛苦，你决定为她放一天假。至于休息时间要做什么，她似乎有些想法…
- Sorry we couldn't help you with the game, Boss. ｜ 抱歉，没能遵守约定，来帮托马老大做游艺…

- Rawr! Rawr! ｜ 呀！呀！
- Uh, hmm. Did I say too much? Keep that stuff a secret and don't tell Dad, alright? Thanks! ｜ 我是不是说得太多了？刚才我们说的话是秘密哦，你可不要告诉老爹啊，拜托。
- I hired you! Don't tell me what to do... ｜ 你可是我雇来的，不要对我指手画脚…

- Lost Key ｜ 钥匙是易丢品
- That's perfectly natural. I'm sure the first hymns ever sung took some getting used to for the audience at the time as well. But I believe that as long as the song is an earnest expression of feeling, it will reach people's hearts sooner or later. ｜ 那也是正常的，第一首圣歌的听众当初恐怕也不习惯。但我相信，只要歌曲饱含心意，早晚都能打动人心。
- Generally speaking, the mastermind often shows themselves right at the start of the story in order to show their strength to the protagonist. If you can take the enemy head-on with swift and fierce attacks, you'll be off to a great start and get a big morale boost...\n<color=#FFE00FFF>Use your combat abilities to attack enemies as much as possible and collect Labyrinth Coins.</color> ｜ 以普遍性理论而言，幕后黑手常在故事开始时现身，试图给正方一个下马威。若是以凌厉迅捷的攻击正面回应敌人，就能开局得势，士气大涨…\n<color=#FFE00FFF>利用战斗能力，尽可能打击敌人，收集迷宫币。</color>
- (Explain that you saw it when you touched the stone tablet...) ｜ （述说触摸石碑时看到的…）

- It sounds like there's a battle going on — could that be Raptor? ｜ 好像是战斗的声音，难道是怪鸟？！
- No need to feel so sad, Buer. As someone who delights in wisdom, you should feel joy at finally finding the answer. ｜ 不要这么伤心了，布耶尔。作为智者，此刻应该享受找到答案的喜悦才对呀。

- Take your friend in the resistance, for example. There's nothing you can do now. He's a lost cause. ｜ 就像你在反抗军的朋友一样，无论怎么努力，都不过是徒劳。

- ...Mm, fair enough. ｜ …嗯，也好。

- Perfect! Paimon really wants to watch you play. How about Paimon gives Kazuha a crash course right now? ｜ 机会正好！我也想看你们玩牌。大不了我给万叶来个突击训练吧！

- Making tea looks simple on the surface, but it is actually quite complex. The quality of the tea leaves, the temperature of the water, the number of times to add water... Only when every variable is properly controlled can tea of the purest taste be brewed. Would you like a cup? ｜ 泡茶是一件看似简单实则费心的事情，茶叶的品质、茶水的温度、冲泡的次数，只有所有的变量都控制恰当，才能泡出味道最纯正的茶。要来一杯吗？
- #And even if Paimon does trust you, it's not like {NICKNAME} would... ｜ #况且就算我信任你，{NICKNAME}也不会…
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Duration</color>\n{0} – {1}\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nTravelers with Adventure Rank 16 or above.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nDuring Lantern Rite, you can submit Lantern Fiber, Wick Material, and Plaustrite Shards to Huixin to help with the construction of the Mingxiao lantern for Liyue Harbor.\nMaterials submitted by all travelers on the same server will be calculated together. The construction of the Mingxiao lantern is divided into three stages: Shaping the Framework, Covering the Surface, and Animating the Lantern. Each stage is completed once the materials submitted reach the required amount. Travelers will receive rewards upon the completion of each stage.\nLet's work together to make this year's Mingxiao lantern the best one ever! ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动时间】</color>\n{0}~{1}\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶16及以上\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n海灯节活动期间内，可将灯纸纤维、灯芯绒材、浮生石片交纳给慧心，协助璃月港建设明霄灯。\n全服务器旅行者交纳的材料会累计计算。明霄灯建设分为框架、雕琢、彩饰三个阶段，累计交纳达到相应数值时即可完成该阶段的建设。完成每个阶段的建设后，即可领取相应阶段的完成奖励。\n齐心协力，一起建设明霄灯吧！
- You have reached the current maximum Gathering Score you can attain. You will not be able to score any more from challenges. Continue? ｜ 当前获取的聚集评分已达上限，进行挑战将无法获得更多聚集评分，是否继续？
- Yeah, Elder Trinidad did. But uh... Paimon seems to have forgotten them... ｜ 特立尼达长老好像说过，但是都有什么来着…我有点忘了…
- I'm alright. Picking herbs in the mountains can be quite exhausting. Fortunately, my wife has prepared some berries for me. ｜ 还好吧，进山采药难免会有些疲劳，幸好青莲准备了一些树莓。
- Trust in your cards. ｜ 要相信手中的牌。

- Spring finds the fortress, as birds in feather fly.\nMoon gilded in burnished bronze, ancient odes sung by stone.\nLost in thought, drifting in dreams, recalling the magnificent scene before finding it once more. ｜ 春来故垒，鸿羽凭飞。\n古铜伴月，磐岩颂诗。\n忽神出而梦游，忆盛景再得之。

- As long as there's free meals. ｜ 只要管饭，一切好说。
- You two are assigned to different lounge areas. If you'll follow me, please, Kachina. ｜ 两位选手的休息室是分开的，卡齐娜选手请跟我来。
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nJust as the flames never die before they utterly burn out, so too should the pace of the pursuit never falter, even for a moment. Surmount all obstacles, and advance ever onward towards the title of "Teyvat's Strongest"!\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility Requirements</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20, and complete the Archon Quest "Song of the Dragon and Freedom."\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nDuring the event, World Level will not impact the difficulty of this game mode.\nStarting from the first day of the event, a new challenge will become available each day. Each challenge has 4 difficulties: Perilous, Quandary, Desperate, and Steadfast. When completing a challenge on a higher difficulty, challenges of lower difficulty will be automatically considered completed.\nEach challenge will have unique "Pursuit Providence" with unique effects, and paying attention to and taking advantage of these effects will be beneficial in battle.\nIn addition, <color=#F39000>during Feast of Pursuit challenges, you cannot gain Phlogiston or use Phlogiston battle mechanics</color>. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n正如烈焰在燃尽之前不会有须臾止息，攻逐的步履也不应有片刻停留；击败一切所面之敌，向着「提瓦特最强」的尊号不断奋进吧！\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20，且完成魔神任务「巨龙与自由之歌」。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n活动期间，世界等级调整不会影响本玩法难度。\n从活动开始的第一天起，每天会开启一个新的挑战。每个挑战均有「涉险」、「困境」、「死斗」、「决意」四个难度。达成较高难度的挑战时，较低难度的挑战会自动达成。\n每个挑战都具有独特的「攻逐之助」，具有特定的效果，留意其效果并善加利用以在挑战中获得助益。\n另外，<color=#F39000>在「攻逐飨会」的挑战中，将无法获取燃素，或使用燃素的战斗机制</color>。

- But Aramuhukunda and his partner Aradasha, together with the Golden Nara Varuna, defeated the monsters that Aranara could not defeat. ｜ 但是兰穆护昆达和他的伙伴兰帝裟，还有金色的那菈法留纳一起，打败了本来兰那罗没有办法击败的怪物们。

- N—Not really... ｜ 我，我真不太懂…

- The justification is that my word, not yours, is the law of the land. Cease and begone, Gundafar, so you may spend the rest of your days with your wife. ｜ 凭我是国王，而你不是，回家里去吧，去和你的妻子团聚，多余的不必再说。
- Max Cutting DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 最大切割伤害|{param2:F1P}
- That is the case, though it is not merely a matter of being a swimmer or not... *sigh* Never mind. I did find a place to rest by the water and there are still some tea leaves that have yet to become completely sodden. Allow me to thank you... ｜ 确实是这样，不光是会不会水的问题，唉，算了。我在水边找了块能休息的地方，应该还有些没被泡烂的茶叶，为了表示感谢…
- Still, I shan't take up more of your time until then. The final is about to begin. ｜ 在那之前，我就不耽误您的时间了。总决赛马上就会开始。
- Did someone just call my name? Oh, it's you, Mr. Liu Su. You look angry. What happened? ｜ 谁叫我呀？哦，是刘苏先生，今天是怎么了，生这么大气？
- Sacred Sakura's Favor Level Reward ｜ 稻妻神樱眷顾等级奖励
- Cryo Hypostasis ｜ 「无相之冰」
- ...Alright then, you can expect us to be in touch very soon to follow up, Miss Kuki. ｜ …那么关于后续的安排，我们会尽快联系久岐小姐的。
- Iktomisaur Elder ｜ 暝视龙大长老
- It's Hibiki. ｜ 是阿响。
- Doesn't sound like it'll work. ｜ 我觉得不靠谱。
- Number of Moonfins caught: {0} ｜ 钓获月光鳍数量：{0}
- If you hadn't looked special in my eyes at all, I wouldn't have struggled to find the right "concept" to describe you. ｜ 要不是因为你们在我看来实在有点特殊，我才不会一时找不到「概念」来形容…
- Okay. Well, never mind... ｜ 这样啊。没事…
- Idle ｜ 空闲
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- A booth set up by the Ministry of Civil Affairs. It is said to offer a game where you can use rattan figures to battle against each other... ｜ 由总务司所设的摊位，据说在这里可以玩到一种用小藤人相互拼斗的游戏…
- The Other Side of the Sky ｜ 天空的另一侧
- Why, yes — it was Charlotte! You remember her, right? That daredevil journalist? ｜ 就是夏洛蒂！你记得的吧？那个敢想敢做敢写的记者。
- Forging commissions... ｜ 锻造委托…

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Most of them are pretty ordinary, but even normal ones must have their own awesome uses, right? ｜ 虽然大多数只是些普通的矿石，不过，就算是普通的矿石，说不定也有了不起的作用，对吧？
- But I've got all this business to take care of... ｜ 还是先忙完手上这一单生意吧…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Wow, you're amazing! Even my friend couldn't do anything about the shrines! ｜ #{M#哥哥姐姐}{F#姐姐你们}好厉害，我朋友都拿石龛没办法呢！
- Attack the Abyss Tumor to purify the totem ｜ 攻击深渊瘤石，净化图腾

- These connections are particularly strong between comrades-in-arms. ｜ 在一同出生入死的战士之间，这种「联系」尤为强韧。
- When the West Wind Arises ｜ 西风吹拂之时
- And Paimon's the illustrious Paimon! ｜ 我是传说中的派蒙！
- Have a look at this batch of commissions... *sigh* ｜ 你可以看看我们这期的委托内容，喏…
- If they solve King Deshret's puzzle before us, these ruins probably won't be the same when you return, Tirzad. ｜ 如果他们抢先一步解开了赤王留下的谜题，等到提尔扎德再来时，遗迹或许不会是现在的样子了。
- Fiery Rain ｜ 箭雨
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- Enjoy your meal. ｜ 祝您用餐愉快。
- Follow the floating Khvarena ｜ 跟随浮游灵光前进
- Good Afternoon ｜ 中午好…
- This is the Rhythm of the Great Dream. Sing it to enter Vanarana. ｜ 这是「大梦的曲调」。只要唱大梦的曲调，就能进入「桓那兰那」。
- Superconduct: Surging Bombardment ｜ 超导·电涌轰击
- Jean, Lisa! ｜ 琴团长，丽莎小姐！
- Speaking of cannonballs, the bigger the better, wouldn't you say? ｜ 说到炮弹，最重要的就是够大！你说对吗？
- You look like you're raring to go. Not surprising, given how comfy this place is. I slept like a log last night. ｜ 你看着很精神嘛，这里的环境确实不错，昨晚上我睡得很好。
- ...Traveler? Yanfei? ｜ …旅行者？烟绯？
- Increases the Energy Recharge effect granted by <color=#FFD780FF>Lightning Blade</color>'s Abundance Amulet by 10% of the Traveler's Energy Recharge. ｜ 基于旅行者自己元素充能效率的10%，提升<color=#FFD780FF>雷影剑</color>的丰穰勾玉提供的元素充能效率。
- Come, Kaveh. Come to me, my child... ｜ 来，卡维。好孩子，到我这来…
- You... You! ｜ 你、你…！
- Really, quit fooling around! Don't act like we haven't burned anything along our journey... ｜ 真是的，别开玩笑啦！明明我们一路上，也没少烧过乱七八糟的东西…
- I'm a friend of Tighnari's. ｜ 我是提纳里的朋友。
- "Among them, surveillance of Esseim has ceased on account of his good behavior. All other personnel remain on our watchlist." ｜ 「其中埃桑表现较好，提前解除观察。其余人员仍在重点观察名单中。」
- Traveler ｜ 主角
- Treacle Grass ｜ 如饴的蜜草
- Mind if I buy you a drink? ｜ 我请你喝一杯怎么样？
- Seems like you guys talked a lot without actually saying anything... ｜ 说了好多，结果好像又什么都没说…
- Lavawalker's Torment ｜ 渡火者的煎熬
- I—If... If you get in trouble like my brother, I'll find someone to rescue you... I know how to post commissions at the Adventurers' Guild... ｜ 万一万一…你们跟哥哥一样遇到麻烦了，我就去找人救你们…我以前就学会了在冒险家协会发布委托…
- Bye. ｜ 再见。
- Unlock new gameplay mode or function ｜ 解锁新玩法或功能
- It may take some time to find them, so let's wait for a bit. ｜ 寻找可能需要花点时间，我们稍等一会儿吧。
- Bye, Thoma! ｜ 嗯，下次再见！
- ♩~ ｜ ♩~
- The "Flower of Farsight," which grew upon the cliffs of The Chasm... ｜ 生于层岩巨渊之巅的「远眺之花」…
- Hmph, Mondstadt fools! The will of Snezhnaya is as solid as the permafrost! I will not yield! ｜ 呵，愚蠢的蒙德人。冬之国的意志如冰一般坚硬，我可不会屈服！
- Meka Luminaire: Radiant Grounds ｜ 机枢灯具-「崭亮近景」
- You've always been a good kid, why would you throw that all away now? If you're worried about something, just talk to me. Granny would much rather we had a conversation instead of constantly clashing like this. ｜ 你平时明明还算听话，这次为什么冲动又鲁莽？有顾虑完全可以跟奶奶说，而不是采取这种做法。
- Shh... So, you decided to come? It's a good thing you didn't arrive any earlier — you would have had to witness Sensei in one of his fits of madness. ｜ 嘘…你来了？幸亏你来得晚，没有见到师父刚刚发疯的样子。
- Big Ferocious Cat ｜ 凶凶的大猫
- Seek my advice... ｜ 向我请教…
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- His symptoms resemble a fever, but something else is causing them. They seem more akin to a disruption in his psyche. Antipyretics won't be of much use. ｜ 他的病症和发烧很像，但根源却不太相同。更像是单纯的意识紊乱，退烧药的功效不大。
- This too is part of the tribe's trials... The reason one must cultivate an understanding between human and Saurian. ｜ 这也是部族的试炼里…需要培养龙和人的默契的原因。
- In complex scenarios, there really isn't much room for a simple trick or quick fix to solve your problem, but one should rather use their experience and trial and error to continually debug it and find the proper solution... ｜ 对于错综复杂的应用情境不存在多少取巧的空间，基于已有的经验勇于试错并不断改正方才是最好的技法…
- Well, yes. And that's where a reliable adult comes in, no? ｜ 所以，这个时候就要有一位可靠的成年人来帮帮他了。
- Ziwei ｜ 紫微
- Judging from Ararycan's look... ｜ 欸？看兰利遮的样子…
- Why the long face... ｜ 别愁眉苦脸的。
- I had to confirm my suspicions. That's why I chose to join this investigation. ｜ 为了确认这种怀疑，我主动加入了调查。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- In the past we'd simply ask him for provisions and everything would be delivered. Now, he suddenly refuses to give us anything! ｜ 以前我们只要找到他就可以领到粮食，但现在他突然不给了。
- ...No problem. See what you can find, I'll take care of him. ｜ …我知道了，芭芭拉就安心治疗吧，其余的事就交给我了。
- Ah, er, nothing. Just the bad habit of a bookworm. Keep listening to Argos. ｜ 啊啊，没什么。读书之人的坏习惯发作了。继续听阿尔戈斯说话吧。
- Challenge has ended, unable to revive here ｜ 当前挑战已结束，无法在此复苏
- Hmm, sounds like he still has some way to go before he can say he's fully independent. But everyone goes through their own life in their own way. ｜ 听上去离独立还有些距离。不过，每个人有每个人的活法。
- Examine Ladder ｜ 观察梯子
- Everyone is dismissed and the audience begins to leave along with Furina and Neuvillette. ｜ 宣布休庭之后，观众逐渐散去，芙宁娜与那维莱特也离开了。
- Returner's Journey ｜ 重返旅途
- Speaking of which, you said you often argued with your father back then and didn't have a job. ｜ 对哦，你那个时候不是还天天和自己父亲吵架。
- Dragonspine ｜ 龙脊雪山
- The Captain? You actually bought that? ｜ 「队长」的部下？看来你们真的信了雇主用来帮我伪装的说辞。
- Good, then let's do that. There are some slippery characters among the bidders, you see. ｜ 嗯，因为今天这场拍卖会的参与者，都不容易对付。
- "Seeds of stories, brought by the wind and cultivated by time." ｜ 「风带来故事的种子，时间使之发芽。」
- Tighnari gave Layla some advice, and she seems to be doing a lot better now. Cyno just started his search for the Disruptors, and as for Hat Guy... Well, who knows what he's thinking. ｜ 提纳里跟她讲了一些道理，现在莱依拉看起来好多了。赛诺刚刚出发开始找干扰器，阿帽…我们也不知道他在想什么。
- Want a tip on how to escape from the Gardes? Just give yourself a name that's really long and difficult to pronounce. They'll be stumbling over your name as soon as they try to announce that you are under arrest. ｜ 知道怎么做更容易逃脱警备队的抓捕吗？给自己起个又长又难记的名字，然后他们在大喊「那个谁，把手举起来！」时就会卡壳。

- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰

- Guess we can only get in from above. ｜ 只能想办法从上面进去了。

- Use Honed Focus to defeat {param2} opponent(s) ｜ 利用「锐势焦点」击败{param2}名敌人
- A feather carried over by whimpering sea winds and crimson waves. The passage of time has changed its shape and color. ｜ 随呜咽的海风、腥红的海浪而来的飞羽，年岁改变了它的形状与颜色。
- Imperfect Self-Replicating Mek ｜ 不完美的自复制机关
- Heh... I'm positive that next time my boss Master Diluc is here, he'll pick up the tab for you. ｜ 呵呵，下次等迪卢克老板在的时候，他肯定会请你喝的。
- Vaguely-Readable Inscription ｜ 依稀可以辨认的铭文
- There are some casualties, but the overall mood is very positive. I reckon they'll start rebuilding pretty soon. ｜ 有一些伤亡，但至少现在大家很积极，估计马上就会投入到重建工作里。
- Tsk, so we're still going to play chess after all! ｜ 啧，结果还真是要下棋啊！
- Monsieur Os ｜ 呜斯先生
- I'm sure you admire Lady Hiiragi for being the independent, gentle, resilient, and strong-willed person she is. ｜ 您喜欢的柊小姐，是独立自主，温柔坚强，充满决心的吧。
- Heh-heh. Then let's get to it! ｜ 嘿嘿，那我们现在就去做吧。
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Ah, you want to scout ahead? ｜ 你想去八重堂望望风？
- You came out here to look for him and remember that friendship, no matter how difficult things got. Isn't that right? ｜ 无论如何都要想起和他的友谊，所以就算外面的路很难走，你也要出来找他，是吗？
- The schematics of that ancient machine... Not sharing that with the tribe was a crime. The moment I realized that, I started suspecting him. ｜ 那些古代机械的图纸…他从来没有给族人分享过——这是重罪，从意识到这点起，我就已经生疑了…
- Mr. Vsevolod will give me a real hiding if I do that, so forget it. ｜ 那弗谢沃洛德先生非得踢我不可，算了吧。
- Enter the depths of the ruin ｜ 进入遗迹深处
- Low HP: I ｜ 生命值低·其一
- Let's mix things up a little. ｜ 这样会更有意思点。

- Fatui Pyro Agent ｜ 愚人众·火之债务处理人
- Keep mementos of the sights and experiences of your adventure. When taking a photo, you can change your character's pose. ｜ 可以通过这种方式，将值得纪念的景象牢牢地记下来。\n拍照时，也能改变角色的姿势。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making "Contented Elegance."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『怡然自得的优雅』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- What a bother! It would probably take them years, just like it's taking me! ｜ 未免也太麻烦了！可能要像我一样，花上好几年的功夫！
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Please follow me. ｜ 那么请您跟紧我。
- He wants to give food to friends. His friends like human food. ｜ 他想把食物给朋友。他的朋友，喜欢人类食物。
- Conqueror of Evil: Guardian Yaksha ｜ 降魔·护法夜叉
- The great dragon erected many peculiar structures across the land. In the ancient legends, the great dragon's outstretched wings could together blot out the light of the sky. Perhaps such descriptions were not hyperbole, or perhaps such wording was a metaphor for their desire to see beyond the sky.\nBut now, the traces of said ancient dragon have already vanished, and the people of today can only but glimpse the forging techniques of that ancient civilization through the shattered remnants of those massive structures and their patterns. ｜ 巨龙曾在大地上竖立诸多构型奇特的建筑。古老的传说中，巨龙的羽翼相互勾连便可遮住天光，或许这形容并未存有夸张之处，又或者这句话其实是他们觊觎天外之域的隐喻。\n不过如今远古之龙行迹已绝，现在人们只能从那巨大构造的残型与纹路里，窥得一些古老文明的铸就之法。
- But I suspect Miko knows something... ｜ 但神子应该知道。
- Kachina ｜ 卡齐娜
- How can my teacher chat with them so easily when they clearly don't speak the same language... ｜ 为什么老师就能很容易地对着它们讲话呢，明明语言不通的…
- "Bluey" ｜ 「阿蓝」
- Speak to the Night Raven Statue (Questioner) to start a case determination process. ｜ 与夜鸦雕像·提问者交谈后，将开启一场紧凑的断案过程。
- A Legend of Sword (III) ｜ 沉秋拾剑录·三
- Yes — just like the last time! ｜ 嗯，就像上次那样哦。
- When a transporter picks up a new Elemental Clot, the one they were carrying is dropped. Carried Elemental Clots will react with other elements, and will lose energy and disappear after too many elemental reactions. ｜ 当运输者身上已携带一种纯元素凝块，再次拾取凝块时，新拾取的凝块会替换掉携带中的凝块。同时，当前携带的元素凝块也会与其他元素发生反应，如果元素反应发生次数过多，纯元素凝块因为失去活性而消失。
- Defeat all opponents to pass the stage ｜ 击败所有敌人以通过关卡
- "On top of the ruins of the pool where the regalia of past executions of offenders was excavated, those who had lost the dream of the desert, yet were unwilling to give up their vast sea of sand, gathered.\nIn the name of the Reed Sea that never existed, they connected with the dream that was promised to them..." ｜ 「在挖掘出过往处决犯行者的王器的水池废墟之上，失去了沙之梦，又不愿放弃沙海的人们聚集于此。」\n「以从未存在的苇海为名，与曾经应许的梦相回响…」
- How are we going to know what Aralohita ran across and on which day? Paimon thought you said it was an easy one, Ararycan! ｜ 我们怎么可能知道兰罗希陀到底哪天遇到哪个呢？兰利遮不是说谜题很简单吗？这可一点也不简单啊！
- Great! That's the spirit! In this case, let's get started! ｜ #好，好志气！既然如此，就请{M#少侠}{F#女侠}试剑！
- Vera's Melancholy (V) ｜ 少女薇拉的忧郁·卷五
- H—Huh? Did Paimon just say something wrong? ｜ 欸？我…我说错什么了？
- Sayu has been discovered by Kano Nana, and has no choice but to return to Chinju Forest to practice ninjutsu. She begs you to come along, and so you do... ｜ 早柚被鹿野奈奈发现，不得不返回镇守之森修习忍术。在早柚的央求下，你也只能同往…
- Oh? This is... the delivery from Wangshu Inn? ｜ 哦？这是…望舒客栈的外送吗？
- That way, art will constantly evolve, and works of extraordinary aesthetic value may be produced! Ever upwards and on for large-scale graffiti work! ｜ 从而让更多艺术不断进步，创造出非同凡响的美学产物，画出更狂猛的大尺寸涂鸦稿！
- To think I'd assumed that Jifang had forgotten about my book amid all the other customers... ｜ 我还以为是因为客人太多，纪芳把这本书的事给忘了呢。
- Unlocks the associated character ｜ 角色解锁
- When you need the Slime Condensate, you can go to the Futures Exchange and check the "trading agreements" to see who's selling it. ｜ 而你需要史莱姆凝液的时候，就可以去期货交易所查看一下购买史莱姆凝液的「交易协定」。
- ...He's gone. ｜ …已经消失了。
- Character Archive ｜ 角色图鉴
- You must really like Melusines. ｜ 你一定很喜欢美露莘。
- ...That's true, that's true. You've got a point there... ｜ 啊，是，是，你说得有道理…
- Right here. ｜ 就在这里哦。
- Estelle is the boss of Beaumont Workshop, and has always been proud of her forging machine, as it can not only precisely control strength of temperature, but also takes no effort from the blacksmith. Let us film a promotional video for her workshop! Remember to emphasize the superiority of her forging machine! ｜ 「博蒙特工坊」的老板伊丝黛莱小姐，一直都为自己的锻造机械感到自豪，它不仅能精准地控制力度与温度，而且对铁匠来说毫不费力。我们为她的工坊拍一段宣传片吧！记得要凸显出锻造机械的优越性哦。
- Hello. Can I help you with something? ｜ 你好，你找我有什么事吗？
- You know, I haven't done a high-pole Wushou dance in aaages! I might go and gather some wood that I can sand down and use as Plum Blossom Poles. ｜ 好久没上桩舞兽了，有点坐不住了！准备去找些木头回来打磨一下，自己做些简易的梅花桩。
- Plunge DMG|{param9:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param9:F1P}
- Arama is amazing. Aramuhukunda must be so glad that you were the one receiving his memory. Arana hasn't teleported in a long, long time either. ｜ 兰罗摩好厉害，兰穆护昆达的记忆交给你，一定也很开心。兰拉娜好久好久没有「传送」过了。
- Master Trainer, "Scions of the Canopy" ｜ 「悬木人」训练大师
- People throw beans to drive out oni. Boss is an oni, so they throw beans at him to get rid of him. ｜ 是撒豆驱鬼的人。老大是鬼，他们用豆子赶走老大。
- Trigger communication failure branch ｜ (test)触发交流失败分支$HIDDEN
- Check the exam requirements... ｜ 查看考核要求。
- Ready yourselves. We're going in. ｜ 做好准备，进去看看吧。
- *sigh* Nothing good ever comes of things that the Fatui are involved in... ｜ 唉，只要和愚人众沾边果然就遇不上好事…
- Now that I've delivered the message, I'll take my leave. ｜ 信息已经通知到，那我就先行一步回去了。
- "Opera House Switcheroo" Case Record ｜ 「歌剧院交换魔术」案件记录册
- Domain of Blessing: Crumbling Assembly IV ｜ 祝圣秘境：朽废的集所 IV
- Fish ｜ 鱼肉
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>After your character uses a Skill:</color> If your active character has a $[K6] or is defended by a Combat Status, then your characters deal +1 DMG this Round. (Can stack up to +3 DMG) ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>我方角色使用技能后：</color>如果我方出战角色在$[K6]状态或出战状态的保护下，则使本回合中我方角色造成的伤害+1。（可叠加，最多叠加到+3）
- About Ningguang ｜ 关于凝光…
- Sir Kujou Kamaji gave us very strict orders, so we have to obey. But every time we attempt to receive the bride, the Hiiragi Clan always finds an excuse to delay things. ｜ 九条镰治大人的命令非常强硬，我们也坚决执行。可每每上门，柊家总是会找新的借口拖延这件事。
- Oh, so you're the reinforcements? Wonderful, wonderful! Now that you're here, we finally have a chance! I was going to die here at this rate... ｜ 原来是救兵？太好了！你们总算到了，我的研究项目终于有救了，要不然我早晚有一天要被它害死…
- Brilliant Blessings ｜ 辉彩祝福
- Paimon believes there was a wall here before. ｜ 这里，之前应该是一面墙来着？
- All the water that used to be here has turned into rain. ｜ 之前在这里的水，全部变成雨降下来了。
- Go on, this is your moment. You should savor it. ｜ 走吧，这是属于你的时刻，请尽情享受。
- The Aster's Sigh ｜ 「紫苑叹幽弘」
- There is no way to know, therefore both are equally real. ｜ 既然是这样，它们都一样真实。
- That is true. So, as for Ioroi... Is he doing well? ｜ 说得也是。那么，五百藏…他是否还安好呢？
- Dehya, are you sure you want to buy this for me? ...Ooh, this is a heavier material than I expected. Thank you. ｜ 迪希雅，你真的要买给我吗？欸…这份礼物好重，谢谢。
- Let's play a game of Temari! ｜ 来玩手鞠吧。
- Okay, Bull-Chucker! You got owned and you know it! ｜ 少臭屁了，放牛的，明明你才是惨败的那个！
- I'm the one who should be apologizing! Sorry, let me explain. ｜ 该道歉的人是我才对。对不起，这里让我来解释吧。
- Xilonen explains the Pyro Archon's request as well as the difficulties she's encountered. ｜ 希诺宁为茜特菈莉讲述了火神的要求以及实际遇到的困难…
- Travel Plans ｜ 旅行计划
- Let me think... I still need to go interview some other contestants... Oh yeah, they're even saying the Pyro Archon herself will be appearing, aren't they? ｜ 还要再去采访几位选手…对了，听说火神会在那个竞技场里现身…
- #You're the ones from before... {NICKNAME} and Paimon... ｜ #是…是刚刚的{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}，和派蒙姐姐。
- It's just some persistent purple mist, that's all. ｜ 不过是清不完的紫色雾气而已嘛。
- Sorush ｜ 斯露莎
- And there's the Rishboland Raja that tries to steal children, and the gigantic Sumpter Beast that blocks the passage to Liyue... ｜ 还有「经常会尝试偷走孩童的长鬓虎罗阇」，「拦在通往璃月道路上的巨大驮兽」…
- Well, why don't we just go over to Cape Oath to have a look? It won't take long... ｜ 我们就去誓言岬看看嘛，反正也用不了多长时间的…
- Oh, speak of the devil — that's her over there. If you've got any more questions about Cesar, she's definitely the one to ask. ｜ 刚说到嘉玛，她就来了——喏，那位就是嘉玛，你们有什么关于塞萨尔的问题，问她准没错。
- Eh? What is it this time... ｜ 唉，这回真是…
- What were you even expecting? ｜ 你都想象了什么样的对手啊？
- It's alright, don't worry about us. ｜ 没关系，别担心我们。
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Oh, right! Didn't Faruzan say that Tighnari's the favorite to win? Let's go look for him first! ｜ 对了！珐露珊不是说，提纳里是这次的夺冠热门吗？我们就先去找他吧！
- Bulletin Board ｜ 公告板
- Hmm... What should we play today? Perhaps I should train with you, Iwai... ｜ 嗯，今天要玩什么呢…我想想，要不然就和伊瓦伊一起锻炼好啦。
- Yep! Paimon's ready! ｜ 嗯嗯，我准备好了！
- She went that way. If you ask people as you go, hopefully you'll track her down. ｜ 她往那个方向去了，你们沿路问问，应该会有线索。
- Mamaloaco's Frigid Rain ｜ 五重天的寒雨
- Hey! Is it okay to be so casual about it? This is a very important decision, after all! ｜ 噫！这么随便真的好吗？明明是很重要的事啦！
- I'm sorry. I'm the one to blame. ｜ 对不起，要怪也只能怪我。
- Jean... You're such a devotee! ｜ 真虔诚啊，琴团长！
- Max ATK Bonus|{param4:F1} ｜ 最大攻击力加成|{param4:F1}点
- Are you joking? Someone like me, getting down and dirty with the monsters? Fat chance. ｜ 我？别开玩笑了，这种粗野的活路我怎么可能做？
- The Path to Enlightenment ｜ 通往光明之路
- Defeat the Eremites ｜ 打倒镀金旅团
- Bongo-Head is a really nice Fungus, you know. ｜ 「咚咚小圆帽」也是很好的蕈兽。
- We inherited our custom of searching for the gold and wisdom in the sands from the gods themselves. ｜ 寻找沙子中的黄金与智慧，我们从神明那里继承了这般习俗。
- Huh? These flowers are saturated with Cryo energy. They could be very dangerous for me. ｜ 嗯？满溢着冰元素的花吗，在我这里可是很危险的。
- Promotional Weapons ｜ UP武器
- *sigh* I'm afraid I may have triggered the thunderstorm. These waters are less stable than they once were... ｜ 唉，刚才的雷暴，恐怕是因为受到了我的影响，这么看来，这片海域的环境已经变得没那么稳定啦…
- When the game begins: Select 1 out of 3 random characters ｜ 游戏开始时：从3名随机角色中挑选1名
- If you don't mind, could you help me with something? ｜ 如果您愿意的话，能帮我一个忙吗？
- Resurrection? ｜ 复苏…？
- "A blue, spotless ceiling, a floor of white candy, soft companions surround me, I too have wings!" ｜ 「蓝蓝的屋顶没有一点灰尘，地板就像白色的糖果，软软的好朋友们陪伴着我，我也有了翅膀！」
- Wellspring of Healing ｜ 治愈的清泉
- During the journey with Liloupar, you heard quite some ancient stories and had a glimpse of the Jinni's intelligence and behavior. Thus, even though you've parted with Liloupar, you can still decipher some mysterious texts that are unintelligible to common folks.\n<color=#4A53667F>The characters used by Jinni are radically different, for Jinni are the transcendent beings... Only through the tutoring of Jinni can mere mortals perceive the magical characters from the ancient times. Language, is the mightiest power of Jinni.</color> ｜ 在与利露帕尔同行的旅途中，获得了许多古老的故事，也模糊地明白了镇灵的知性与行事方法。因此，即使如今与她分别，仍能够解读一些于常人而言不可知的秘文。\n<color=#4A53667F>镇灵使用的文字与凡人截然不同，因为它们是超凡的生灵…凡人只有经过镇灵的亲自指点，才能解读这些拥有魔力的古老文字。而「语言」乃是镇灵最大的权能。</color>
- Why? You want it? ｜ 怎么，你想要？
- I think you're on to something... The mental distress does seem to be connected to pre-existing fears and anxieties. ｜ 你们的猜测有道理，战士们陷入精神异常，确实与内心压抑的焦躁与恐惧有关。
- You sure you'll be okay? We can come with you if you want! ｜ 你一个人没问题吗？要不要我们陪你去？
- And come to think of it, all that Sage of the Stolen Flame stuff was kinda weird, but... ｜ 还有…还有那个奇怪的盗火贤者…
- And my plan to send letters to Ms. Kaia failed because I didn't know where to send them... ｜ 而我试图给迦雅小姐寄信的计划，也因为压根不知道往哪里寄而宣告失败…
- "Dev digging for something. They seem quite unconcerned with their surroundings..." ｜ 「不知道在挖什么东西的迪弗，不太关心周围的情况…」
- Energy Cost|{param6:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param6:I}
- Now that you mention it, we should have some leftover material from when we fixed that Offering Box, right? ｜ 这么说来…上次我们修理「塞钱箱」用的材料，应该还有多余的吧？
- Melt amplifies the DMG of the attack that produces it. Pyro attacks receive a greater DMG boost than Cryo attacks. ｜ 「融化」反应发生时，造成的伤害会放大。\n火元素攻击引发融化反应时，能比冰元素获得更大的伤害加成。
- "The Chasm... Just the sound of it gives one the impression of danger."\n"But if a dash of color could be added to such a perilous place, it might make things more interesting."\n"Traveler, could you please help me find this 'dash of vibrant color' in The Chasm?" ｜ 「层岩巨渊…这名字听上去就很危险…」\n「不过，如果能在这种危险的地方里找到一抹亮色，说不定会很有趣。」\n「那就拜托你了，旅行者！帮我在层岩巨渊里找一点『明亮的颜色』吧。」
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- This is where the Raiden Shogun dwells. If your guess isn't off, you are about to meet Signora again. ｜ 雷电将军所在之处。不出预料的话…你将会和「女士」再度碰面。
- The Abyss manifests its power in a manner that is most devastating to the place in question. In Sumeru, it was forbidden knowledge. In Natlan, it was monstrous creatures. Our experience combatting the Abyss is inapplicable to Natlan for that very reason, but I still regret that I was unable to offer aid. Thankfully, the crisis has now been resolved, and Mavuika said many Natlanese are planning to visit Sumeru. I plan to welcome them with open arms! ｜ 深渊会以最致命的形态在提瓦特显化，在须弥是「禁忌知识」，在纳塔则是魔物，正因如此，须弥的诸多经验也无法帮助到她，对此我有些愧疚。所幸现在危机已经化解，她说会有很多纳塔人到须弥游玩，我很欢迎他们，而且已经做好准备啦。
- I'll take my leave for now. ｜ 先告辞了。
- What kind of disciple murders their own master? I hope it was worth it, because there'll be hell to pay! ｜ 徒弟谋害自己的老师，真不知道你是怎么想的，等着接受审判吧！
- This feels like old news. Could we get to the point? ｜ 怎么又是这话。说重点。
- Prop check complete. All that's left is to discuss some dates with Rekhar... ｜ 道具清点告一段落，等会儿和里卡尔商量一下日期。
- Our little dude must be inside then! ｜ 小哥肯定就在里头，你们说是吧？
- Complete "The Little Oceanid" ｜ 完成「水的女儿」剧情
- Pursue Tlazolli ｜ 追击特拉佐莉

- Royal Masque ｜ 宗室面具

- Yes, my plan is to once again place my life within the Sacred Flame. ｜ 嗯，我打算再度将我的生命融入圣火。

- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Ugh, not enough training! My Ararakalari is still too weak... ｜ 唔…修行还不够！兰迦拉梨还太弱…

- The fish would pull Paimon right into the sea! ｜ 派蒙会被拖到海里去的啦！
- Hmm? Do you need to warm up or anything? ｜ 怎么，还需要点准备运动吗？
- Smiley ｜ 微笑
- This should do it! ｜ 这样应该就可以了吧！
- Action can only be completed in your own world ｜ 该操作仅能在自己游戏进度中进行
- You're joking, right? I—I don't believe you! ｜ 你一定是在骗我对不对？我…我才不信呢！

- N—No, it's not like that... I just... ｜ 不是的，不是这样的…我只是…
- Durin ｜ 杜林
- Hmm... I'm a little worried that Quinn might just throw a wood carving in a drawer and forget about it... ｜ 唔…我有点担心，昆恩先生会不会直接把这木雕放在一边就不管了…
- Hear that? Those guys seem to wanna resell Saurian companions... Those low-down, no-good poachers! ｜ 听见了吗？那些家伙好像真的想要倒卖龙伙伴…是十恶不赦的龙贩子！

- Required ｜ 需要
- Oh, this must be a package that a guest sent to me. Why didn't Zhen Qiang bring it up himself? ｜ 哦…这应该是客商给我的包裹…甄强怎么自己不来送？
- "Fishing supplies, ornaments, and all manner of tools — come catch 'em all at Atlahua's Net! Fishing rod-fixing services provided too!" ｜ 「垂钓用品、装饰摆件，各种工具一应俱全，快来『奥特华的渔网』将它们一网打尽！鱼竿坏了也可以找我来修！」
- CD|{param2:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param2:F1}秒
- I dunno if the clues are following a timeline or if they're based on the amount of regret I have... Either way, this incident was bound to come up sooner or later. ｜ 无论是时间顺序还是懊悔程度，也都该轮到这件事了。
- Go back to Wangshu Inn and report back to Xiao ｜ 回望舒客栈向魈回报
- Hmph, in former times when people knew their place and respected traditions, such conduct was only basic courtesy when greeting a nobleman. ｜ 哼，在那个大家都尊礼重道的时代，这种基础礼仪，可是面见贵族的常识！
- These are the "long forsaken ruins" from the poem. Apparently, they were once full of treasure. ｜ 这里就是诗中指的「墟散人离处」，据说曾经有很多宝藏。
- Reward for accepting the Tavern Challenge against the Consecrated Scorpion at The Cat's Tail and achieving all corresponding challenge objectives in a Friendly Fracas ｜ 在猫尾酒馆中小王子处进行酒馆挑战，在友好对局难度圣骸毒蝎中完成挑战目标后获取
- Opponents Defeated: #1#/%1% ｜ 击败怪物：#1#/%1%
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- "The wild beasts seem to be more active than usual recently. Considering your age, you should try not to go too deep into the mountains alone unless you really have to." ｜ 「最近的野兽活动似乎比以往更为频繁。您年事已高，若无必要，最好还是不要再独自深入山间了。」
- Ah, I see... ｜ 好像明白了…
- Yeah, that's right! So just get on with it... If you're gonna eat us, then you'll have to deal with all three of us! ｜ 别说了！要吃的话就把我们三个一起吃了吧！
- Nameless Traveler's Notes (V) ｜ 无名旅人的笔记·其五
- Get the container ｜ 取来容器
- Afterward, she whips out some cooking utensils and begins the flashy and swift process of cooking. She quickly completes several luxuriant dishes. ｜ 随后，她取出厨具，开始了华丽而迅捷的烹饪。不消多时，就完成了几道丰盛的菜肴。
- #In battle, {F#she}{M#he} single-handedly slayed multiple Shogunate Samurai without so much as breaking a sweat. ｜ #{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}在正面战场以一己之力干掉了三四个幕府武士，不费吹灰之力。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Stop, please! By all the warriors, heroes, gods, and kings... I can't run any longer. ｜ 勇士！英雄！国王！天神！别再追了，我真跑不动了。
- A bookshelf often found in the House of Daena that contains large numbers of Akademiya-approved books. These shelves are rather narrow, and are usually used in combination with other shelves.\nThese shelves are embedded into the wall, making maintenance difficult. They are also very tall, and scholars often require a ladder to reach the topmost shelf. In addition, all parts of the shelf must endure heavy loads. As a result, these shelves have been crafted with thick boards that have been specially processed to resist tear and wear. ｜ 可见于教令院智慧宫中的书柜，存放着大量教令院认证的书籍。这种书柜的尺寸较窄，通常与另一型号搭配使用。\n这些书柜采用了嵌入墙体的设计，不便维护，且尺寸较为高大，有时需要搭上梯子才能取到顶层的书籍，书柜的各个部位也需承受较大的压力。因此，在设计之时，工匠们就为其选择了厚重的板材与格外耐受损耗的处理工艺。
- Phonia. Presently the 7th Company's intelligence officer, and also the one who proposed this Wargame. ｜ 方妮雅。现任第七小队情报官，同时也是这次推演的提议人。
- Half a million... That's a lot of Mora. ｜ 五十万啊…可真不是小数目。
- No! They're creatures. You know, little fairies or something... ｜ 才不是啦！看起来像小动物、小精灵一样的东西…
- It's only been three hours... ｜ 才三个小时而已…
- Skill DMG Bonus|{param2:F1P} ATK/Stack ｜ 技能伤害加成|{param2:F1P}攻击力/层
- In short, though I was right behind your twin last time when I entered that portal, the next moment that I realized where I was... ｜ 总之，尽管那次我紧随着你的血亲进入了传送门，可当我认清四周的时候…
- Enough chit-chat. We should keep going — the deeper we go, the more we'll find. ｜ 不要在这里废话了，更深处肯定还藏着一些东西，得继续往前走。
- N—No, Paimon's super brave...! ｜ 我、我可没有那么胆小！
- About the lady beside you... ｜ 关于你身旁的女士…
- ...Mother? ｜ …母亲不在吗？
- The Steambird Culture and Arts Section ｜ 蒸汽鸟报文化艺术版
- Pretty Finchball ｜ 华丽雀雀球
- Survey 1 ｜ 探测1
- So what do you need? ｜ 客人需要些什么呀？
- I am here to collect a debt. ｜ 我是来讨债的。
- And indeed it is. Thanks for your patronage! ｜ 正是如此，收到了，五百摩拉！谢谢惠顾！
- It's Inayah! She's being attacked by wild animals! ｜ 果然是她！她被野兽缠上了！
- What's Jueyun Chili Chicken? ｜ 香嫩椒椒鸡？
- If there is anything else, please bring it up with my adjutant, citizen. ｜ 要是有什么其它事情的话，去找我的副官汇报吧，公民。
- I'm afraid of misleading him. If he loved venturing, would he grow to hate it after seeing me like this? ｜ 我害怕误导帕纽尔。如果他原本就喜爱远游，看见了我这副模样后，会不会厌弃远游？
- ... ｜ ……
- Huh? We're trapped in a life and death situation underground, and you're telling me it's time for Roasted Lavender Melon? ｜ 哈？发生了那么大的事情，你就叫我在这烤堇瓜？
- After a long journey, you have finally reached the enigmatic "Heart of Watatsumi"... ｜ 经历了漫长繁琐的求索，你们终于抵达了「海祇之心」的奥秘之地…
- Not gonna lie, but it seems like your brew will only make them mad. ｜ 这试剂看起来只会激怒它们。
- My amazing deck, you defeated it... Hmm, looks like I'll have to put it through some special training. ｜ 我的牌组居然输掉了…唔，看来我得让它们接受特训了。
- Defeat 1 opponent in 90 seconds ｜ 在90秒内击败1名敌人
- Observer limit reached ｜ 观看人数已满
- Dude! What up, bro!? I didn't know you were in Liyue too! Ah, it's always nice to run into a broad Inazuman fellow... Wait, did I say that right? ｜ 哎呀，没想到能在璃月见到兄弟你啊！欸，那句俗话是怎么说的来着…
- Okay then... Well, maybe if we ask nicely, he'll just let us take the Shield of Magnificent Honor for free? ｜ 那我们…想办法问问它，能不能把「光耀意志之盾」转让给我们？
- Once they've perfected the recipe, I'll facilitate getting the drink into the port for people to sample, and then handle the additional promotion. ｜ 等他们做好了之后，就由我牵线搭桥，把饮品先放在港口供人试喝，然后向外推广。
- Something has changed within this Domain... ｜ 秘境中似乎发生了某种变化…
- Huh... that location on the map is familiar, I've definitely been there before. ｜ 地图上这个地方，我一定去过，好眼熟。
- A woodcarving torso with hands modeled after the claws of the Rishboland Tiger. It can be used to assemble an "Aranara Carving." It is unpainted and has the unique texture and aroma of logs.\nRishboland Tigers often appear in the wilds of Sumeru. Their witty, brave, and curious behaviors are often portrayed in fairy tales. The woodcarving torso reminds people of Aranara who are as lively and energetic as Rishboland Tigers. ｜ 双手模仿长鬓虎爪的木刻躯干，可用于组装「兰那罗木刻」。未经上色，拥有原木的独特质感与香气。\n长鬓虎是须弥野外的常见野兽，因为种种习性，它们在童话里总是机智、勇敢、富有好奇心。而这种木刻躯干，塑造的就是那些行为与长鬓虎类似，比较好动活泼的兰那罗。
- Raises ATK level of all <color=#B09057FF>Veneficus Mechanici</color> by 1 when you select an <color=#B09057FF>Ominous Stick</color>. ｜ 选择此签后，选择<color=#B09057FF>「诡签」</color>时，便使所有<color=#B09057FF>「奇术机关」</color>的攻击等级提升1级。
- We won back the peace, saw the Vision Hunt Decree abolished, and the Commissions that exploited us have been knocked off their perches. Our Omikami's bones have now found rest as well... This is all thanks to you. Please, allow me to thank you once again on that account... ｜ 我们赢回了和平，扫除了「眼狩令」，而一直盘剥我们的恶奉行终于倒台…大御神的遗骨也获得了宁静，这些都多亏了您的努力。请容我再次感谢…
- There was a Pari who once sang thus— ｜ 曾有一位花灵如此诵唱——
- The Kitsune Saiguu was originally of the Hakushin bloodline, and she used to defend the people of Inazuma alongside the Electro Archon. ｜ 「狐斋宫」原本是白辰的血脉，曾与雷神同行，守护稻妻的子民。
- Before you know it, the moment has arrived. ｜ 很快，最后的时刻到来了。
- Light is the yearning of the land of thunder. The ruler who claims to have perceived all forever aims to hoard celestial glory. But this vision that cannot be shared only leads people to long for it more fiercely, like moths diving into the flame. ｜ 雷之国土的愿望是天光。自认通透一切的大君，永远企图将高天之光彩尽收囊中。然而无从分享的愿景，却反令须臾之人更加炽烈地追求，犹如飞蛾扑火。
- Tales From the Waves: Rising Tide ｜ 浮浪记·潮起
- Hmm...? ｜ 嗯…？
- Alright, let's meet here again tomorrow morning. I should hurry home and create some kind of lesson plan. If I'm going to become an instructor, I should make sure I show up prepared. ｜ 那我们明天再在这里碰面吧。我得赶紧回去写一份教学计划，既然答应了学长，就得把事情办好。
- Charged Attack Final DMG|{param6:P} ｜ 重击终结伤害|{param6:P}
- ...A world of despair and fear, where enemies lurk at every turn... devoid of even a single shred of light. ｜ …他们的世界里充满了绝望与恐惧，四周环伺的都是敌人…照不进一丝光明。
- Talk to everyone ｜ 与众人讨论
- Joel asks you to ahead into the mountain to look for his father, who has yet to return from an adventure of his own... ｜ 乔尔拜托你前往雪山，寻找自己进入雪山中探险至今未归的父亲…
- Stardust Exchange ｜ 星尘兑换
- Pyro DMG Bonus ｜ 火元素伤害加成
- An opponent's movement largely depends on the structure of their joints. Perhaps one could formulate a hypothesis through calculating their limits. ｜ 关节的结构决定了最大可能的运动状态，或可求其极限进行推论。
- Sail to where the treasure lies ｜ 驾船前往「宝藏」所在之地
- Never knew I could fetch such a high price. ｜ 原来我这么值钱。
- Time Remaining: #1#s ｜ 剩余时间：#1#秒
- To help everyone really cut loose and enjoy themselves to the fullest, Venti and I have carefully prepared three themes, to be revealed over the course of three days! ｜ 为了让大家玩得尽兴，我和温迪精心准备了三个主题，分三天揭晓。
- And this outsider remains the Master of the Jinni. Though the Jinni herself has long gone silent, we can gain control over her as long as we get rid of her master. ｜ #况且，{M#他}{F#她}仍旧是「镇灵主人」，即使镇灵已经不再言语…只要除掉{M#他}{F#她}，便有可能夺取镇灵的控制。
- You must find a way to recreate the circumstances of that day. ｜ 你要想办法，重现那天的情景。
- There's so much that I want to say, but... I can't. ｜ 我有好多话想说，但开不了口啊…
- The Waverider is a very mysterious waterborne vehicle that can be summoned to its skipper's side using a Waverider Waypoint. Get close to the Waverider to board and set sail.\nYou can summon it from a Waverider Waypoint at any time, but one person can only own one Waverider. ｜ 「浪船」是非常神奇的水上载具，能通过「浪船锚点」召唤到船主的身边。靠近浪船以搭乘行驶。\n尽管可以随时通过浪船锚点召唤，但每个人只能拥有一艘浪船。
- Haha, it's pretty good, right? I must say, writing marketing material is one of my strong suits! ｜ 哈哈，还不错吧？在写宣传的文本这一点上，我也是很有自信的。
- Ah, right, I'm kinda getting off-topic here. You were talking about taking some pictures, right? Need any help? ｜ 扯远了，我记得你刚说要拍画片，需要我帮忙吗？
- Gives 50 Hydro Energy to all party members ｜ 队伍角色获得50点水元素能量
- It's obvious why Kautilya kept running into dead ends before Mr. Elchingen sponsored him financially. ｜ 这么看来，在埃尔欣根先生出资赞助前，考特里亚什么事也没办成，不是没有道理的。
- Even if it's not an overnight sensation, I'll still compensate you for helping out with the shoot. A win-win situation, no? ｜ 就算不能一炮而红，协助拍摄的酬劳总归是会支付的，你们也不会亏。
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Uh, yes, this drink is, uhh... very creative. Connor, I think you should taste it. ｜ 这杯酒真是，呃，创意十足，康纳，不然你先来…
- Unforeseen Circumstances ｜ 天有不测风云
- Happy Times ｜ 开心时光
- Foggy Forest Branch... Very not many! But boxes, very many! ｜ 幽林枝…十分很不多！但是箱子，十分很多！
- So, you said this is to help out the kids and old folks of Mondstadt, right? Sounds like a great cause! ｜ 按你的说法，义卖活动是为了蒙德的孩子和老人们好嘛，意义重大！
- I knew you would understand. ｜ 你果然懂。
- We ask all shipments of military equipment and material to leave the borders of Inazuma and Sangonomiya immediately. The Fatui and all related personnel are included in this order. ｜ 请战时武备物资承包商即刻离开稻妻及珊瑚宫领内，愚人众及相关人员不得留住。
- #{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} CD|{param7:F1}s ｜ 点按冷却时间|{param7:F1}秒
- It was a... moving melody, and it made me feel relaxed and at ease. I... couldn't help but stay and listen. ｜ 乐声…悠扬动听，令人心情和缓，我…忍不住多听了一阵。
- Adeptal Mirror Reward ｜ 洞天宝鉴奖励
- Hmm... I'll choose... ｜ 我猜…
- Surprised to see us? We came to wish you good luck in the competition! ｜ 嘿嘿，很惊喜吗？我们是来给你加油的！
- Moving forward, it's up to me to get stronger, so that I can become an Adventurer just as reliable as you! ｜ 接下来我会努力变强，成为像前辈一样可靠的冒险家的！
- It's my hope that a brave fish will take my bait, and venture outside of their dark and murky pool. ｜ 希望我留下的暗示，能让一条鱼勇敢地从池子里跳出来。
- ...What? ｜ …欸？
- This rectangular coffee table, found in the Fortress of Meropide, is crafted from exceptionally high-quality Linden Wood. The tabletop is spacious and smooth, providing ample room for arranging tea sets and snacks, making it an excellent choice for relaxing tea breaks. For those accustomed to working at such desks, the head nurse offers a crucial piece of advice — "The height of your coffee table is not suitable for reading or office work. If you need to work, please use a conventional office desk instead." ｜ 可见于梅洛彼得堡内的方形茶几，以品相卓越的「椴木」板材打造而成，桌面宽大平整，有着充足的空间摆放茶具和点心，是饮茶休憩时的上佳选择。对于习惯在这种茶几上工作的人，护士长给出了关键的建议——「茶几的高度并不适宜阅读或办公，若有办公需要的话，建议还是使用常规的办公桌哦」。
- Not exactly... Anyway, if it's rocks you need help with, I can most certainly lend a hand. ｜ 也不能说是记性不好…不过，只是石头的话，我一定能帮上忙。
- But... ｜ 但这样的话…
- "Oh, this is undoubtedly the Sacred Mountain's interior, but even I... know not how long it has been since I saw such a sight..." ｜ 「这里毫无疑问是圣山之内，不过即使是我…也不知道上一次看到如斯景象是什么时候了…」
- Heh, how rude. ｜ 真没礼貌。
- Reach {param0} Poetry Gala Fervor ｜ 诗歌会热度达到{param0}
- (The Sumpter Beast seems to recognize you, shaking its head from side to side as it does.) ｜ （好像认出了你，晃了晃脑袋。）
- Fateh ｜ 法图赫
- Chihu Rock Bulletin Board ｜ 吃虎岩公告板
- Is there anything I can help you with? ｜ 有什么能帮助您的吗？
- Albedo once led a simple and content existence.\nThere was no need for him to contemplate anything. Life was uneventful, its meaning consisted of nothing more than accompanying his teacher, doing what she asked of him, and meeting her expectations.\nBut one day, deep in the heart of a dungeon, master and apprentice discovered an artifact known as The Heart of Naberius.\nAnd with that, his master disappeared, leaving naught but a note, a recommendation letter, and a classical text behind.\nUpon the note was written: "Albedo, go to Mondstadt. Find my old friend, Alice, and give her the recommendation letter. Then, complete your final assignment."\nThe classical text was one of the last extant manuscripts of the Opus Magnum from his master's collection.\nIf one were to push the definition a little, she had left him another gift — the title of Kreideprinz, and with it, a written acknowledgment that she had nothing further to teach him.\nIn the past, Albedo's assignments had always been very difficult.\nHe had always believed wholeheartedly that his master would make good on her threat to leave him, should he fail.\nBut this assignment she had left to him was far too hard, far beyond the limit of his abilities.\nDid this mean, then, that he was fated to never complete it, and thus never see his master again?\n"Your final assignment: show me the truth and the meaning of this world." ｜ 曾经的阿贝多过着简单而又快乐的生活。\n他不用思考什么。生命似乎是单调的，意义仅在于陪伴师父、完成师父的吩咐、达成师父的期待。\n然而某一天，这对师徒在世界的深处找到一件名为「纳贝里士之心」的圣遗物。\n从那以后，师父便消失了。只留下了字条、一封推荐信和一部典籍。\n字条上写着：让阿贝多前往蒙德，寻找师父的故交艾莉丝，转交推荐信，并完成最后的课题。\n典籍，则是师父珍藏的「大仪秘典」残章。\n此外，还有一件较为特殊的礼物：师父对阿贝多出师一事给予书面认可，并授予他「白垩之子」的称号。\n阿贝多从前面对的每一个课题都很困难。\n他也相信，师父那些「办不到就抛弃你」的威胁，每一次都是认真说出口的。\n但现在，阿贝多接到的这个课题实在太过困难，已经超出了他能承受的极限…\n这是否意味着他再也没有完成课题、与师父重聚的机会了呢？\n「最后的课题：向我展示世界的真相，与世界的意义。」
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- Ar! Do I spy me some pieces of eight? Hand 'em over! ｜ 那个，抢劫…
- Barbara's Letter ｜ 芭芭拉的信
- Light up the Watatsumi Island and Seirai Island areas of the Inazuma map. ｜ 点亮稻妻区域中，海祇岛与清籁岛的地图。
- Wait, aren't you coming with us? ｜ 欸？你不跟我们一起去吗？
- ...So you did come over. I was wondering if you'd notice me. Looks like my concealment failed this time. ｜ …你过来了啊，我还在想你会不会发现我，看来这次隐蔽失败了。
- Should you say that it was... fortunate that Royce ate that first? ｜ 该说…好在是先让罗伊斯吃掉了吗？
- (Honestly, Paimon's feeling kinda lost already, but at least he seems pleased with what you said.) ｜ （刚才他到底说的什么，说实话我已经完全晕了，但看样子他对你的反应还挺满意的。）
- A Mellow Voice ｜ 「醇厚之声」
- Mihir. That foolish familiar of thorns... She must be suffering right now. ｜ 米希尔。愚痴的荆棘眷属…看样子，如今应该正在受苦吧。
- Mysterious Message ｜ (test)神秘的讯息
- Oh my, this tavern's so lively, I feel like I've performed several shows back to back. Ah... if only I had some tea to soothe my throat. ｜ 这酒馆里好生热闹，就像是连演着大戏似的，唔…如果现在能有一碗茶润润喉嗓就更好了。
- Passage's Plentiful Produce ｜ 「回廊的本价丰甘」
- Jamikayomars is located at the entrance of Mawtiyima. Use the elixir to awaken him and open up the closed passageway. ｜ 「阎迦由玛」正位于「无郁夷摩」的入口，使用灵药唤醒他，打开封闭的通道吧。
- Mild Waves ｜ 轻波微荡
- Silence. ｜ 闭嘴。
- He must have discovered enough valuable results after visiting the mysterious island to decide that he should end his journey. Once you've achieved the results you want, any additional journeys would become all but meaningless. ｜ 他必然是在神秘岛找到了足够有价值的「结果」，才选择结束旅途。获得「结果」后，多余的旅途毫无意义。
- Get the truth behind Cesar's death from Lorenzo ｜ 问出塞萨尔坠亡的真相
- I'm sure they could help you sharpen your skills! ｜ 说不定可以帮忙提升派蒙的飞行技巧呢。
- Eight Locales Over Mountains and Seas: Blazing Poetry ｜ 山海八所巡礼·炎炎连歌百韵
- Chatillon ｜ 沙蒂永
- Achievement: Bowmaster ｜ 成就·强弓
- An Abyss Mage was seen performing a ritual on the hilichurls. Defeat them to put an end to this threat. ｜ 一名深渊法师正对丘丘人进行怪异的仪式。前去消灭所有魔物，清除这股威胁。
- Huh, that's true. Plus, the sages probably weren't counting on there being other factors beyond their control — like Nahida and us. ｜ 唔，的确如此，更何况贤者应该想不到有我们和纳西妲这样的不稳定因素在吧。
- Thank you, Miss. Enjoy your drink with Mr. Garcia. ｜ 谢谢您，小姐。祝您和先生喝得愉快。
- Namecard style.\nThe years come and go. Only remembrance and the winds that return do not change. ｜ 名片纹饰。\n岁月流转，唯有思念与归风不变。
- Energy Cost|{param5:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param5:I}
- There are runes left by Nara and Aranara there, for not forgetting and for recalling after forgetting. Go there and find the Barsam Flower! ｜ 那里有那菈们和兰那罗一起留下来的符文，为了不忘记，为了忘记后可以查看。去那里，可以找到「钵参花」！
- If you forgot, that means it's not important. ｜ 如果你忘了，那说明这不重要。
- Wait, please don't do this in front of a guide! I can't let a tourist go on some dangerous journey all alone. Even my sweet mom would give me a harsh scolding if I ever let you do that. ｜ 等一下，不要在一名向导面前做这种决定！放任游客独自踏上危险的旅途，就连最疼我的妈妈也会骂我的。
- Wow, I never thought I'd get to take a walk down the country lanes while I'm here! Did you set all this up just for me? ｜ 真没想到这里也有乡街子逛！难不成是专门为我而设的吗？
- We issued a warning to those two troublemakers. Try not to let them get to you. ｜ 那两个坏小子已经被我们警告了，希望他们没有影响到你的心情。
- What, still don't want to admit you were wrong? I'd really like to hear just what other enlightened opinions you still have to offer. ｜ 怎么，你还想嘴硬？我倒要听听，你还有什么高见。
- Talk to Genevieve ｜ 与格内薇芙对话
- I... I'm going to the Knights of Favonius library! There must be some guidance there on the subject of love! ｜ 我…这就去骑士团的图书馆找找看！那里一定会有「恋爱」的指南！
- Overgrown Valley ｜ 蔓生溪谷
- Atsuko, who is living in Liyue, seems to have something on her mind... ｜ 在璃月的竺子似乎正在为了什么事情而烦恼…
- #{NICKNAME}! I—It seems we don't have a choice. Looks like Nacker really does deserve a good beating! ｜ #{NICKNAME}！看、看来我们只能咚咚咚地揍扁纳克这个坏蛋了！
- Marechaussee Hunters? Hah, that fairy tale, you mean? What, you expect me to believe you're one of them? ｜ 逐影猎人？呵，你们以为这种哄小孩子的说辞我也会信吗？
- We received your commission request. ｜ 我们收到了你们的委托。
- Oh, you're a traveler... Well, you see, I'm a merchant, and I often shuttle between Mondstadt and Liyue on business. ｜ 啊？是旅行者啊…是这样，我是个商人，一直在蒙德城和璃月港之间跑生意。
- Bed ｜ 床
- Fell Dragon's Monocle ｜ 恶龙的单片镜
- Despite losing the Pilgrimage so many times, what kept me going was the belief that someday I'd win and earn a spot in the Night Warden Wars. ｜ 我曾经在归火圣夜巡礼中失败过许多次，支持我坚持下去的信念，就是赢下比赛，去参加巡夜者战争。
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}
- It was actually Sensei who gave me this outfit. They said it was modeled after the mujina, and it could help with escapes, or something... and then Sensei said that I was all grown up and ready to go it alone, but that I should still be careful to protect myself... then they left me. Am I really ready to go it alone, at my height?\nUm... Hmm? Y—You'll keep my company? Really? Promise you won't leave me? ｜ 其实这套衣服是老师给我的，说是以貉为原型做的，还有助于我逃跑什么的…然后又说我已经长大了可以独当一面了，但也要保护好自己，说完老师就离开了我。可我这个身高，真的能独当一面吗…\n唔…欸？你是说你会陪着我吗？你真的不会离开我吗？
- C'mon, let's go! ｜ 我们快过去吧！
- You enter Sylvain's room. He looks much calmer... ｜ 你们一起进入了席尔万的房间。席尔万看起来已经冷静了许多…
- I've relied almost solely on Stormstress for the entire preliminary round. It also helped me realize that there are weaknesses in my team. ｜ 预赛的时候，我几乎完全是靠着「信风舞姬」的力量战胜对手的，这也让我发现了队伍的不足之处。
- Lost Traveler in the Ashen Realm ｜ 流灰之国的迷旅人
- Delusion Factory ｜ 邪眼工厂
- ...Well, now that you've put it that way, I can no longer refuse. ｜ …哈，既然你这么说，我也不能再反驳了。
- Oh, Kaveh! You're home! ｜ 卡维！原来你在家呀！
- Hm? You alright? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，有事吗？
- What was that just now? It looked like Abyssal energy was flowing out of her, but then a split-second later, it disappeared... ｜ 刚刚突然有很像深渊力量的东西冒出来，但又瞬间消失了，难道这是因为…

---
### Part 138

- Enkanomiya ｜ 渊下宫
- The standard ceiling of a lofty tower made from volcanic rocks of regular shape that have excellent structural integrity, along with anti-fouling and damp-proofing properties. They say that past artisans would glaze-seal stone slabs to ensure waxy and lustrous surfaces after processing. And before that sealing process, many slabs would be packaged in a phlogiston mold to be baked for a good long while. Once the slabs were retrieved, the remaining phlogiston mold for the ceiling would then take on the radiance that gives both the stone slabs processed in it and the material used to make the ceiling their names. ｜ 「昂扬高塔」的标准天花板，以形状规则的火山岩原料制成，在有着足够结构强度的同时，又兼具防污与防潮功能。据说，过去为了让石板在加工后表面覆盖有蜡质且充满光泽，工匠们对石板进行封釉处理。而在封釉处理前，多块石板会被同时包裹进入燃素模具，并进行长时间的烘烤。当石板被取出后，剩余的燃素模具会遗留出一个正在发光的「天井」形状，经过这一工艺处理的石板也因此而得名，并成为了天花板用料的代名词。
- How much longer does your Master plan to hold them off... ｜ 老爷他们打算扛到什么时候啊…
- A chat? Is there some commercial matter you wish to inquire about? ｜ 聊天？你的意思是，有什么商业问题想同我探讨吗？
- On the subject of said kite, however, one simply must remark on the genius of its windless lift technology. One cannot help but surmise that its ingenuity rivals that of Cloud Retainer's creations... ｜ 不过话说回来，这无风自起之术倒是自有几分奥妙，从机巧角度上来说…和留云的机关术倒是难分伯仲…
- Paimon's always felt like he's the type who easily gets himself into tough spots. ｜ 上次见他就觉得了，他好像很容易陷入困境呢。
- Don't say that, Ann. ｜ 不是这样的，安。
- You missed your chance to head to the mysterious island and have no choice but to wait, but Mualani seems to have found an opportunity to mend the rift in the team... ｜ 你们错失了前往神秘岛机会，只能选择等待，但玛拉妮似乎找到了弥合团队裂痕的机会…

- ??? ｜ ？？？

- Various bizarrely-shaped machines that have taken different forms and functions as an adaption to different goals.\nLegend has it that they were war machines left behind by a nation that has now been destroyed. Leaving its hard armor and powerful abilities aside, some believe that the design of these ruin machines has greater value in the study of biomimesis than the more common Ruin Guards. ｜ 各种为了适应不同的目标，有着定制化外形与机能的异形机械。\n传说是已经覆灭的国度留下的战争机械。且不论坚硬的装甲与强大的性能，有人认为这种遗迹机关的设计相比更为广泛存在的「遗迹守卫」，在设计上有更强的仿生学意义。
- The world opens itself before those with noble hearts. ｜ 只要不失去你的崇高，整个世界都会向你敞开。

- He's famous for his combat abilities. I'm sure he'll be up and about soon! ｜ 这位大人可是以赫赫战功闻名，大概用不了多久就会再次活跃起来的！
- But the Tonatiuh did hold greater significance to him beyond his ambitions as an adventurer. ｜ 但是除了作为冒险家的野心之外，天蛇船对他来说还有更重要的意义。
- Beidou's ship is amazing! If I hadn't promised Ganyu that I wouldn't go on board anymore, I know exactly where I'd set up my own little bed, hee-hee. ｜ 北斗姐姐的船，好气派~要不是我和甘雨姐姐约好了不往船上跑，我连要在哪里搭个小小的床铺都想好了。
- Bye. Good luck with everything. ｜ 再见，祝您一切顺利。
- Finished? Do you see now? ｜ 看完了吗？是不是明白了什么。
- You look well. ｜ 你看起来气色不错。

- (Book circulation is strictly regulated and there is a log of anyone who checks out a book.) ｜ （书籍的管理很严格，借阅者一定会留下记录。）

- She's too harsh on herself. ｜ 她对自己太苛刻。
- Doesn't look like we'll be able to find anyone here... The monsters are all that's left. ｜ 全是魔物…好像已经没有人了。
- But when Ioroi dared to steal the ward for the Cleansing Ritual, well, that was enough to get him punished. Since the "Yougou Three" were mentioned in your story, then it was probably Kamuna... an onmyouji from a past age, who did the deed. ｜ 但是，连「大祓」所需的镇物也敢偷，那确实会受到惩罚呢。听你们的说法，既然是「影向役者三人组」，那多半是惟神…过去一名阴阳师下的手。

- A dedicated Karasu Ramen Master who fixates on recipes in the sweet dream state.\nUnfortunately, this Master will descend into a fury in the nightmare state from losing a full day's earnings to dining-and-dashing customers, and thus begin chasing the little kitsune relentlessly... ｜ 兢兢业业的乌鸦拉面师傅，在美梦状态下，只会认真地思考食谱。\n不过，由于这位师傅曾经被客人吃霸王餐而损失了一天收入，在噩梦状态下会陷入愤怒，不停追逐小狐狸…
- But of course! And when the time comes, you can hand in your homework first! ｜ 当然不会忘了你啦，到时候，就请你第一个交作业了。
- An ink bottle utilized by the witch in the story. It possesses a strange enchantment no less powerful than the one cast upon the dip pen. ｜ 故事中的女巫所借助的墨水瓶，有着不逊于蘸水笔的神奇魔法。
- "Those who emerge victorious by adapting to their opponent's moves may be said to be divine." Tactical flexibility is often the key to victory, so harness the experience you've gained from the previous drills and defeat your enemies however you see fit! ｜ 「能因敌变化而取胜者，谓之神。」灵活的战术往往是胜利的关键所在，充分利用之前演练的经验，自由击败所面之敌吧！
- Break the seal outside the Astral Assemblage to unleash the power contained in this place. ｜ 击碎「象拟聚星」外的封印，解放此处原本的力量吧。

- So who is that visitor, exactly? ｜ 所以那位来客是谁？

- That's all. ｜ 没有了。

- About the earthquake just a while ago... ｜ 关于刚才的地震…

- "In the name of Narukami's envoy." ｜ 「鸣神敕使」。
- That's weird... ｜ 奇怪了…
- Uh, no—nope... Paimon has no idea what that could be! ｜ 没，没有。派蒙不知道哦。

- Woah, Paimon didn't know you could make potions like that! Sounds awesome! ｜ 哇，居然能炼制出这样的药剂吗？我的兴趣上来了！

- Wow, Idyia, you're so pretty! ｜ 伊迪娅姐姐好漂亮！
- I don't like this Withering Zone. Let me deal with it. ｜ 这死域我看着不顺眼，让我上吧。

- I've marked the location of those ore veins on your map. Poke your nose around those parts, and you'll turn up something for sure. ｜ …矿脉的位置我已经给你在地图上画出来了，你去这附近转转，应该会有所收获的。
- Let's see... "God of Thunder, heed our call"... ｜ 我来看看吧…「天尊雷祇，今我奏命」…

- Seen anyone who looks a lot like me? ｜ 你见过长得和我很像的人吗？
- You're my important assistant, Paimon. ｜ 派蒙是我重要的助理喔。
- Nothing turns a frown upside down like good food! How about some Macarons? I could make you some! ｜ 都说吃了好吃的，心情就会变好！欸，不如我做点马卡龙给你吃吧！
- There have been so many things that need taking care of lately, so I might have to bother you with cleanup duties next time as well. ｜ 近期还有不少要花精力的事，下次清理可能还要麻烦您了。
- (Now it seems like the hook rope was not meant for another magic trick, but was instead some form of triggering mechanism.) ｜ （现在看来，那个钩绳并不是其他魔术的道具，而是某种触发装置。）
- Find the treasure clue ｜ 寻找宝藏的线索$UNRELEASED$HIDDEN
- People like me obviously don't have much clout in this tribe, so it's not like I can offer you much in return. ｜ 毕竟像我这样的家伙，在族里根本说不上什么话，没有什么能回报的。
- Hmm? Who are these people at the tea party? Why, they are my loyal followers of course! *sigh* Alright, I suppose I'll introduce them to you. This is Mademoiselle Crabaletta, my most adorable maid... although she accidentally cuts my outfits from time to time... This is Surintendante Chevalmarin, my reliable housekeeper who keeps my busy life in order. And finally, the one keeping everybody in line is Gentilhomme Usher, my loyal conferencier. Hehe, I may have allowed you to participate in my tea party, but you'll still need to work hard to gain their approval! ｜ 你问我参加茶会的这几个小家伙？它们可是我忠实的追随者，咳，今天就破例为你介绍一下吧！这位是谢贝蕾妲小姐，最可爱的女仆，虽然有时会不小心剪坏我的衣服；这位是海薇玛夫人，可靠的管理人，将我的生活打理得井井有条；最后这位喜欢说教的是乌瑟勋爵，负责一切礼仪相关的事情。呵呵，虽然我已允许你参加我的茶会，但想要得到它们的认可，你还要多多努力才行！
- Spot a total of {param2} Weaknesses during a single challenge in the current stage ｜ 本关单次挑战捕获的破绽总数达到{param2}
- Nothing... I just... I think it's a great shame. ｜ 没事…只是…感觉有点惋惜。
- And finally, you can sit yourself down at a café and appreciate a cup of coffee. ｜ 最后您必须得去咖啡馆点一杯咖啡，坐下来慢慢品尝。
- Hmm... Are you sure my testimony would be valid? Maybe I just had an accident that was totally unrelated to the Locusts. ｜ 嗯——可是我的证言真的有效吗？仔细想想，也有可能是和蚱蜢派无关的意外事故呢。
- Bing-Bang Finchball: Free & Easy Fun! ｜ 哐哐当当雀雀球·自娱自乐
- Come on, Baulande! You can do it! ｜ 博兰德！加油！快找出来！
- Is that so... Maybe I should consider asking the Adventurers' Guild to open a branch here. ｜ 呵，都想让他们到梅洛彼得堡开个分部了。
- You have come far indeed to become a Legend, but the road ahead is still long. ｜ 作为牌手的路已经走了许多，但是前面仍有许多路要走。
- That's me! ｜ 就是我啦。
- Excuse me for asking this, Clorinde, but... how old were you, exactly, when all of this happened? ｜ 冒昧问一句，克洛琳德小姐，那时的你…几岁呀？
- Ugh, there's no need to be so awkward! I won't get mad anyhow from now on, and you can count on that! ｜ 哎呀！你们也不要这么尴尬了！我之后不会随随便便生气了，请你们监督！好了吧！

- Agafya... What's going on? I was just sleeping. I feel all better now. ｜ 阿加霞，怎么了，出什么事了…我只是在这儿睡了一觉，不过身体已经舒服很多啦。

- What happened here? Let's check this area out. We might find some clues! ｜ 这到底是怎么回事…我们去周围看看吧，说不定会有什么线索呢。

- Speaking of which, to think you managed to return so quickly... What speed! ｜ 话说回来，你居然这么快就回到城里了，可怕的速度…
- Too little? You can't even do a simple job right, and you want more money? This is the amount you deserve! ｜ 嫌少？这么点小事都办不好，还指望白拿多少钱？这些就是你们应得的酬劳，拿好了。
