- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Heated Battle Mode Rules</color>\nIn The Cat's Tail, entertaining events are held regularly, with various players being invited to participate.\nEach event will adopt a special set of Heated Battle Mode rules.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Invite Teammate</color>\nYou can invite a teammate within your world to engage in a Genius Invokation TCG duel in Heated Battle Mode, where special rules apply.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Match-Making</color>\nThis will unlock once you reach Player Level 4. You can use this mode to match against players at the same power level as you and duel them in Heated Battle Mode, where special rules apply.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Heated Battle Mode Rewards</color>\nIn each season of this activity, you can even gain Lucky Coins as a reward for the first 3 teammate invites or match-made Heated Battle Mode games you complete. (Actively-forfeited matches will not count toward progress) ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【热斗模式规则】</color>\n在猫尾酒馆中，会定期举办让各位牌手参加的趣味对局活动。\n每期活动，都会启用一个特殊的「热斗模式」规则。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【邀请队友】</color>\n可以邀请你的世界内的队友，在特殊规则下进行「七圣召唤：热斗模式」的决斗对局。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【匹配】</color>\n牌手等级到达4级后开启。可以通过该模式匹配到实力相当的牌手，在特殊规则下进行「七圣召唤：热斗模式」的决斗对局。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【热斗模式奖励】</color>\n每期活动中，通过邀请队友或匹配完成的前三场「七圣召唤：热斗模式」的对局，还能获得幸运牌币奖励。（主动放弃对局将无法累计完成对局进度）

- But just yesterday, for example, I saw him cutting down trees for the village head. In the space of one afternoon, he did what most people couldn't finish in three days. Not only that, but he managed to fell a Lavender Melon Tree with just one kick! ｜ 可我昨天看见他帮村长砍树，一下午干完了其他人三天干不完的活，还一脚就把堇瓜树给踢倒了，啧啧。
- Poor Faurobert. We've squashed that poor froggy flat under the weight of our expectations. ｜ 可怜的福罗贝尔，一定是咱们给他的期望太大，把这可怜蛙压垮了。
- Hey there! We came to congratulate you as well! ｜ 嗨！我们也是来恭喜你的哦！
- It's unlikely we'll be able to climb back up that far. We'll need to find another way. ｜ 这种距离，看来是没法直接上去了，得另外找出路。

- The least I can do is to make sure that the same tragedy will not happen again in my new home. ｜ 至少不能让我目前的栖身之所，重演曾经的那些悲剧。
- Besides, if we can repair the Mikage Furnace in time, everything will return to normal even if we do destroy the containment dome. ｜ 而且，就算我们破坏了护罩，只要我们及时处理好「御影炉心」的问题，那一切也会迅速恢复正常。
- I now know what it means to come to the end of one's days... To yearn to see this one thing done, or to receive that single clear answer — and to be willing to do anything to accomplish these goals. ｜ 在生命的终日到来之前…真的会那样渴求地看到一件事的结果，或者得到一个明确的答案，甚至愿意为此不择手段。
- 7 × 5 × 7 ｜ 7·5·7
- What's... gotten into you? Is this about wanting me to put in a good word for you in my report? ｜ 这…这种时候突然说这些干什么？想让我在报告里给你说好话吗？
- ...Oh, right. I remember now. You're here about those medicines, yes? ｜ 噢…我知道了，你是来问那些药物的事吧？
- You rescued the survivors here, paying the utmost respect to those who made the ultimate sacrifice, fighting here until the very last moment. ｜ 救下了这里的幸存者，向奋战到最后一刻的牺牲者致以崇高的敬意。
- And like how we also call the best travel buddy "emergency food"... ｜ 「最好的伙伴」也叫「应急食品」…

- Water from a river that flows near the Evernight Temple. It shines with a faint light in the darkness. Directly ingesting this liquid will not cause you to forget anything, but the Dragonbone Orb created through its auspices has this effect. ｜ 在常夜灵庙附近的河流中取出的水，会在黑暗中发出微小的光芒。直接饮用它并不会让人遗忘什么，但其催生的龙骨花凝珠却有着近似的作用。

- Never mind. I'll keep looking. ｜ 算了，我再找找看。

- Life flows like water, and rain is the final answer. The water levels may sometimes tilt one way or another, but the rain falls fairly upon all. ｜ 生命如水流般循环不息，雨是最终的回答。水偶尔倾斜，雨却会公平地降下。

- The Knights of Favonius are actually fairly reasonable, at the very least they reward merit and not social status. The reason they invited me to join their ranks is because I'd sparred with some of their crack troops and won through my own sheer skill. Being an insider in the organization will make getting revenge much easier, as it removes many of life's complications, so what's not to love? ｜ 西风骑士团倒还挺像样的，至少他们更看重一个人的「才能」而非「身份」。当年我和他们的精锐切磋过几次，用实力折服了他们，所以收到了入团邀请。在骑士团内部工作，复仇更方便了，生活中的麻烦也减少了，何乐而不为呢？

- Flint Ore gets its name from the radiant glow it harbors.\nWhen grasped in one's hand, one can feel the fiery pulse thrumming within the stone. - Come now, no need to hurt anyone's feelings. Besides, I specifically chose this place because I knew how much you like to drink. ｜ 这话说的，真叫人难过。我可是投你所好，特意挑了能喝酒的地方。

- Trust in the wisdom of the elderly is a tradition here. Since ancient times, all affairs in the town have been assessed by a committee of its elders. ｜ 相信年长者的智慧是佩特莉可镇的传统。自古以来，镇子上的大小事务都是由长者们组成的委员会来评定的。

- Weapon forging material. Can be used to forge 4-star swords. \nPhilosophers believe marble has the potential to be sculpted into a beautiful statue. Likewise, these billets have the potential to become something greater. ｜ 生产武器的原材料。通过锻造，可以生产出4星的单手剑。\n哲学中认为大理石蕴藏着成为美丽雕塑的潜能。这些原胚也孕育了无限可能。真让人期待。

- Now, only you can tread the final path. ｜ 现在，踏上最终之路的只有你自己了。

- As for the question of why it's important... As long as it does not affect your ability to perform the work, you'll gradually understand it as you put the process into practice. ｜ 至于「它究竟为什么重要」这种问题…只要不影响整体工作，在之后的实践中慢慢理解就好。
- Welcome to Liuli Pavilion! Do you have a reservation? ｜ 欢迎光临「琉璃亭」，请问客官有预订吗？

- Of course. Why don't you try this one? It's "Outlander Brigade: When the Wind of Death Blew Towards the Blond Samurai"! ｜ 可以可以，您先看看这本？——《异邦人喧哗旅-吹向金发武士的死亡之风》！
- Not at all! I don't need a degree. I'm satisfied with taking care of my Fungi buddies... ｜ 还不至于！我只要照顾好蕈兽伙伴们就心满意足了，完全不需要什么学位证书…

- "That the people of Vindagnyr revered the gods thusly is beyond doubt. Yet they were just as surely duped and deceived if they believed their duty to the gods beneficial to their lives in this world. The end that fate had decreed for them could not be called 'beautiful,' no matter how you look at it."\nAlong with Divinity (III)\n\nYou go forward with dreams and hope in your heart, but not without an indistinct sense of unease.\nIf you desire guidance or answers, rely not on that which is external and illusory.\nThe world is filled with a cacophony of views, but among them, your inner voice alone can know that which is truest. ｜ 「芬德尼尔的人们就是像这样虔敬神明，这是毋庸置疑的。然而，从另一方面来说，如果他们认为自己对神明所尽的义务有利于他们在世上的生活，那他们肯定是上当受骗了：命运为他们定下的结局，无论从何种角度考量，都称不上美好。」\n——与神性同行·卷三\n\n怀揣梦想与希望前行，心中却依然感到隐隐不安。\n若是渴望指引与答案，不必依赖虚无缥缈的外物，\n因为世间千言万语中，唯有内心的声音最为真实。
- #Oh, that's nothing for {M#him}{F#her}. ｜ #这对{NICKNAME}来说都是小意思啦！
- We're just ordinary tribal warriors with years of battle under our belt, and no glory to show for it. Not to mention the physical toll of all that fighting... We're no longer in our prime. ｜ 我们只是普通的部族战士，而且打了这么多年，身体已经开始走下坡路了，结果还没能拿到像样的荣誉。
- Hmm. It seems that I must now reveal my true identity... ｜ 原来如此，看来我不得不亮出身份了…
- Oh? Did you run into some trouble? ｜ 遇到什么麻烦了吗？
- I made myself a hat based on those of my Natlan friends. Pretty awesome, eh? ｜ 我照着纳塔朋友的帽子给自己也做了一顶，你瞧，很不错吧？
- ...Um, excuse me? I was about to begin my song... I'm trying to protect Mondstadt here. This had better be important. ｜ …嗯？你有事吗？我正想开始弹唱呢，可别耽误我守护蒙德。

- Um, is something wrong, Mister? ｜ 嗯，叔叔怎么了吗？
- I daren't imagine, however, how many times longer that period would have been without the tutelage of someone as gifted and patient as Nilou. ｜ 要不是有妮露这样优秀又有耐心的老师在，这个时间估计还会翻倍。
- Hmm... it looks like I mixed up my salt and my sugar. Savory Mizu Manjuu. Yes, this can work. I'll give them to Thoma. ｜ …啊，盐和糖弄错了。咸的水馒头…嗯，也行，给托马吃吧。
- Just think of it as a "you scratch my back, I'll scratch yours" type of situation... ｜ 绮良良就当「礼尚往来」…
- I'm Malinovskyi, commanding officer of the 34th Independent Investigative Squad. ｜ 我的名字是马林诺夫斯基，第三十四独立侦察小队的队长。

- So that's what he was using for his exorcisms... ｜ 原来他是在用它驱魔…

- I don't need help from the Fatui. ｜ 我不需要愚人众的帮助。

- A strange goblet strikingly similar in shape to a dragon's claw. Its maker must have made it with something special in mind. ｜ 造型酷似龙爪的奇异酒杯，制作者想必有其特殊的考虑吧。

- That unerring strike has been delivered countless times. ｜ 毫厘不差的斩击，或已斩出千万次。

- It seems quite a ways off from how it's supposed to taste... ｜ 和理想中的味道有些差距…
- When I was trapped, I spent so long solving puzzles that I became numb to even the flow of time. Now that I'm free again, I no longer have to face the puzzles of the world all on my own. Maybe we'll be able to spend some fun times together copying inscriptions, deciphering runes, and solving puzzles... Every minute should be savored. ｜ 那一百年间，我不断重复着解谜，不知不觉变得麻木，连时间的流动都感受不到…现在好了，面对谜题，我不必再独自彷徨了。也许可以和你一起拓抄碑文、破译字符、解构机关…好好地品味每分每秒的钻研时光。

- This doesn't seem to be useful either... But whatever, let's pick it up anyway. ｜ 这个好像也没用…不管怎么说，先捡起来吧。
- Getting points off them is a huge achievement! The way I see it, people aren't exaggerating one bit with the nicknames they give you. You are a genuine genius! ｜ 你能从他们手里拿到分数，已经很不容易啦！我觉得别人给你起的那些绰号一点错都没有，你是真正的天才！
- As the bright moonlight and the lanterns' glow interweave, the Tianquan dispenses with her usual dignity. Standing against a railing, she wishes for the Traveler to join her in admiring her new festive attire... ｜ 皎月素魄与华灯辉光交映，「天权」隐去了往日的威仪，正凭栏而立，要与旅者共赏她的鲜衣…
- Here, have a taste! Oh, you can't drink alcohol? What a shame. ｜ 尝一口你就…哦，是吗，还不能喝酒啊，真可惜。
- If you ask me, I would say this is almost an ideal place. I can easily separate myself from the outside world and enjoy some time to myself... ｜ 对我来说，这里是最理想的环境了。能够与外面暂时隔开，享受一段属于自己的时光…
- Patrice insisted over and over that the data's completeness was due to the invaluable aid of the local Adventurers' Guild... ｜ 虽然帕特里克一再申明，这些数据之所以如此详实，是由于当地冒险家协会对实验的鼎力协助…
- Everyone's got to learn how to deal with things despite the many frustrations they face, and Sayu is no different... ｜ 每个人都要在烦恼中学习如何与世界相处，早柚也不例外…
- Attain a score of {param2} in Steel Meets Steel ｜ 在「真剑对决」挑战中达到{param2}积分
- I can see that you have a good relationship with Master Kaeya. Please look after him... He's very dear to us. ｜ 我能看出来你和少爷的关系很好，少爷就拜托你多多照顾了。
- It's a shortcut. Haven't you seen one before? There should've been many of them along the way... ｜ 哦，这就是近路。之前没见过吗？路上应该有不少才对…
- Sure, let me think about it for a second... ｜ 好啊，让我想想…

- I don't want to go down in history as the librarian who could never get some books back, even up till the last day! ｜ 作为最后一天值班的管理员，我将会永世留下没有追回借书的污名。
- Adjust <color=#ffcc33>Horizontal Camera Sensitivity (Aimed Shot Mode)</color> and <color=#ffcc33>Vertical Camera Sensitivity (Aimed Shot Mode)</color> under Controls in the Settings menu to improve your ability to control your simulated shots. ｜ 通过调整「设置」界面下「控制」中的<color=#ffcc33>「镜头水平灵敏度（瞄准模式）」</color>和<color=#ffcc33>「镜头垂直灵敏度（瞄准模式）」</color>，可以改善模拟射击的操纵性。

- Scatter obstacles ｜ 阻碍扩散
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- A hat with three locks of hair. Can be used to build a Puffy Snowman.\nUsually, snowman hats of this kind are souvenirs made using dyed hair taken from pets. Children often forget themselves while making snowmen, even staying out past midnight. Some adults have taken a more firm hand in such matters, piling up snowmen of their own before sticking these souvenirs on the snowmen's heads and telling the children "if you sleep too late, your hair will fall out just like this snowman's." Surprisingly, this tactic has proved rather effective. ｜ 三缕头发状的帽子，可用于组装「噗噗雪人」。\n通常而言，这种造型别致的雪人帽子是用宠物毛发编织后染色的纪念品。由于孩子们在堆雪人时，总会玩得太过忘我，甚至到了午夜都不回家，有些家长便卷起袖子堆好雪人，将这种纪念品插在雪人头顶，告诉孩子们：「晚睡的话，你们的头发也会掉成这样哦」。没想到，这招还挺有成效。

- Weapon Ascension Material.\nWhen the Usurper of the sunken city played the last movement of the golden symphony, the favored musician stole the golden goblet brimming with Ichor.\nShocked by the foolhardy betrayal of the God King, the musician summoned the last guards, and used the insoluble Ichor to seal the dragon beneath the tall tower, and sank into the abyss with the capital.\nAfterwards, this noble thief vanished silently from history, and only the "Golden Troupe" faithfully remembers his prophecy. ｜ 赋予武器突破之力的材料。\n沉没之城的僭主弹奏黄金乐章的最后一曲时，深受宠渥的乐师窃走了满盛灵露的金杯。\n为神王的背叛愚行所震惊，乐师召集了最后的禁卫，用不溶的灵露将魔龙封印于高塔之下，同王城一起沉沦海渊。\n后来，这高贵窃贼的身影从历史上默默消湮，只有「金色剧团」仍忠诚地记得他的预言。

- That's your idea of simple, huh? ｜ 这叫简单？
- Kept looking for a way to save Irminsul... ｜ 不断找寻拯救世界树的方法…
- There's no way they sent this many people just to escort the bride... ｜ 单纯的迎亲，肯定用不着这么多人。
- Going undefeated all these years is just too boring! Hmph, so I just want to see the world, challenge fighters everywhere, and learn about foreign cultures. ｜ 这些年就一直没输过，不就没劲么，呵。就想着到外面儿去逛逛，挑战一下外地高手，同时也参观学习一下异国文化。

- I've heard that King Deshret once had loads of awesome animal friends! Sheep, wolves, and... and... what was that again...? ｜ 我之前听人说，赤王以前有好多要好的动物朋友呢！有羊，有狼，还有…什么来着…

- Not to mention dropping all those leaves. Paimon's hands are cramping up... ｜ 再加上我还放了那么多叶子，手都酸了…
- I ask for both parties to stand. May the Dendro Archon also serve as a witness to this duel of wits. ｜ 请参与双方站上前来，愿草神在上，与我等一同见证此次思维的交锋。

- I started selling a few odds and ends that I'd picked up over the years to earn a living. But business wasn't great and I soon ran out of things to sell anyway. ｜ 然后，我用自己之前搜集的一些零碎，在这里做点小生意谋生。但是这生意也不好做啊，东西也快卖光了…

- Ooh, it smells good! I bet it tastes amazing. Aw, now I really want to put something like this on our menu... ｜ 唔~真香！一定是道非常美味的料理，啊，我也好想要一道这样的菜放在我们店里呀…

- That is a seriously big hole... ｜ 这断口这么大…

- Ha! You'll always be our Captain in our hearts. ｜ 哈哈，在我们心里，你永远都是剑鱼二番队的队长。

- Dalong leaves after having been given half the popsicles, feeling quite pleased. After this small interlude, you and Chongyun continue discussing evil spirits. - #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>The blossoms drifting down from the Sacred Sakura are so dazzling!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon heard that those flower petals can stay suspended in the air for so long because of being infused with Electro.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Is it the same principle behind your levitation abilities?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Uh... Ah... That's because...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>You do know what allows you to fly, don't you, Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon can fly because of... mysterious powers, obviously!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Got it. Seems like you have no idea.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>How about we let Albedo do some research? He's good at cracking such mysteries...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Please don't! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>从神樱树上飘下来的绯樱绣球，真好看呀。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>听说花瓣因为雷元素的力量，可以长时间悬浮在空中。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙可以飞在空中，也是利用这种原理吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哎…这个…是因为…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>难道派蒙也不知道自己为什么会飞吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>派蒙会飞，当然是…是因为神秘的力量啦！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>明白了，你什么都不知道。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>既然如此，应该拿给神奇的阿贝多去研究一下…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不要哇！

- In Hundred-Pace Hurling Rites, players can throw Darts. Hitting any spot on the Holding Pots with Darts will award points. Holding the Throw button will allow you to aim. Release to throw the Dart. Hit as many Holding Pots as you can within the time limit to score points. The challenge will end once time is up or there are no more Pots left on the field. ｜ 在「百步礼掷」中，玩家可以投出「掷箭」，用「掷箭」命中容壶的任意位置即可获得积分。长按「投掷」键进行瞄准，松开后可投掷一发「掷箭」。在限定时间内尽可能命中更多的容壶，以获取积分。当时间结束，或台上已无容壶时，挑战结束。
- Outside of the city gates, there lies a blessed stretch of prairie by the lake, with lush vegetation and a gentle, pleasant breeze. ｜ 城郊湖畔有块宝地，微风轻拂，满目苍翠，怎能不叫人心旷神怡。

- Hmph... A tribesman who knows the inner workings of machinery? An eye-opener, to be sure. ｜ 哼…懂得机械奥妙的部落人？我算是开了眼界咯。

- Seelie are just empty husks that race left behind. This is because they were born with a curse: If they fall in love with Nara, they shall lose their intelligence and strength, and their bodies will regress. ｜ 仙灵只是那个种族最后留下的空壳。因为他们生来就背负着诅咒：如果与那菈相爱，那就会失去智慧与力量，身体也会退化。
- She did say she wanted to learn from us... Not that Paimon's gonna be doing much of the teaching... ｜ 毕竟，她都说要跟着我学了，呃，虽然我可能只是顺带的…
- I once ventured deep into the abyss and came face-to-face with an enormous beast. I don't know its name, all I know is the sight of it chilled me to the bone. But mark my words, one day I will march back in there and behead that beast, and you, comrade, will be my witness! ｜ 我曾经在世界的深渊与无名的巨大魔兽对视。总有一天，我会堂堂正正地，将那强大得令我骨髓冻结的怪物斩杀。届时，就拜托你当我的见证者了，伙伴！

- I know you two probably aren't used to that kind of talk, but I can promise you they only had the best of intentions. - We're in your "auditorium," and we're not going anywhere. ｜ 我们可以在「观众席」多待一会儿。
- Ah yes! The same Arataki Gang who made a scene at the Irodori Festival? ｜ 啊！是上次在容彩祭上捣乱的那个荒泷派吧？
- And don't worry, it isn't the cage key this time... ｜ 放心，这次不是笼子钥匙啦…

- The Traveler and I made one each. Here, have a taste while it's still warm. ｜ 我和旅行者的份都完成了，来，趁热品尝吧。
- Use the Kusava to summon Aranakin's power. Aranakin... trusts you will treat the Kusava well? ｜ 想要唤起兰纳真的力气，用「苦舍桓」就可以。兰纳真相信…你们会好好对待「苦舍桓」的吧？
- An Armored Crablord that has survived for countless eons and surpassed almost all other Fontemer Aberrants. The <color=#FFE14BFF>twin molten horns</color> located high up on its body are <color=#FFE14BFF>Pyro-aligned</color> organs that can unleash more vicious elemental attacks and grant it even stronger defensive capabilities. When the Armored Crablord unleashes certain attacks, its twin molten horns are <color=#FFE14BFF>closer to the ground</color>. This provides for a great opportunity to use <color=#FFE14BFF>Elemental Reactions</color> to remove the Pyro element within. ｜ 经历过无数年月的成长，超越了几乎一切原海异种的重甲蟹之王。身躯上方高处的<color=#FFE14BFF>熔火双角</color>是<color=#FFE14BFF>火元素</color>的身体器官，使其能够进行更猛烈的元素攻击，并且拥有更强的防御能力。在进行部分攻击时，它的熔火双角会<color=#FFE14BFF>更贴近地面</color>，是利用<color=#FFE14BFF>元素反应</color>消除其中火元素的好时机。
- #Hey {NICKNAME}, where are you going? Heyyyy... ｜ #喂，{NICKNAME}，你要去哪儿？喂——
- Huh... Fair enough, but it seems like it had the opposite effect. ｜ 呃…好吧，可信悟都被它吓破胆了。
- Whenever the instructor wore this brooch, it meant there would be no training sessions that day. ｜ 教官的胸口别着这种花的时候，意味着今日不练兵。

- Haha... Looks like we still have to go rafting a few more times... ｜ 哈哈…看来…我们得再漂流几次才行啊…
- You board a passenger ship bound for Port Ormos, enjoying the lovely ocean views along the way. ｜ 你们搭上了前往奥摩斯港的客船，纵览明媚的海上风光。
- I can secure food via fishing and hunting in the rainforest, and our shroom buddies can get the nutrients they need from the soil. ｜ 在雨林里，我的食物可以通过渔猎获得，蕈兽伙伴们可以直接汲取土壤中的养分。

- Why can't you stay in Lumidouce Harbor? ｜ 为什么不能待在柔灯港里？
- For that, we have you to thank. And Jean, for her unfailing devotion. ｜ 这多亏了你们，还有骑士团的琴团长，真是个虔诚的人呀。

- CD|{param4:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param4:F1}秒

- Use the Farrwick to link the circuit and activate the left machine door ｜ 借助「灵芯」连通线路开启左侧机关门
- Yeeeaaah! I beat someone from outside our village! I'm gonna tell Daddy all about this one. He'll be so pleased! ｜ 我打赢了庄外的人！爸爸要是知道了，一定会夸我厉害的！
- Some of the plants and water veins on the island mountains have been lost. Do you happen to know another way to dredge the blockages? ｜ 岛上有些山体失去了植物和水脉，请问你有办法疏通它们吗？
- But if you call for them in our language, they can't understand it, can they? ｜ 可是，用我们人的语言来呼唤它们的名字，小猫们肯定也听不懂吧？
- They're sooo huge... ｜ 大小太夸张了吧。
- Highwind Trial: Fierce Combat Test ｜ 高风的演试·猛攻演试
- Bring it on, I'm going all out this time! ｜ 来吧，这次我可要拿出真本事了。
- She was just provoking you. ｜ 别这么简单就被挑拨啦…
- I don't have the time right now. ｜ 现在没空。
- I won't. ｜ 当然不会。
- (Pat his tummy...) ｜ （摸摸它的肚子…）
- Haha, young one... you can't resist the thought of treasure, can you? ｜ 呵呵，年轻人…一听到「宝」字，这颗心就摁不住了。
- Then let the game begin! ｜ 那我们直接开始吧。
- What else is there to say about myself? ｜ 关于我自己还有什么可说的呢。
- More About Kuki Shinobu: II ｜ 想要了解久岐忍·其二
- A vibrant market street based on the Stadium of the Sacred Flame's Chuwen Fair. Shops and stalls of all colors stand shoulder to shoulder, decked out in graffiti and decorations that lend the scene a style and a vital glow unique to Natlan.\nOrnaments and paints in rainbow hues are the calling cards of Natlan's markets and the common currency for those who wish to express their affinity with the latest trends. It would be no overstatement to say that countless new fashions are birthed in the stands and stalls of markets like this all over Natlan. ｜ 以圣火竞技场的楚汶市集为蓝本，还原布置的街道，其中各色店铺棚屋林立，诸多涂鸦配饰相交辉映，颇具活力，展示着独属于纳塔的集市风貌。\n各色颜料与配饰既是纳塔市集上最常见的商品，也是人们在表达对潮流理解时的常客。因此毫不夸张地说，无数风靡纳塔的潮流正是在这样的市集上诞生的。
- #What do we do, {NICKNAME}? Are we responsible for Shibasuke going missing? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，这可怎么办？柴助不见了该不会是我们的错吧？
- I haven't managed to meet them yet... But, say, if I sing here, will they hear me? Will they like it? ｜ 虽然还没能见到他们…不过你说，如果我在这儿唱歌，他们会听到吗？他们会喜欢吗？
- Whew, I almost lost this one! But then again, losing to you wouldn't be a bad thing, haha. ｜ 呼…吓死我了，差一点就输掉了…输给你也不是什么坏事啦。
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Not Yet Available ｜ 尚未开启
- I wish you a successful journey. ｜ 祝你的旅途一切顺利。
- But if you play the lead, the fame will be yours, and I get to be free... Sounds like a win-win, don't you think? ｜ 如果吉莲来出演「主角」，我也能从这些「人气」里解放出来吧…这就是「双赢」？
- Half a year of your time and effort, countless all-nighters, and casual threats and insults — all for a measly 20,000 Mora? ｜ 整整半年的努力，无数个不眠之夜，再加上被随意地威胁和谩骂，就值两万摩拉？
- And before that, I will do my utmost to find the assassins who sought you dead... I ask for only patience in return. ｜ 而在这之前，我会负责全力追查袭击你们的凶手…请你们宽心。
- Darn you! ｜ 可恶…
- Incandescent Frost Permeating ｜ 寒炽弥漫
- Whoa, are those... people? Here, of all places? ｜ 呜哇还出现了…人？欸，有人在这里吗？
- It's Nara friend! Can you give an Aranara <color=#00E1FFFF>a Viparyas</color>? Just one will do... ｜ 是那菈朋友！那菈朋友，可以分给兰那罗<color=#00E1FFFF>一个毗波耶</color>吗？一个就好…
- Mondstadt Rug: Tireless Search ｜ 蒙德地毯-「不倦的寻索」
- That sounds mighty like the Fatui. ｜ 听起来像是愚人众呢。
- But here, Her Excellency covers everything and oppresses everything... ｜ 但是在这里，大御所大人覆盖一切，威压一切…
- (They all sound pretty farfetched, perhaps I should just tell him that.) ｜ （感觉都是有点牵强的线索，和他直接说清楚吧。）
- Stars cast from the celestial tapestry are the final moments of an hourglass. ｜ 自高天陨落的星辰，是昭告终末之刻的沙漏。
- Hehe! Alright, hurry up and take us to be dream experts! ｜ 嘿嘿，那你快带我们去当专家。
- What? You want to help me with my thesis? ｜ 欸？你要帮我做论文？
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- If you have anything to share, be it brooding or joyous, distressing or hilarious, write them down on our Message Board! Cat's Tail is all cat ears! ｜ 如果有烦恼的事，有趣的事，高兴的事，不开心的事，都写上来吧！猫尾酒馆会好好倾听大家的心声的！
- #Thank you, Paimon. And thank you, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #谢谢派蒙，还有，{NICKNAME}，谢谢你。
- Traverse the mountains of Sumeru, overcome danger, and seek inspiration.\nThere is a fairy tale that states that beasts named dragons slumber deep in the woods, within ruins hidden by countless trees. ｜ 游历须弥山野，战胜危险，寻找灵感。\n有这样一则童话：在密林深处，千树掩映的遗迹里，沉眠着名为龙的野兽。
- You can hold me at sword-point, or hit me to make up for the time you didn't earlier. ｜ 你把剑架在我脖子上也行，或者上次没揍我，这次想揍我一顿也行。
- But, to my surprise, my journey didn't end there... or to put it another way, a new beginning found me. ｜ 可没想到，我的一切并没有就此结束，或者说迎来了新的开始。
- Would Ei enjoy a Lavender Melon? It's pretty hard to imagine that happening... ｜ 影也会喜欢吃堇瓜吗？很难想象呢…
- He wrote quite a few stories in the past, but none of them were popular among children. Just like our Prototype Aranara. ｜ 之前他曾经写过十几篇童话故事，但是都和「试作兰那罗」一样，不太受小朋友们的欢迎。
- A long cut-away table that can be found in Fontaine, made from Cypress Wood. The designer used a bold cut-away design, and packed multiple layers of wax at the edges to brace against possible impact, thus reducing the risk of people being injured by the table corners, and also extending the table's shelf life, a feature that succeeds in accomplishing multiple purposes. It is well-suited for restaurants that host large numbers of people, or families with playful children. ｜ 可见于枫丹境内的切角长桌，以耐用的「香柏木」打造而成。设计师采用了大胆的切角设计，并在桌面边缘包裹了多层蜡质，以预防可能的冲击，既避免了人们可能因桌角受伤的风险，又延长了桌子的使用寿命，可谓一举两得，相当适合人流量较大的餐馆，或是有着孩子玩闹的家庭使用。
- Anna the Adventurer! ｜ 冒险家，安娜！
- It's no trouble. The manager promised me that the cost would be refundable. I will try my best to negotiate with words — and if an altercation occurs, that will only make things easier. ｜ 不麻烦，老板承诺过费用可退。我会尽量用言语交涉，如要用到拳脚，就更谈不上麻烦了。
- "...Hadura, Schwanenritter, 'Sentinel of the Golden Hall'..." ｜ 「…白鹄骑士海杜菈，『金殿卫士』…」
- Almost all of Sumeru's best and brightest have attended the Akademiya, and there are a ton of scarily intelligent international students, too... so you can imagine how competitive it is here! Studying alongside some of these people, sometimes it makes me wonder... am I really cut out for this? ｜ 整个须弥最有才能的人几乎都到教令院来了，而且这儿还有那么多聪明得让人发抖的外国学者，你想想，这里的竞争该有多大！和这些人一起学习…我真的够格吗？
- Increases Elemental Skill DMG by <color=#99FFFFFF>16%</color> and Elemental Skill CRIT Rate by <color=#99FFFFFF>6%</color>. ｜ 元素战技造成的伤害增加<color=#99FFFFFF>16%</color>，元素战技的暴击率提升<color=#99FFFFFF>6%</color>。

- Paimon's the very best partner, right? ｜ 作为搭档，我很可靠吧？
- C'mon, don't be strangers now! I can give you whatever you need, you are guests here, after all. It's only natural for me to give some gifts to you. ｜ 哎，不要这么生分嘛！想要什么我可以直接送你们，毕竟你们是客人，我应该准备礼物哦。
- We could only publish the books first, while keeping a record of the royalties owed to Mr. Zhenyu. Once we'd established contact, we would send the royalties over. ｜ 我们就只能自己先印发了这本书，把稿酬都给「枕玉」老师记下，等取得联系之后，再一起付给他。
- Sorry, my ears are no good, and I didn't get a good look at them either. If you're wondering which way they went, they left the city. ｜ 不行啊，我耳朵不好，也没看到。你们想问方向是吧，他们出城去了。

- Let's head to the competition venue. It should be starting soon. ｜ 差不多了，到比赛场地去看看吧。
- I got it. ｜ 我知道了。
- Just stay away from me. ｜ 离我远点。
- Time to Drink ｜ 饮品时间

- I never knew you were so vain. ｜ 原来凯亚是自恋的人？
- Grosley ｜ 格罗斯利
- Give the sugar to Arasaka ｜ 将糖交给兰萨卡
- Sure. I'm counting on you. ｜ 嗯，拜托了。
- And Paimon's Paimon! ｜ 我是派蒙！
- Knitting a sweater is harder than one might imagine. ｜ 织毛衣，比想象中的还要困难呢。
- To clean the flyers along the mountain path up, Shinobu has to meet with her elder sister Miyuki, whom she hasn't met in a long time. ｜ 为了清理山道上的小广告，久岐忍不得不与睽违已久的姐姐阿幸见面…
- As per usual, let's start by asking around for some info. ｜ 那么按照惯例，先从打听情报开始吧。
- Yesterday, I won three beetle fights in a row against that guy with the horns on his head! ｜ 昨天我跟那个长角的大哥哥斗虫，三局我全赢了！
- Wow! ｜ 哇？！
- Traveling Doctor's Pocket Watch ｜ 游医的怀钟
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param8:P}/{param9:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param8:P}/{param9:P}
- You sound very experienced. Why's that? ｜ 老板，你怎么这么有经验呀？
- Good. How about you, little one? I trust you don't have any reason to refuse? ｜ 很好，那小家伙你呢？你总没有拒绝的理由吧？
- We can manage though. It's just an inn that's a bit further out and a bit busier than most. ｜ 不过，其实也就是间客栈，就是地方偏了点，客人多了点，没什么了不起的。
- "Walk to the view of the changing tide, arrive to the sight of a misty shroud. Ascend to Jueyun Karst up in the skies, sit and gaze at the unfurling clouds." ｜ 「行看潮翻覆，坐观云舒卷。请上凌霄处，览此绝云间。」
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:P}
- I have to warn everyone... ｜ 必须快点通知镇子里的人才行…
- D—Dainsleif!? ｜ 戴因…戴因斯雷布！
- Aw, you're leaving already? Klee still wants to play! Let's play a while more, please, pleeease! ｜ 欸——要走了吗？可莉还想再玩一会，再陪可莉玩一会嘛——
- I still have to complete my training for today, so I will bid farewell to everyone here. ｜ 我今日还有修行在身，就不和师父还有几位一同前去了。
- According to Iris, there are other strange shards here on Dragonspine. If you follow the strange blue plants, you may be able to find shards of this sort around the <color=#00E1FFFF>Snow-Covered Path</color>, <color=#00E1FFFF>Entombed City Outskirts</color>, and <color=#00E1FFFF>Starglow Cavern</color>. These shards seem to hold the key to removing that odd air current... ｜ 根据玉霞的说法，在这座雪山中，似乎还存在着奇怪的碎片。如果循着蓝色的奇异植物，就能在<color=#00E1FFFF>「覆雪之路」</color>、<color=#00E1FFFF>「雪葬之都·近郊」</color>和<color=#00E1FFFF>「星荧洞窟」</color>找到这类碎片。这些碎片似乎是解开奇怪气流的关键…
- I'll do my best... ｜ 我会努力的…
- Hey, little birdie, don't feel down, come and perch on my shoulder ♪... Don't be shy, I'll show you around town! ｜ 独自站在这里很无聊吧，过来到我肩膀上♪…听话，我带你去逛逛。
- Trapped Qucusaurus ｜ 被困的绒翼龙
- The venue is right over there. Why not go and take a walk around? Oh, and if you meet my fellow finalist, do pass on my regards. ｜ 会场就在那边，你们可以先过去逛逛。记得代我向决赛对手问个好哟。
- Those spaces remind me of... dreams. Like the one I had in the Avidya Forest, except these have no sign of human presence. ｜ 那些空间让我想到了梦境，似乎在道成林时做过这样的梦，只是其中都没有人的气息。
- Should one require any further succor... perhaps one shall call upon you again. ｜ 噢，本仙若还有什么事需要帮忙的话…说不定还会再找你。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Go to the tent ｜ 前往帐篷
- My trial? Wait... Wh—Why would I need to go to the opera house? ｜ …我的案子？我…我有什么事需要到歌剧院去吗？
- Tusheng's the name. Yes, meaning "local-born," because that's exactly what I am. ｜ 我叫土生，土生土长的「土生」，之所以叫这名字，是因为我土生土长在这里。
- ...I really need to focus. ｜ …要排除杂念。
- When the <color=#FFD780FF>Floral Ring</color> hits, it will create a miniature Cuilein-Anbar that will deal 200% of Collei's ATK as <color=#99FF88FF>Dendro DMG</color>.\nEach <color=#FFD780FF>Floral Brush</color> can only create one such miniature Cuilein-Anbar. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>飞叶轮</color>命中时，会产生一个迷你柯里安巴，造成相当于柯莱攻击力200%的<color=#99FF88FF>草元素伤害</color>。\n每次施放<color=#FFD780FF>拂花偈叶</color>至多产生1次迷你柯里安巴。

- What to do, when to start, how much to earn... I call the shots. Isn't it amazing? ｜ 做什么工作，什么时候开工，赚多少合适…都由自己控制，爽得不行。
- Maybe hanging around the General Mahamatra isn't so bad after all! Everyone's so respectful towards us. ｜ 我发现，官位大还是有好处的嘛，大家对我们说话都好恭敬呢。

- Flame-Mane... everyone in the desert knows that name. The Eremites aren't exactly saints, as I'm sure you know, but Dehya's one of the few solid and dependable ones out there. If you ever want to explore the Great Red Sand, Dehya's the second-best guide you could ask for. First-best being me, obviously. ｜ 「炽鬃之狮」，沙漠里人人都听说过这个名号。你也知道，镀金旅团里可不都是好人，像迪希雅这样正直可靠的就更少了。如果你要来大赤沙海探险，迪希雅是做向导第二好的人选。第一嘛，当然是我咯？

- Defeat Beisht after severely injuring any 2 of her heads within {param2}s of each other. ｜ 在任意两个头部进入重伤的间隔小于{param2}秒的情况下，击败跋掣

- I sent them letters to warn them, but that despicable merchant was far too cunning for them! ｜ 虽然我已经给他们寄了信，告诫了他们，但那卑劣的商人太明白如何转动坏脑筋！
- Yeah, so uh... You've said a whole bunch about this princess of yours. Fetch her this, best frog that... ｜ 唔…听你们说了一路的公主。又是迎接公主，又是最优秀的蛙…

- Even if she's working the next day, Atsuko usually says something to us before leaving. But today, she left without saying anything. ｜ 就算是工作，她走之前也会给我们说一声，但今天这孩子怎么不声不响地就走了。

- Actually, as representative of the present review panel, I have already granted myself authorization to pack up and strike camp. So no need to worry about that. ｜ 这个嘛，作为当前特别评议小组的代表，我已经为我自己授权了许可，同意拔营收拾这一行动了，不用担心。
- In the meantime, we don't want to neglect our customers, so we've been doing our best to attend to everyone who comes to have their picture taken. But there are so many people now that we are struggling to keep on top of demand. ｜ 我们也不好怠慢了顾客，所以就一直接待过来留影的人。人越来越多，我们都要接待不过来了。
- If you pass by Springvale, don't forget to stop by our stand and have a look! ｜ 路过清泉镇的话，也别忘了去我们的摊位瞧瞧啊！
- Huh, it's just as Wriothesley said... Seems like Dougier's no longer here. ｜ 好像真的和莱欧斯利说的一样，杜吉耶已经离开了。
- It was so much shinier than the rest. Let's go with that one! ｜ 明显比其它两份样品更亮呢，就选它了！
- Mr. Payne! Are you alright? Do you need to take a rest...? ｜ 派恩先生！您没事吧？需不需要休息一下…
- No way! Aunty Grace would go mad if she saw me doing that. ｜ 不行不行，葛瑞丝阿姨看见了，又要训我了。
- Certified player Choneaux, a reporter always looking for that exclusive scoop. Such news isn't that easy to come by, so he makes his own — for example, by covering duels between extraordinary card players. Though most readers haven't the slightest inkling about the players he mentions, those pieces earn enough to pay for both his expenditures and alcohol. Better than nothing, eh? ｜ 协会认证牌手肖诺，常年追逐着独家新闻的记者。独家新闻没那么常见，他便自行制造一些独家新闻，比如特殊牌手之间的对决。虽说大部分读者都不认识他所提及的牌手，但多少能给他挣一点行动经费和酒费，聊胜于无。
- "Snappy Silhouette" Mark Trigger Interval|{param4:F1}s ｜ 「瞬时剪影」印记触发间隔|{param4:F1}秒
- You introduce yourself to Nacker and describe the final review situation. Upon mentioning Desnos, you remember what he last told you...\n"Before formally arriving at the Fontaine Research Institute for the final review, Mr. Desnos has first tasked me with being your guard and ensuring your safety." ｜ 向纳克进行了自我介绍，并说明了「最终审核」一事。在谈起德斯诺斯时，你想起了他的建议…\n「在正式去枫丹科学院接受最终审核前，德斯诺斯先生请我先来做您的护卫，确保您的安全。」
- The Fatui were the ones who attacked you? That's too much... ｜ 袭击你们的人…是「愚人众」？真过分…
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- So, please, Traveler! Help me go outside and investigate the situation. You don't have to go far, just the Whispering Woods will do. ｜ 所以，只能拜托你了，旅行者！请你帮我去野外调查一下吧，就…去低语森林附近就好。
- This is the place. If you could just wait a moment, the Fairy should be— ｜ 就是这里了，请二位稍等，仙子大人现在应该在…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Well, that sounds promising! ｜ 听起来很有希望的啊…
- A large building adorned with colorful graffiti signs, commonly seen within the Flower-Feather Clan.\nThe tribe has certain restrictions on house decoration and renovation, usually allowing personal creativity only in minor decorative projects. This rule is closely connected to the tribe's competitive culture. As one of the proudest tribes in Natlan, the members of the Flower-Feather Clan tend to compete fiercely in various contests to showcase their excellence. However, in unique environments like Quahuacan Cliff, excessive modifications and decorations can pose a threat to the safety of both the buildings and the entire platform, with potentially disastrous consequences. Therefore, the Flower-Feather Clan restricts decorations to those that do not alter the structural integrity or form of the buildings. ｜ 以色彩艳丽的涂鸦牌为装饰的大型建筑，多见于「花羽会」。\n据说，「花羽会」对房屋的装饰和改造有些一定限制，通常只允许人们在一些较小的装饰项目中发挥个人创意。这一规则的形成与「花羽会」的部族风气密切相关。作为纳塔诸部族中最为心高气傲的一支，「花羽会」的成员倾向于在各种比斗中一较高下，以显示自己的优秀。然而，在如「翘枝崖」这样特殊的环境之中，过度的改造和装饰可能会对房屋乃至整个平台的安全构成威胁，并导致严重的后果。因此，「花羽会」将装饰的范围限制在了不改变建筑结构和形式的前提下。
- Is there anything else? Hand those over too! ｜ 还有其余的东西，也一并拿出来！
- Kids, being kids, aren't exactly the most difficult to outsmart... I'm sure you can see what I'm getting at here. He used to lose all the time. Sometimes catastrophically. ｜ 小孩子单纯又好懂，你们肯定明白。但就算是和他们做游戏，荒泷一斗有时候也输得很惨。

- Huh? Hilichurls! Get behind us, Mao! ｜ 欸？！是丘丘人！小茂你快躲到我们后面！
- With your help, and the protection of the Carp Adeptus, I'm sure our village will surely see a great harvest of tea leaves this coming year. ｜ 有了你们的帮助，和锦鲤仙人的护佑，翘英庄的茶叶——来年一定会有个好收成！
- ...Wait, whaaaaat!? ｜ …啊？！

- Hmm... Paimon wonders if he really took in a word we said. ｜ 唉…也不知道他听进去了没有。

- Next to the Collective of Plenty lies a bountiful orchard, managed by a warrior named Varesa from the tribe. ｜ 在沃陆之邦一侧，有一个盛产各类蔬果的果园，其主人是「沃陆之邦」的战士瓦雷莎。

- This is bad... ｜ 这下糟糕了…
- I bet the patients are exaggerating their discomfort again, thinking that a mere village doctor is unable to treat their "serious illness." ｜ 估计又是那些病患觉得自己的病很重，不相信他这位「赤脚医生」…
- Opponents' HP and ATK are increased, elites to be distinguished by further affixes. ｜ 怪物血量和攻击力提升，精英需要额外挂词缀区分。(test)
- Traveler ｜ 主角

- Argh! Such impertinence! Where are one's followers when one needs them? ｜ 哎哟，休得无礼！本仙的信众们何在？
- (So you made contact with that part of his mind... Well, it's true. Betrayal turned The Balladeer into the person he is today.) ｜ （原来你触碰到了他心中这一部分…的确可以说，「背叛」造就了如今的他。）
- Paimon, what's wrong? ｜ 派蒙，怎么了？
- Good people always get what's coming to them in the end... And so will the nasty people! ｜ 好人有好报，坏人也会遭报应的！
- Kagura Dance of the Sacred Sakura ｜ 神樱神游神乐舞
- ATK +18%. ｜ 攻击力提高18%。

- Draw a hamster... ｜ 画只胖胖鼠…

- Investigate the abnormal Ley Line deposit ｜ 调查异常的地脉淤积点
- Hmm, I see... ｜ 原来是这样…

- ...Wow, who'd have thought there'd be a slime in there too! ｜ …哇，没想到还藏着一只史莱姆！

- But given that we aren't making much progress with the case, it wouldn't hurt to have a look at his belongings, would it? ｜ 但现如今，案件并没有进展，调查死者的随身行李也不是什么困难的事。
- Th—That would be such a big help, Archon! Thank you! ｜ 太、太好了，火神大人能这么说，真是帮了大忙。
- Him, he's a man of mediocre talent. His movements on stage are stiff and his singing is less in tune than Swoof's. ｜ 他啊，天赋平平。演出动作僵硬，唱歌有时还没斯汪在调子上。
- 6-Hit DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 六段伤害|{param6:F1P}
- I wonder what color my wind glider should be... ｜ 唔…我的风之翼用什么颜色比较好呢…
- "Don't get distracted!" ｜ 「别走神嘛！」
- Have you succeeded in beating back those Treasure Hoarders? ｜ 你把那些盗宝团都赶走了吗？
- A lamp in the shape of a flower. Makes you wonder how Daya might want to use it in the construction work... ｜ 花朵型的灯具。不知道达雅想要如何将其运用到建造工作中…
- We were asked to discuss something with you. ｜ 我们受人委托有事与你商谈。

- The Thundering Wilds ｜ 雷野险踪
- Regardless, we should be more careful! ｜ 不管怎么说，我们还是小心一点吧！

- Not necessarily. Look at all the things they left here... Miss, why don't you use your greatsword to clean the place up? ｜ 倒也未必，这营地中还剩下不少物什，就请姑娘用那大剑，将它们一并扫清吧。
- Cabin of Intense Purity ｜ 猛烈纯洁小屋
- Listen, he's headed towards the place where the giant rock is hanging. Y'know, over that way... If you give chase now, you could still catch him! ｜ 听着，那家伙朝着一个悬挂着巨石的地方去了，就是那个方向…你们要是现在追上去的话还来得及！

- Keep heading towards the first component's location ｜ 继续前往第一个零件处

- I really appreciate the way this space combines popular aesthetics with your own personal style. Such a pleasant surprise. ｜ 能像这样欣赏一处兼具个人审美与流行美学的宅邸，我很惊喜。
- As for you guys... If you want to leave, this is your last chance. *sigh* With all the fuss he's been making, who knows what will happen later. ｜ 至于你们…要走的话现在就是最后的机会了。唉，他这么一折腾，还不知道之后会发生什么呢。
- I know that each of the seven nations in this world have unique and rich cultures, but what fascinates me the most are the legends of the Liyue adepti. ｜ 虽然大陆七国都有各自的特殊之处，但是璃月的仙人传说和历史真的太有趣了。

- Actually, I found the slate in the storage room inside the Dainichi Mikoshi, and next to it lay a note that records both the ancient script and its translation. ｜ 其实我在大日御舆储藏间找到这块石板的时候，旁边就有双语写的说明纸条。
- Helping me when necessary certainly won't tarnish your prestige! If anything, my embarrassing predicament will be overshadowed by your virtuous deed. W—We must uphold the prestige and dignity of the family! ｜ 在必要时援助我，折损的绝不会是你的威光！我的狼狈将由你的义举覆盖，这是…这是在维护家族的威名与尊严！
- You update Grispan on what befell Petrichor in his absence... ｜ 向格里斯潘讲述佩特莉可镇所发生的事…
- It's a... hung jury... ｜ 判断…失误了吗…
- We need to form an editors' group for a Trial Version: Expanded Edition (1st Issue) and have a detailed discussion on additional emergency scenarios... ｜ 下次要组织《指南试行版·第一次增补》编辑组，仔细研讨更多意外情况才行…
- I'm just thinking. Observing. Or planning. ｜ 我只是在思考，在观察，或者在计划着一些事情。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- A broken hourglass from which all the sand has escaped. But it's fine, because the passage of time means nothing to someone without a single worry in the whole world. ｜ 因为破洞而空空如也的沙漏。时光流逝对无忧无虑的人没有意义。
- The miner who keeps talking about his daughter. ｜ 就是那个总是把女儿挂在嘴边的矿工啦。
- How about a story from before you became a Champion Duelist? ｜ 成为最强决斗代理人之前的故事！
- Yanbo's Note ｜ 彦博的字条
- We'll take them out on a walk, and see which one is in higher spirits! If Chili has a spring in its step, that's how we'll know that this person's been putting Yun through the wringer! ｜ 就让它们出来走一走，看看谁的精神状态比较好！如果椒宝走的又快又轻松，那就说明这家伙让云宝受苦了！
- Not good... ｜ 糟了糟了…
- I thought that you would perform some deeds that would prove your worthiness of the title of "Bloomguard." As it turns out, however, it seems you're just been idling about. ｜ 原本以为斯露莎当然会做些「名副其实」的符合「勇者」身份的事呢，原来只是在无所事事地闲逛呀。
- Charged Attack DMG|{param6:F1P}+{param6:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param6:F1P}+{param6:F1P}
- No? Hmm... What are we missing? ｜ 啊？怎么这样…难道我们漏了什么吗？
- #{NICKNAME}, let's help our friends on the Black Nacre! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，我们可要帮帮「黑水晶」号的大家！
- Revelry ｜ 狂欢值

- I've been raising 3 Slimes. They like to be lifted up in the air and especially enjoy jumping through hoops. ｜ 我养了三只史莱姆，它们很喜欢被举高高，尤其特别喜欢在空中钻圈圈。$UNRELEASED

- Happy now? Now quickly, get this letter to Grace before she starts fretting. ｜ 满意了吗？快点去把信送过去吧，不然葛瑞丝修女又要想东想西了。
- Ores are pretty useful. You need them too, right? ｜ 矿石也算是挺有用的东西了，你也需要的吧。
- Leave it to me. ｜ 交给我吧。
- Calm Jeht down ｜ 让婕德冷静下来
- Haha, being too suspicious, am I? Well, even suspicious people have their duty to uphold... ｜ 哈哈，太敏感了吗？但敏感者也有敏感者的尊严…哈哈！
- Lost in the Snow ｜ 雪山迷踪
- Default ｜ 默认
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- I don't believe so. Mingbo is someone who has slowly but surely earned the reputation he has today. ｜ 我觉得没有。明博的名声是一点一点积累起来的。
- Wonderful! Those silly Blubberbeasts have been chased off — and with that, my peace of mind is restored! Thank you so much, Traveler. ｜ 太好了！这些膨膨兽总算全都跑了，等会我就能安心钓鱼了，太感谢您了，旅行者。
- Whoa! Souka's team looks pretty nasty! ｜ 呜啊！左右加那边的队伍，看起来就很厉害！
- You think too highly of him, then. Wisdom? He's one of them. I'll bet it's experience talking! ｜ 那你可就太高看他了，他那是什么「智慧」…他跟那些家伙可是同路人，这些事对他来说没准都是轻车熟路了。
- Huh!? You were right! The look on his face... ｜ 欸？！说对了？你看他表情…
- Hehe... All I'm asking is for you to give it your best shot. ｜ 呵呵，希望二位可以再尽力尝试一下。
- Yes, but I don't think I was of much help to you all... ｜ 嗯，但那个时候，我应该没帮到你们才对…
- I'm not ready yet. ｜ 还没准备好。
- #How about we try using adeptal energy, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，我们用仙力试试看吧？
- You're rather invested in her horticultural career, I see. ｜ 派蒙真关心柯莎的园艺事业啊。
- You sure are taking your time thinking about it! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你想了好久啊。
- How about we just make him not enter this place at all? ｜ 只要不让他进来…
- "The meaning of the rose only exists in our hearts..." ｜ 「玫瑰的意义，只存在于你我心中…」
- However, it shall also emit light of a different vibrance after night falls. Yasnapati, if your timing shall be amenable, you may come back to witness it. ｜ 不过，等到入夜了，「净觉花」还能绽放出别样的光彩。我的「谒颂主」，如果时机得当，可以再来看看。

### Part 140

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Well, it's had quite a journey. It first turned up in the Adventurers' Guild, then after changing hands many times, finally got picked up by the Scions of the Canopy's couriers... ｜ 说到这个，这可是长途跋涉来到这里的快件啊，辗转了很多手，才从冒险家协会转到悬木人的讯使这里…
- Oh, you're back! Wait... That must mean there's a new exam! ｜ 呜哇，这么快就有新的考核了吗。
- I'd like to hear your tale, too. ｜ 我也想知道。
- What exactly happened to your great-grandfather, Kazuha? ｜ 万叶，当年到底发生过什么？
- Hmph. Your judgment is as your existence: unsubstantial. ｜ #哼，{NICKNAME}，你的判断就和你的存在一般，毫无分量。
- Someone's calling for Razi over there! ｜ 好像那个方向有人在叫拉齐的名字。
- Share the dish you made with Chouji ｜ 与长次分享自己做的料理
- Duration|{param6:F1}s per Paw ｜ 持续时间|每个猫爪{param6:F1}秒
- How old is that story, exactly...? ｜ 这个故事究竟流传了多久…

- You don't want to do it yourself? ｜ 你不打算自己来吗？

- Insufficient Wondrous Talismans ｜ 灵妙玉符数量不足
- Would you specifically need someone from Fontaine to fix it? ｜ 要特地找枫丹人来修吗？
- *sigh* Anyway, let's look at the clue we've found. ｜ 唉，总之既然找到了，还是赶快来看看吧。
- Tomatoes. ｜ 番茄。

- P·A·I·M·O·N ｜ P·A·I·M·O·N
- That's why you want to hold the Pilgrimage again, right? To help everyone find a new goal. ｜ 难怪你要再次举办归火圣夜巡礼，是为了让大家找到新目标对吧？
- ... ｜ ……
- Actually, Shigeru sounds more reasonable... ｜ 其实阿茂的看法更合理…
- And the 100th Vision bearer in question... the one who will have their Vision seized, I fear... is Thoma. ｜ 而那第一百颗神之眼的持有者…也就是即将被公开狩眼的对象，恐怕…就是托马。
- Activate the Torrential Twister ｜ 激活「激流轨道」
- Even Darcy's ahead of us! He entered the competition by himself, didn't he? How can this be happening... ｜ 居然连达希也排在我们前面，他应该是独自参加比赛吧？怎么会这样…
- Mr. Elchingen even eats and chats with ordinary employees as if we're his friends! ｜ 平常埃尔欣根先生，甚至会和我们这些小员工一起吃饭聊天，就像是朋友一样！
- Whoa... It's a... child who talks like an adult? That's so weird! ｜ 呜哇…是一个…说话像大人的小孩子，好奇怪！
- I have no fear for him on the battlefield. He's always been good at surviving, no matter where he is. ｜ 我不担心他在战场上的性命之危，那小子有的是本事活下来，在哪都一样。
- It seems Shenhe places a great deal of trust in you. Well, how could she not. There are few people in the world as kind and good-natured as you. ｜ 申鹤似乎对你颇为信赖。…也是。毕竟，世间难得几人能有你这般的善心与热忱。
- Go on, take some. You need to eat a lot if you want to grow big and strong... ｜ 你们多吃点啊。多吃饭，才能长得高高的、壮壮的…

- Destroy {param2} obstacles ｜ 摧毁{param2}个障碍
- Shot 9 ｜ 第9镜
- As far as I and others in this line can see, not much, at least with regard to brewing coffee. ｜ 到目前为止，根据我和其他同行的观察，这份「等级证书」在调制咖啡时并没什么大用。
- Are you going to go visit Twirly-Whirly? ｜ 是打算去看「转转悠悠兽」吗？
- You have my thanks. ｜ 那就有劳二位替我跑一趟了，不胜感激。
- Performance Assistance: When your Performance Level is 1/2/3 respectively, after characters trigger <color=#FFCC33>Burning</color> or <color=#FFCC33>Burgeon</color> against an opponent, all party members' Elemental Skill DMG is increased by <color=#FFCC33>30%/75%/150%</color> for 5s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.\nAdditionally, if your Performance Level is 3, when your character uses an <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Skill</color>, unleash a <color=#FFCC33>Knightwave</color> at the character's position that deals True DMG to nearby opponents. 1 <color=#FFCC33>Knightwave</color> can be produced in this way every 3s. ｜ 「助演增益」：「表现等级」分别为1/2/3级时，角色对敌人触发<color=#FFCC33>燃烧</color>或<color=#FFCC33>烈绽放反应</color>后，队伍中所有角色的元素战技造成的伤害提升<color=#FFCC33>30%/75%/150%</color>，持续5秒，重复触发将刷新持续时长。\n另外，若「表现等级」为3级，角色施放<color=#FFCC33>元素战技</color>时，将在角色的位置释放<color=#FFCC33>「骑士冲击波」</color>，对附近的敌人造成真实伤害，每3秒至多通过这种方式释放一次<color=#FFCC33>「骑士冲击波」</color>。
- Love Poem ｜ 情诗
- Ooroo... ｜ 呜呜…
- Um, so anyway, you still haven't told us why you called us here today. ｜ 所以，神子还没说，这次叫我们过来究竟是要做什么呢。
- Huh... She really seems to be playing up the whole mysterious adeptus thing right now... Is it because we just heard that cool story about her powers? ｜ 唔…因为刚听完故事的原因吗，我居然真的感觉她言谈举止多了一种神秘的仙人做派…
- Huh... It won't open. ｜ 唔…看起来打不开呢…
- Perhaps it shall be so this time as well, that greedy prey shall fall into a trap, where they cannot be saved... ｜ 说不定这次也是一样，贪吃的猎物落入陷阱，无人得以幸免，呵呵…
- Don't take it to heart. ｜ 不用往心里去。
- This place hasn't seen travelers from another tribe in quite some time. So, tell me, are you here to investigate the volcano? ｜ 这块区域已经很久没有异邦的旅者前来了，你们来是为了什么，调查火山吗？
- CD|{param4:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param4:F1}秒
- (Looks like Chasca is helping me keeping an eye on the Fatui movements. I'll wait for her signal.) ｜ （姐姐好像也察觉到这件事了，正在准备帮我观察愚人众的动向，我听她的吧。）
- Cappet ｜ 卡佩
- Thanks for the offer, but I can do it. ｜ 谢谢，但是我自己就可以做到。

- Artifacts draw their power from stories. This explains how it is possible to attempt to create Artifacts through sacred writings. Legend tells of an instance where seventy sages independently produced identical translations of the same source text; and thus, the original text was considered to be sacred. A person has only to place their hand on this machine and the story behind the Artifact will naturally flow out of it. ｜ 圣遗物力量的本源来自于故事，因此神圣的书写可以尝试制造圣遗物。传说曾有七十个贤者各自独立翻译出了一模一样的译文，因此神圣的原文可以称圣。只要把手放在这台机器上，圣遗物背后的故事会自然流出。

- DMG dealt by Vaporize and Melt reactions is increased by <color=#f39000>{0}%</color>.\nAfter triggering Vaporize or Melt <color=#f39000>{1}</color> times, you will obtain Afterimaged Might:\nDMG dealt by Vaporize or Melt reactions is increased by <color=#f39000>{2}%</color> and will unleash a shockwave at the position where the reaction was triggered, dealing DMG to nearby opponents. This effect can be triggered once every <color=#f39000>{3}</color>s. 1 Vaporize or Melt reaction will be counted as part of this effect every <color=#f39000>{4}</color>s.\nYou will encounter powerful opponents after obtaining Afterimaged Might.\nOn Perilous difficulty in Vicious Battle mode, you can obtain this form of Afterimaged Might 20s after the challenge starts. ｜ 蒸发、融化反应的加成系数提高<color=#f39000>{0}%</color>；\n触发<color=#f39000>{1}</color>次蒸发或融化反应后，将获得「残像威能」：\n蒸发、融化反应的加成系数提高<color=#f39000>{2}%</color>，且将在触发反应的位置释放冲击波，对附近的敌人造成伤害，该效果每<color=#f39000>{3}</color>秒至多触发1次。每<color=#f39000>{4}</color>秒至多记录1次蒸发、融化反应。\n获得「残像威能」后，将遭遇强敌。\n鏖战模式的涉险难度下，挑战开始20秒后即可获得该「残像威能」。

- A manufacturing machine with fully upgraded weapons and armor. When characters enter and maintain the Nightsoul's Blessing state, the Secret Source Automaton: Firepower Enhanced will start progressing through its Adaptive Countermeasures. Once those are complete, it will start preparing its Boltsphere Cannon. During this time, the Secret Source Automaton: Firepower Enhanced will start up its Accretion Mechanism to dig into Solid Phlogiston and collect phlogiston. The Accretion Mechanism will generate an energy field. If you wish to destroy the Mechanism and interrupt the charging of the Boltsphere Cannon, <color=#FFCC33>you must first climb the Solid Phlogiston and enter the energy field.</color> ｜ 武备和装甲全面升级后的制造用机械体。在角色进入和维持「夜魂加持」状态时，「秘源机兵·火力升级套件」会积累「应战对策」的进度，进度积累满后，将开始准备「球状雷炮」，过程中，「秘源机兵·火力升级套件」会启动「汲聚械」开掘固态燃素并汲取燃素。「汲聚械」自身会产生力场，如果想要破坏「汲聚械」以打断「球状雷炮」的蓄能，<color=#FFCC33>就得先攀上固态燃素进入力场内才行。</color>
- Defeat the Ruin Guards ｜ 全力消灭遗迹守卫
- You quickly press on the shutter before Beidou is fully prepared, and a very charming photo comes out of the Kamera. ｜ 趁北斗不备，你按下快门，留影机吐出了一张「妩媚」的画像。
- Is there anything of note nearby? ｜ 附近有什么值得留意的吗？
- So this is where they were headed. Looks tricky... It's heavily guarded on all sides. ｜ 原来他们的目的地是这里，周围都有重重把守，好麻烦啊。
- In a single attempt, deplete the HP bar of a boss in the second half {param2} times ｜ 单次挑战中击穿下半场强敌生命值{param2}次
- Haha... I won. Another round? ｜ 哈哈…是我赢了，再来一局？
- You can help us prepare the food before the judging begins. ｜ 在评判味道之前，还是请你先帮我们准备准备那道菜吧。
- So how did the two of you team up, anyway? You seem like very different personalities, and you don't have much common ground professionally, either. ｜ 说起来，你们为什么会组成一队啊？感觉你们的职业也没有交集，性格也很不一样呢。
- So you may speak to me as equals. ｜ 所以你们拥有与我平等对话的资格。
- Sampling the delights of the Veluriyam Mirage? ｜ 在「琉形蜃境」中…深度赏玩？
- Shuyu ｜ 漱玉
- I wouldn't call this place "homely," per se. ｜ 这里可不像能住人的样子。
- B—But we have no idea what kind of dangers we may encounter... ｜ 但、但我们都不知道会遇见什么危险…
- Whoa! A monster! It looks... so strange! ｜ 呜哇，是怪物！它看起来…好奇怪！
- There is a saying that goes: "Adepti come and go without a trace, green moss grows on stones in the spring breeze."\nAdepti are hard to find, and their blessings harder still. Just how many went on pilgrimages to Mt. Aocang since ancient times, yet returned empty-handed, none know.\nBut now, that once captivating figure has voluntarily absconded from her abode, looking in the direction of Liyue Harbor. ｜ 有道是：「仙人来往行无迹，石径春风长绿苔。」\n仙人难觅、仙缘难求，古往今来不知多少人造访过奥藏山，却终究无功而返。\n而现在，曾令人魂牵梦绕的身影却主动离开洞府，望向璃月港的方向。
- Paimon's Paimon. ｜ 派蒙就是派蒙。
- I'm not sure I can really wrap my head around this conversation, but there's no need to get all worked up on our behalf, my lady. With the pipe installed, I'm sure the Tavern will be up and running in no time. ｜ 虽然跟不上各位的话题，但还请仙子大人不要露出这样的神情，现在管道也修好了，酒馆不久后一定就能开张。
- I never imagined I'd be able to see such an instrument, and I never imagined we'd be able to play it during a high tide. ｜ 我从没想过能见到这样一件乐器。更想不到，我们能趁着潮汐奏响它。
- {0} ｜ {0}
- A dull goblet made of a heavy metal. It was once inlaid with gemstones, but they have since been stripped off. ｜ 黯淡的重金属制成的杯形器皿，可以看出外壁上原本镶有宝石，又被挖掉了。
- It stole so much nutrition that the other roses starved and couldn't bloom! ｜ 偷偷吃掉养分…让其他努力生长的花没法盛开！

- Haha, how very amusing. What makes you think I would recognize this symbol? ｜ 哼哼，很有意思，你们为什么觉得我会认识这个符号呢？

- Defeat a Geo Hypostasis in Co-Op Mode. ｜ 与其他玩家一同战胜无相之岩。
- Within the meteorite shards flows a certain energy, which will resonate with a nearby character's Vision, causing both to light up and flash. The closer you draw to a shard, the more intense the flashing will become. Make good use of this phenomenon to effortlessly track down and salvage meteorite shards. ｜ 因为碎屑中蕴含的某种能量，接近时角色的神之眼会与之发生共鸣，发出光芒。与碎屑距离越近，光芒闪烁的效果就越强烈。如果对这一特性能善加利用，或许能比较轻松地清理回收这些碎屑。
- Start Taking Photos ｜ 开始拍照
- I'm the boss of this tea house here. Is everything to your liking? ｜ 我就是这个茶馆的老板，怎么样，您还满意吧？
- Sucrose will reduce the CD of <color=#FFD780FF>Astable Anemohypostasis Creation - 6308</color> by 1-7s for every 7 Normal or Charged Attack hits she scores against opponents.\nOne hit may be counted every 0.1s. ｜ 砂糖的普通攻击或者重击累计命中敌人7次，<color=#FFD780FF>风灵作成·陆叁零捌</color>的冷却时间就会随机减少1-7秒。\n每0.1秒至多计数一次。

- <color=#37FFFF>Fischl:</color> His nature is obscure, his fate a mystery, and his speech a vexing tapestry woven of both fact and fiction... Perhaps he and I share the burden of mystical sight...\n<color=#37FFFF>Oz:</color> Or perhaps he's secretly an actual pirate? ｜ <color=#37FFFF>菲谢尔：</color>无法看透的真实，无法断明的因果，虚实交织的狂言…那个人，或许也与我一样，背负了「魔眼」的命运…\n<color=#37FFFF>奥兹：</color>也可能暗地里是个海盗…？
- The Land of Her Serenity ｜ 静谧的国土
- Sachin's words can only cause pain. But... not anymore. No one else has to hear them now. ｜ 萨齐因的话会让人痛苦。所以…到此为止，不要再继续传播下去了。
- Ellin is working hard to become a knight, but her training doesn't seem to work out. She seems to need some guidance... ｜ 为了成为一名骑士，艾琳正在努力练习，但却始终不得章法。艾琳希望有人能来指导她…

- That's right. Paimon was there too! We saw it with our own eyes, and even talked to him! It was him for sure! ｜ 对呀，我当时也在，我们两个都亲眼看到了，还跟他说过话了呢！明明就是他本人…
- You'll see in a bit. But before that, we have a more urgent task at hand. ｜ 等一会儿，你们自然就明白了。在那之前，我们还有更重要的任务——
- The gems from Liyue traders may be priceless, but Don Quijano's promises are more precious still. ｜ 璃月的大商人贩卖的宝石价值无量，而唐·西哈诺的承诺远比它们更加珍贵。

- Wow, Ryuuji's conviction really was signed by Kujou Sara... But now we know she had it wrong. ｜ 呜哇，龙二的定罪书真的是九条裟罗签的…不过现在看，这里面的内容应该是错误的吧。
- The Chasm is regarded as a mysterious area in Liyue. It was sealed off for years due to a mining accident. Whatever goes on down here, I suggest you remember this: You didn't see anything, you didn't hear anything, and you're not gonna ask any questions. Save you from getting caught up in things you shouldn't know about. ｜ 层岩巨渊在璃月算得上神秘地区，前些年因矿区事故而被封锁。在这里行动，最好学会不看、不听，不问，以免涉及太多各位不该了解的秘密。

- #Ah, come on Yun Jin. I get that you won't take my word for it, but if you can't trust {NICKNAME}, whom can you trust? ｜ #哎呀，云堇，你就算不信我，还不信{NICKNAME}吗？
- And since you helped my child out, I hope you won't mind if I treat you as if you were my own. ｜ 你帮助了我的小朋友，我也想将你当作我的小朋友来对待。

- This pot used to carry concentrated and extremely potent concoctions. It is now empty, but still gives off a strong smell of medicine. ｜ 原本装满了提炼后极浓的药汁，如今只剩下浓烈的药味。

- So, did you ask them? ｜ 那，您问到了吗？
- As a survivor of the dragon race who has regained my full dragonhood, I must fulfill my oaths and obligations even if it means returning all the water in the oceans back to the heavens. In taking the Authority of Electro, the Narukami placed herself on the list of the usurpers, she will... Oh, you say she has isolated herself in the Plane of Euthymia, and now rarely appears in public? Then I shall pay her a visit in another few centuries. ｜ 我作为重获全龙之格的孑遗，就算是让大海所有的水逆行回天，也需要履行我的誓言与责任。鸣神赢取了雷之大权，注定留名于僭权者之列。嗯，你说她现在蛰居于心成净土之中，极少现身？那我过几百年再去吧。

- What a mellow aftertaste! ｜ 很浓烈的回味！
- But we don't even know what they mean! ｜ 这些符文，我们连看都看不懂。
- I've gotta admit that my friend only told me the back half. I wonder, what did his father do to warrant such hate from the sun? ｜ 说起来朋友只给我讲了后半的故事，并没有讲前半。他父亲到底犯了什么错才会让太阳这么痛恨呢？
- Hmm, Paimon thinks that those Treasure Hoarders might have misunderstood us... ｜ 总感觉那群盗宝团似乎对我们说的话有什么误会…

- After you select the level-up direction you wish to take, the maximum level(s) you can reach using the items in your Inventory will be <color=#FFE14BFF>automatically selected</color> for you.\nIf the character has a level-up plan, the level(s) within your <color=#FFE14BFF>level-up goals</color> will be auto-selected. After selecting the necessary Transmutation Materials, the relevant Transmutation(s) will be <color=#FFE14BFF>automatically selected</color> based on your level-up direction and Level-Up Materials in your Inventory. ｜ 选择所需的养成方向后，会根据背包内的培养材料，计算并<color=#FFE14BFF>自动选择</color>能达到的最高等阶或等级。\n若角色为培养计划内角色，则将自动选择<color=#FFE14BFF>培养目标</color>中设置的等阶或等级。\n选择所需的合成材料后会综合养成方向与背包内培养材料的情况计算并<color=#FFE14BFF>自动选择</color>合适的合成次数。

- But, if I didn't know the stories of all the past heroes — how they never stopped fighting — I probably would've given up a long time ago. ｜ 但如果不知道曾经有那么多英雄都在顽强坚持，我估计早就放弃了吧。

- Haha, that's a great adventure indeed. You are marvelous adventurers. If only I had been able to complete such a journey myself. ｜ 哈哈，真是了不起的冒险啊，你们果然是不得了的冒险家。要是那个时候的我也能完成这样的冒险就好了。

- Come back next time! I'll be even better then. ｜ 我的厨艺会越来越好的，下次再来呀。
- Bye! I'll grow up a bit more when we meet again! ｜ 再见！下次见面，素达蓓就会再长大一点啦！
- Sometimes, getting ill or not is beyond our control... He's still so young, so I just hope he gets well soon. ｜ 有时候，得不得病并不是我们自己能选择的事情啊…他还那么年轻，我只希望他能早日康复。
- Oh, I didn't expect the votes to differ by that much. I thought for sure that Masako would win, given that Warrior's Spirit is a competition unique to Inazuma! ｜ 啊，没想到票数差了这么多，我还以为像「演武传心」这样有稻妻特色的赛事，肯定是政子小姐获胜呢！
- Artifacts will be batch-locked based on your <color=#FFCC33FF>General Lock Plan and Set Lock Plan</color> ｜ 按照<color=#FFCC33FF>通用与套装锁定方案</color>批量锁定圣遗物

- ...That's actually quite an amusing approach. It's probably not going to get us anywhere, but I do admire your sense of humor, and your commitment to it. ｜ 这个笑话可能不算冷笑话，但是也不好解释。不过我欣赏你的幽默感和对自己幽默感的迷之自信。

- Oh? What did he say? ｜ 嗯？嘉明说了什么呀？

- Well I better get going, I have so many new discoveries to note down. Perhaps we'll have a chance to meet again. ｜ 那么我先走了，还有很多发现要记录下来，下次有机会再见吧。

- Time Taken ｜ 抵达终点所用时间
- It's okay. Your friends will understand. ｜ 别难过，朋友们会谅解的。
- I'm telling you, it completely changed the whole landscape in that part of the mountains! ｜ 望风山地的一大片地貌，都被那位强者改变了！
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- *cough* Anyway... Natlan is a nation of many tribes, so there must always be many matters to attend to in meetings. As for the venue for such meetings... ｜ 咳，那么…纳塔既然有这么多部族，那他们平时也应当有不少事宜需要召开会议。这个会议的场所…
- The Xiao Lanterns and Challenge Coins on the sea surface are about to disappear... ｜ 海面上的霄灯和「挑战币」即将消失…
- Talk to Ei ｜ 与影对话
- I know, that's why we came out here — to see the meteorites. Don't worry, we'll go back once we've seen them. ｜ 我知道啊，我们就是出来看陨石的。只要看到了我们就回去了，不用担心。
- What is that!? ｜ 什么东西？！
- *sigh* My brother's right. I'm a writer of books, but no seller of them... ｜ 唉，大哥说的果然没错，我只懂写书，不懂卖书啊…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 3 ｜ 好感等级达到3后开启
- You start enjoying the delicious roast chicken with Paimon.\nHenri seems as if he is about to drool, but he holds back the desire to have a share to keep his promise and maintain his dignity.\nHowever, seeing Henri trying really hard to look unaffected, Paimon offers to share the roast chicken with Henri.\nThe chicken is crispy on the outside and gives out an irresistible oily aroma. Yum yum! ｜ 和派蒙一起开始吃香喷喷的烤鸡。\n恩里看上去很想吃。但他守住了诺言和尊严，并没有开口要。\n但派蒙看到恩里的样子，还是主动把烤鸡分给他了。\n外皮烤得香脆无比，散发着油脂香气。非常美味！
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Well, there we have it... That's it, then. So be it. ｜ 真的…也好吧，也行吧。
- Not Yet Attempted ｜ 尚未挑战
- Now you can take the sword back. ｜ 这把剑还给你。
- Talk to Scylla ｜ 与斯库拉对话
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Tanuki are really mysterious creatures.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>I think they are really cute.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Yeah, they're cute... until they start talking.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Hmm, I wonder... If you couldn't talk, would you appear to be more mysterious and noble?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Are you trying to mock me?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>*randomly humming innocently* ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>狸猫真是神奇的生物啊。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>狸猫真是可爱啊。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>可惜会说人话。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>如果派蒙不会说人话的话，会不会看起来神秘又高贵呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>你这句话，是在损我吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯哼。哼~哼~哼哼哼~，哼哼哼哼哼哼哼~
- Oh, um... Well, things have quieted down in Watatsumi Island for now, so I thought I'd take the chance to get out and see more of the world. ｜ 我吗…海祇岛的事务暂且告一段落，我想趁难得有空的时候外出看看。
- Challenge accepted! Heed my words, lowly Lady Megistus, you shall pay for your foolishness for as long as you live! ｜ 接受汝的挑衅！区区梅姬斯图斯卿，定将为其愚行懊悔不休！

- It's a modest price already... ｜ 已经是最低价了…
- ... ｜ ……
- Ascend: Clear the Ruins ｜ 突破：清扫遗迹中的魔物
- Oh, so that's what this is about. You're worried that you won't be able to rescue us if something bad happens, huh? Paimon can understand, but still... ｜ 原来你是怕出了事没法帮忙啊？哎呀，我理解你的心情…但是…
- But right now, it's time to rest. Sleep well, and sweet dreams. ｜ 现在是休息时间，睡吧，祝你们有个好梦。
- The time for discussion and diplomacy has already passed. I mean, if it were up to me, I would have skipped that stage to begin with... but I'm willing to do as the Tsaritsa deems fit. ｜ 交易和算计的时间，终于全都过去了…其实我也很讨厌那些小手段，不过为了女皇，我可以忍。
- "I don't mean to be rude..."\nNormal and Charged ATK SPD is increased, and the Stamina cost of Charged Attacks is decreased. Defeat opponents with <color=#FFCC33>Charged Attacks</color> to obtain stacks of a buff that increases the DMG dealt by Charged Attacks. When this buff reaches the maximum number of stacks, Charged Attacks that defeat enemies will unleash powerful shockwaves. ｜ 「我不想说的太失礼…」\n普通攻击与重击速度提升，重击消耗的体力降低。<color=#FFCC33>重击</color>击败敌人获得可叠加效果：重击造成的伤害提高。叠加至上限后，重击击败敌人时会释放强大的冲击波。
- Complete the photo-taking quest ｜ 完成留影任务
- "The Arataki Gang Is Filled With Folks Who Talk the Talk and Walk the Walk!" ｜ 「荒泷派的人才多，个个能打又能说！」
- The Surging One, Devourer of the Mighty ｜ 啃噬伟大生命的水之兽
- Xinyue Kiosk... ｜ 就在新月轩！
- Research? Oh, so you're a news editor, but you also have an interest in law? ｜ 研究？这位主编先生，对璃月律法也感兴趣吗？
- Whoa, this is delicious! I've tried every place around the Masters of the Night-Wind, and I've never had anything as amazing as this — I swear! ｜ 呜啊，太好吃了。「烟谜主」附近的吃食我都尝过了，全都没你做的好吃。真的真的。
- Manipulate the animal models and cause them to make movements according to the <color=#FFE14BFF>rhythms</color>.\nCalibrate your lag so that you can follow the rhythm and control the animal models with precision. ｜ 操纵动物模型，使其在恰当的<color=#FFE14BFF>节奏</color>中做出动作。\n调整延迟值，直至能根据节奏，准确地操纵动物模型。
- Ahh, it seems like you still have unfulfilled wishes, young Traveler. ｜ 哦哦，年轻人，看起来你心中还有未尽的愿望啊。
- Thank you! I think so too. ｜ 谢谢！我也这么觉得。
- #Good night to you as well, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，你也是，晚安。
- Use your Adventure Techniques well to decrease the threat of the bullet barrages and accrue score faster. <color=#ffcc33>Can be used up to 3 time(s) in a single challenge</color>.\nAfter using your Adventure Technique, <color=#ffcc33>gain all the following effects at the same time</color>: \n1. <color=#ffcc33>Transform</color> all Normal Bullets and Homing Rounds on the field into Labyrinth Coins.\n2. <color=#ffcc33>Your character's Movement SPD will be increased, their movement will not consume Stamina, and they will become invincible</color> for 7s.\n3. Your character gains an <color=#ffcc33>Auto-Attack Aura</color>, which will automatically attack all Wicked Warlocks within range once every 2s for 7s. ｜ 合理运用冒险特技，将降低弹幕的威胁，并提高得分效率，<color=#ffcc33>一次挑战中至多使用3次</color>。\n施放冒险特技后，<color=#ffcc33>同时获得以下全部效果</color>：\n1.场上的普通弹与追踪弹将<color=#ffcc33>转化</color>为迷宫币。\n2.<color=#ffcc33>角色的移动速度提升，角色行动不再消耗体力，并进入无敌状态</color>，持续7秒。\n3.角色获得<color=#ffcc33>自动攻击领域</color>，每2秒对范围内的所有坏坏法师进行一次攻击，持续7秒。
- *cough* Anyway, after retiring from the Marechaussee Phantom, I was idle for a time, before deciding to become a photographer, capturing the vitality within people and objects... ｜ 咳咳，总之，从逐影庭退役以后，我无所事事了一段时间，最终决定还是做个摄影家，描摹人与物所固有的生命力…
- "Rose, oh roses, grant me my wish." ｜ 「蔷薇啊蔷薇，实现我的愿望。」
- Is there a box around here I could borrow? You know, big square box, with that fresh cardboard smell... ｜ 这里有没有箱子呀？就是四四方方的，还能闻到纸浆香气的那种…
- Hero's Blade ｜ 勇者之剑
- Still, you may call me whatever you wish. After all, we... have become friends, or so I would say. ｜ 不过，你们爱怎么叫我就怎么叫我，不必介怀。毕竟，我们…应该说，我觉得，我们已经是朋友了。
- A traditional instrument from Natlan that can be used in performances.\nA small, four-stringed lute. It sounds clear and bright, yet soft, soothing the hearts of those who hear it. ｜ 使用后，可以进行演奏的纳塔传统乐器。\n小巧的四弦琴，音色清澈明亮而不失柔和，常令听众心情舒畅。
- Points Scored: {0}/{1} ｜ 击碎岩块积分：{0}/{1}
- It was Taroumaru's No. 2 Reserve Fund that they stole. They struck late at night while there was no one in the surrounding area, so they could slip in unnoticed. ｜ 这次被偷的是太郎丸的2号小金库，当时夜深了，木漏茶室附近没什么人，对方趁机溜了进来。
- I hope you come back to us soon, Vichama. ｜ 祝你早日回到我们身边。
- Anyway, I'll spare you the rest of my life story... I mentioned to Luoxia about putting on the performers list, she said she wants to see you. ｜ 哎呀，说太多了。我把您加入名单之后，也已经和落霞小姐说过了，她让您去见她。
- If you help me out, there'll be a gift for you in return. ｜ 如果你们能帮我，我可以送你们一件礼物。
- When {SPRITE_PRESET#2104}Electro is applied without dealing any DMG, the Elemental Reactions triggered will ignore DMG-dealing effects:\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2103}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Overloaded</color>: The target is forcibly switched to the next character\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2101}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Superconduct</color>: No effect\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Electro-Charged</color>: No effect\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2107}<color=#FFFFFFFF>Quicken</color>: Creates a [<color=#FFFFFFFF>Catalyzing Field</color>] that grants +1 DMG to the next 2 instances of Dendro or Electro DMG ｜ 不通过伤害附着{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}雷元素时，发生的元素反应会忽略伤害效果：\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2103}<color=#FFFFFFFF>超载</color>：目标强制切换到下一个角色\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2101}<color=#FFFFFFFF>超导</color>：没有效果\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2102}<color=#FFFFFFFF>感电</color>：没有效果\n{SPRITE_PRESET#2104}{SPRITE_PRESET#2107}<color=#FFFFFFFF>原激化</color>：生成使下2次草元素或雷元素伤害+1的[<color=#FFFFFFFF>激化领域</color>]
- Well... That makes a lot of sense. I'll keep it in mind. ｜ 嗯…说的很有道理，我会牢记的。
- #Well, uh... You see the Spiritdoors over there, {M#kane}{F#wahine}? When Amina and I were discussing this whole affair, these old Phlogiston Devices still operated normally. ｜ #这个嘛…{M#小哥}{F#小姐}你有没有看到那边的「灵道刻印门」？我之前和阿米娜妹妹商量的时候，这些古老的燃素装置还能正常工作来着。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Oh, speaking of Cloud Retainer, when did you see her last? ｜ 啊，说起留云真君，你上次见到她是什么时候？
- That's a bit of an exaggeration — I just asked Kinich to help identify some of the unknown casualties from the battle. ｜ 这种说法有点夸张——我只是拜托基尼奇，去调查一些无名遇难者的身份。
- Is it just me, or... was that Lady Furina on the stage just now? ｜ 我是不是看错了啊，那个人是芙宁娜大人吧？
- Uh, um... Whoopsie... ｜ 唔…欸…这个…就有点…
- Looks like we should help them. ｜ 看来应该帮帮她们。
- A gift given to a very special someone on a very special day.\n\nHere's to you, the brightest star in the night sky.\nWishing you a joyous journey in this great big world. ｜ 在某个意义重大的日子获得的礼品。\n\n献给星海之中熠熠生辉的你。\n祈愿你在这片大地上的旅程美好幸福。
- Prince ｜ 「王子」
- Weapon Ascension Material.\nThe coastal nations of Teyvat refer to the region beyond the protection of The Seven as the Dark Sea. It is said that many defeated gods refused to live under the new order of The Seven, so they fled to remote islands and became evil gods. However, their powers came from the same source as Rex Lapis, separate from this all-devouring darkness. ｜ 赋予武器突破之力的材料。\n提瓦特沿海的诸国把超越七神庇护的外部称之为「暗之外海」，据说许多战败的魔神不愿意活在新的七神秩序之下，于是逃到了远岛，化作了邪神。不过它们的力量和岩王帝君的力量本就同源，和这个吞噬一切的漆黑并不一样。
- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 5 rapid strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash 2 rapid sword strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. If this Plunging Attack is triggered by Chihayaburu, it will be converted to Plunging Attack: Midare Ranzan.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack: Midare Ranzan</color>\nWhen a Plunging Attack is performed using the effects of the Elemental Skill Chihayaburu, Plunging Attack DMG is converted to <color=#80FFD7FF>Anemo DMG</color> and will create a small wind tunnel via a secret blade technique that pulls in nearby objects and opponents. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多五段的连续剑击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，瞬间向前方挥出两剑。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。若这次下落攻击经由千早振施放，则会转为施放下落攻击·乱岚拨止。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击·乱岚拨止</color>\n通过元素战技·千早振施放的下落攻击，造成的伤害将转化为<color=#80FFD7FF>风元素伤害</color>，并在落地时施展秘剑产生小型的风穴，牵引附近的物体与敌人。
- Of course! Just you wait, Paimon's gonna be as big as three mountains before you know it! ｜ 当然能，等到以后，我一定要长成「三座山大小」的派蒙给你看！
- Mechanicus Fixed Emplacement ｜ 棋谭机关固定点
- I... I have no reason to doubt your decisions, astute as they are... ｜ 这…我当然无意质疑您的睿断…
- About Saurian Stylists... ｜ 关于龙的发型师…
- Receive the Jibashiri's acknowledgment. ｜ 获得地走官的认可。
- Find the monster based on Jack's description ｜ 根据杰克的描述找到怪物
- Jiawei has prepared some special fishing training for you: catch as many fish of any type as possible within the time limit. The higher your score, the greater your reward. ｜ 嘉玮为你准备的钓鱼特训：在限定时间内尽可能多地钓获任意鱼种，成绩越优秀，奖励越丰厚。
- Don't hide from it. Confront the stress of the exam directly. ｜ 不要逃避，直面考试的压力吧！
- That's true... But the ore that we picked up then didn't really get put to any use, did they? ｜ 对喔。不过，那个时候挖到的矿石，最后好像也没怎么派上用场嘛…
- I guess you're right. Ugh, if he'd just left things the way they were, it never would've had to come to this... But he's forced our hand. Time to teach him a lesson. ｜ 也只能这么做了。唉，谁叫他改制太快，我们手上的权力越来越少…必须给他点颜色瞧瞧。
- Thank you. We're sorry to ask this of you when your strength is already all but spent. ｜ 谢谢你，你已经这么虚弱，我们还不得不依靠你的力量。

- Well, then you can just stay here for now, right? ｜ 那放西摩尔一个在这里应该没问题吧？
- Mother once warned that a beautiful face can hide deceptive intentions. If she looks as lovely as the moonlight, she must either be a fox spirit, or some old bake-neko hag of significant power — Tanuki Historical Commentary ｜ 家母曾有教谕：美貌的女子多精通骗术。由是举一反三可得：美貌如月光般的女人，其真面目莫非狐妖，要么便是修为不浅化猫婆婆咯。——狸史氏评
- Please leave. Due to an ongoing emergency, we are receiving no guests at present except where a special invitation is given. ｜ 请回吧，现在是紧急情况。若非特殊邀请，府内暂不会客。
- ...Hm. ｜ …哼。
- Shadows Amidst Snowstorms ｜ 皑尘与雪影

- (Hmm, seems this won't produce a particularly effective rebuttal.) ｜ （这个…好像不能构成有效的反驳。）
- We can get into the bathhouse after closing. ｜ 可以在打烊后去泡温泉。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making "The Distance Between It and the Flames."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『它与火焰的距离』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- If you'd like to have a try, please come back at nighttime. ｜ 你想要玩这个的话，就等晚上再来吧。

- The thief seems to have made a clean getaway, and I sure didn't bank on these monsters being here... ｜ 但没想到小偷没找到，却发现了一堆魔物…
- Weapon forging material. Can be used to forge 4-star polearms.\nPhilosophers believe that there are four purposes behind earthly things. The purpose of these billets is to become a weapon worthy of accompanying a hero. ｜ 生产武器的原材料。通过锻造，可以生产出4星的长柄武器。\n哲学中认为尘世间事物，皆具备四种成因。这些原胚的「目的」，正是成为陪伴英雄的武器。
- I've been working as a bartender here for more than a decade. I'm employed by the Dawn Winery, like everyone else. ｜ 我在这里做酒保大概有十多年了，和其他员工一样，都是直接受雇于晨曦酒庄。
- ...I admit, I mostly knew what you were going to say the moment I saw you arriving with Estampe. ｜ …你们和埃斯唐普同来，我差不多能猜到你们要说什么。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 2 ｜ 好感等级达到2级后解锁
- What do you think? And why aren't you asking Albedo, huh? ｜ 才不是！你怎么不说是阿贝多在怪叫呢！
- It's very dangerous! Very dangerous! Let's leave before the Vanagni notices us! ｜ 很危险的！很危险的！我们快走吧！趁桓那吉还没发现我们！
- Summer Night's Moment ｜ 夏祭之刻
- It is me that that child is still angry at... I will teach them a lesson personally later. ｜ 这孩子果然还在和奴家赌气…等会奴家自己再去教训一下那孩子。

- I see. I can wait until you're done... ｜ 嗯，那就等你先忙完吧…
- It's my first time hearing this name. ｜ 第一次听到这个名字。
- Ha... ｜ 哈…

- That's right, don't forget about Paimon! ｜ 对，别把我给忘了！
- Keep your smile, Spinocrocodile! No matter what happens, Paimon will always be there for you. ｜ 打起精神来呀！无论发生什么我都会陪着你的。

- The diplomats from Snezhnaya promised a very generous reward indeed... and all they requested of me in return was to see that the Vision Hunt Decree is upheld. ｜ 只需要协助眼狩令的颁布和推行，就能拿到至冬使节承诺的那些好处…

- Hey, I don't think we've met before! Are you a Yasnapati? ｜ 啊，是没见过的人类！你是花灵们的「谒颂主」吗？
- He died on the battlefield, so he must have left something here. That's why I'm here, looking for them. ｜ 他战死沙场，大概会留下一些遗物吧，所以我才来这里寻找。
- A prototype for a standard-issue weapon the Yuheng commissioned from Blackcliff Forge after having analyzed the ancient mechanisms that protected the adeptal abode upon Tianheng. ｜ 解析昔日拱卫天衡的仙家机关后，由玉衡星委托黑岩厂锻造的实验型制式兵器。

- She used to be a great adventurer back in the day, and her exploits took her all over the world. Eventually, her injuries led to her retirement, after which she settled down in Nasha Town. ｜ 她以前也是很厉害的冒险者，走南闯北去过很多地方，后来因为伤病告别了冒险生涯，就在那夏镇定居下来。
- I know how important this is to you, but it won't help us find the thing we're looking for. ｜ 虽然知道这个东西对你很重要啦，不过好像对我们要找的机关没有什么帮助哪。
- Don't be surprised if you find strange relics in Liyue. What we know of Liyue's lengthy history is but a single drop in the wide ocean. ｜ 在璃月，无论发现了什么奇怪的古物都不要惊讶。和璃月漫长的历史相比，我们所知的东西只是沧海一粟。
- Some chefs might even consider Sweet Flowers to be an extremely rare and precious ingredient! ｜ 有的大厨说不定会把这朵甜甜花当成超珍稀级的食材呢！
- An orchestra must have a conductor, lest no music be made out of cacophony. ｜ 乐团总得有个指挥。否则就只有无数的杂音，无法构成音乐。
- Thanks for the reminder. See you. ｜ 谢谢你的提醒，再见。
- If she really is with the Treasure Hoarders, then I suspect they must have been following me around for some time... Hoping to get at some fresh ruin treasure via me. ｜ 如果她真是盗宝团的成员，那么按照我的推测，也许我早就被盗宝团跟踪了，他们想跟着我…「捡现成的」。

- A talisman that somehow appeared in your inventory after you passed the Wayward Hermetic Spiritspeaker's test.\nIn some records kept by the Masters of the Night-Wind, priests masterful in Spiritspeaking can use meditation to pass their consciousness through the light and shadow that reflects off obsidian, thus reaching the enigmatic underground realm that only the dead may enter. This deed is, however, perilous, and priests who perform it must often wear such talismans to guard their souls from being lost in that mysterious land. However, this talisman's symbolic value far outstrips its real effects. Perhaps the hermit-priest who grants this to a warrior who passes the test only does so as a simple blessing. ｜ 通过灵觉隐修的迷者的考验后，不知何时出现在背包中的护符。\n在「烟谜主」部族中的一些记载中，「灵觉」强大的祭司甚至能够通过冥想，令意识穿越黑曜石反射的光影，进入唯有亡者才能进入的地下谜土。只是这一举动相当危险，能够做到此举的祭司往往需要佩戴类似的护符，避免灵魂迷失在谜土之中。不过，这护符的象征意义远大于实际意义，隐修的祭司将之留给通过考验的勇士，也许只是为了留下简单的祝福。

- How dare you. I'm taking a brief moment of much-needed respite from a very hectic schedule, that's all. ｜ 怎么能这么说呢，是忙里偷闲，忙里偷闲而已。
- Hmph, just try to escape this time, you naughty, caravan-robbing crab! ｜ 哼，你这只打劫商队的坏螃蟹，这下看你往哪跑！

- Will do! I'm sure we'll all see each other again soon. ｜ 嗯！我们肯定还会见面的。
- Great! The case of the stolen fireworks is finally solved, good thing we were able to get to the bottom of it! ｜ 太好啦！这样一来烟花失窃案就算是顺利解决啦，还好没让那群坏家伙得逞。
- To be honest, I recently made a pen pal, and we've got a good thing going. He hinted that he'd like to meet me at Hotel Debord. I've been wondering if I should agree. ｜ 实不相瞒，我最近结识了一位笔友，我俩很聊得来，对方暗示了想要在德波大饭店见面，我正犹豫着要不要答应他…
- ...It almost sounds like a poem, or some kind of story. ｜ …好像诗句，又好像故事。

- Maticui ｜ 马提库伊
- My head's spinning. Albizzi just gave me a quick rundown of the situation. So you caught the detective? ｜ 脑子晕乎乎的。刚才奥比奇和我说了个大概。你们抓住探长了吗？
- The Jade of Return... Yeah, I guess. You too, then? ｜ 「回还之玉」…嗯，算是吧，原来你们也是为了它而来…
- Hmm, Vidoc isn't here, but the guys who went to work in the morning are back. Let's go ask them. ｜ 这次维多克不在，但是上午去工作的那几个人回来了，我们去问问他们吧。
- And as a result, our homeland will return to the way it once was. ｜ 自然，我们的家园也会恢复原状。
- I'm fine, Traveler... Ahem... I can take it... ｜ 没关系的，旅行者…咳…我还撑得住。
- Maybe it's a Dendro Slime on fire. ｜ 也有可能是着火的草史莱姆。
- But you're right, Paimon. I'll need to be careful how I word it... but I'll try to find some time over the next couple days to mention it to her. ｜ 派蒙说得也对。我会思考好措辞，在这两天里找机会告诉她的。
- About that "Chief Advisor" thing... ｜ 关于「首席顾问」…
- Me...? Beer. I don't like it that much though... ｜ 我的话…啤酒吧，倒不是说特别喜欢…
- ...It's Fashion Week right now... ｜ …最近可是时装周哟…

- "Hey there, partner! I see we're both in good spirits — that's perfect for a relaxing game of cards!"\nHint: Navia's deck is built around the Crystallize reaction. She can use it and "draw card" effects to greatly increase the burst DMG "Navia"'s Skills can deal. ｜ 「你好呀，搭档！今天我们的心情都不错，正适合来一局轻松愉快的卡牌游戏！」\n【提示】娜维娅的牌组以「结晶反应」为主题，通过「结晶反应」和抓牌效果，可以大幅提高「娜维娅」技能的爆发伤害。

- Crimson flowers that can bloom even on ancient battlefields or flourish in the depths of the desert. Its drooping flowers seem to mourn for heroes long past.\nOnce, when beings dark and demonic invaded the lands, countless heroes sacrificed themselves in a battle against them. Legend has it that these flowers are watered by the blood of those martyrs. The tribes of these plains speak additionally of the countless innocents who suffered from that calamity, of how due to being stained by the filth from the war, they are barred from eternal samsara, and can only languish amidst these flowers, lamenting the injustice of fate by weeping. ｜ 绽放在古老战场上的鲜红之花，即便在荒漠中也能顽强生长。低垂的花朵似乎是在哀悼曾在此牺牲的英灵。\n在过去，当黯色的邪秽侵蚀大地之时，曾有无数的英雄牺牲在同漆黑魔物的战争当中，据说这些花朵便是因浇灌了那些战殁者的鲜血而生。砂原部族流传的古歌中则说，在古时灾厄中殒命的无辜者的灵魂，其中有因玷染了污秽而无法归于永恒的轮回之流，只能寄宿于这些花朵中，为不公的命运垂泪。

- I can imagine. You probably see the Masters of the Night-Wind as a people shrouded in mystery, who pride ourselves on our arcane practices. ｜ 我理解两位的想法，想必在两位看来，烟谜主的人都充满了神秘感，他们推崇的肯定都是难以言明的事物。

- Can't move it... ｜ 推不动…
- The Fontaine Beauty Association holds regular meetings, and I really appreciate getting the chance to chat with everyone there. Most people, when I compliment them, just blush, lower their head, and try to brush it off. But Navia's different — she's always very happy to receive praise, and then she comes to shake my hand and take a photo with me as a souvenir. She's like a shining yellow rose who lights up the world around her, and whether it's daytime or nighttime, sunny or gloomy, she always looks dazzling. ｜ 枫丹美容协会定期会举办交流会，我很珍惜跟大家聊天的机会。大部分人听到我的夸赞后都会低着头红着脸说哪有哪有，只有娜维娅小姐每次都会高兴大方地接受夸奖，然后握着我的手邀请我一起合影留念。她就像株光芒四射的黄玫瑰，不管白天黑夜晴天阴天都那么的耀眼呢。
- ...That is, if you still want to hang out with me next time... heh... ｜ 啊，如果你下次还会想跟我一起的话…啊哈哈…
- You're always so busy, it's high time you gave yourself a proper break. Even the sharpest blade loses its edge if it's always in use. Regular maintenance is essential for reliable performance. ｜ 我看你一直都挺忙的，也是时候休息一下了。哪怕再锋利的剑，一直使用而不保养，也会出现豁口。
- Your eyes... they remind me of a soldier I once trained. He was on track to take over from me... ｜ 你的眼神…让我想起了曾经教过的一个士兵，本来他应该会接替我的位置…
- Maybe she did when she was younger. ｜ 说不定是年轻的时候？
- "Jinn"? Why, yes, I do count as one. "Mother"? Hmm... Well, if it does not displease you, I have been such before. ｜ 「镇灵」？呵呵…是的，我是其中之一。「之母」？嗯…如您不嫌弃，我也做过母亲。
- Hmph... *sigh* ｜ 哼…唉…

I can take you to them, and I can also help translate for you. Come on, it'll be fun~! But first, let's get some grains as a gift for them. ｜ 我从小在山间长大，花草树木，还有小动物们都是我的朋友哦！对了，你想和小团雀聊聊天吗？我可以带你去，也可以帮你传话。来吧，很有趣的~我们先去准备点米粒给它们当做礼物！
